40001001	ibraaheem kee santan , daud kee santan , yeesha maseeh kee vanshaavalee .
40001002	ibraaheem se isahak utpann hua isahak se yakoob utpann hua aur yakoob se yahooda aur usake bhai utpann hae .
40001003	yahooda se firis , aur yahooda aur tamar se jorah utpann hae aur firis se hisron utpann hua , aur hisron se aeram utpann hua .
40001004	aur aeram se ammeenadab utpann hua aur ammeenadab se nahashaen aur nahashaen se salamon utpann hua .
40001005	aur salamon aur rahab se boaj utpann hua . aur boaj aur root se obed utpann hua aur obed se yishau utpann hua .
40001006	aur yishau se daud raja utpann hua . .
40001007	aur daud se sulaaiman us sree se utpann hua jo pahile uriyyah kee patnee thee .
40001008	aur sulaaiman se rahabam utpann hua aur rahabam se aabiyyah utpann hua aur aabiyyah se asa utpann hua aur asa se yahoshafaat utpann hua aur yahoshaafaat se yoram utpann hua , aur yoram se ujjaiyah utpann hua .
40001009	aur ujjaiyah se yotam utpann hua aur yotam se ahaj utpann hua aur ahaj se hijaakiyyah utpann hua .
40001010	aur hijikiyyah se manaashshiah utpann hua . aur manaashshiah se amon utpann hua aur amon se yoshaiyyah utpann hua .
40001011	aur bandee hokar babool jane ke samay men yoshaiyyah se yakunyah , aur us ke bhai utpann hae . .
40001012	bandee hokar babul pahunchae jane ke bad yakunyah se shaalatiael utpann hua aur shaalatiael se jaroobbabil utpann hua .
40001013	aur jaroobbabil se abeehood utpann hua , aur abeehood se ilyakeem utpann hua aur ilyakeem se ajor utpann hua .
40001014	aur ajor se sadok utpann hua aur sadok se akheem utpann hua aur akheem se ileehood utpann hua .
40001015	aur ileehood se iliyajar utpann hua aur ialiyajar se mattan utpann hua aur mattan se yakoob utpann hua .
40001016	aur yakoob se yoosufa utpann hua jo mariyam ka paati tha jis se yeesha jo maseeh kahalata haai utpann hua . .
40001017	ibraaheem se daud tak sab chaudah peeddhee hui aur daud se babul ko bandee hokar pahunchae jane tak chaudah peeddhee aur bandee hokar babul ko pahunchae jane ke samay se lekar maseeh tak chaudah peeddhee hui . .
40001018	ab yeesha maseeh ka janm is prakar se hua , ki jab us kee mata maariyam kee manganee yoosufa ke sath ho gai , to un ke ikatthe hone ke pahile se vah paavitra atma kee or se garbhvatee pai gai .
40001019	so usake paati yoosufa ne jo dharmee tha aur use badanam karana naheen chahata tha , use chupake se tyag dene kee manasa kee .
40001020	jab vah in baton ke soch hee men tha to prabhu ka svargadoot use svapn men dikhai dekar kahane laga he yoosufa daud kee santan , too apanee patnee mariyam ko apane yahan le ane se mat dra kyonki jo usake garbh men haai , vah pavitra atma kee or se haai .
40001021	vah putra janegee aur too usaka nam yeesha rakhna kyonaki vah apane logon ka un ke papon se udar karega .
40001022	yah sab kuchh isaliye hua ki jo vachan prabhu ne bhvishyadvkta ke dara kaha tha vah poora ho .
40001023	ki , dekho aek kunvaree garbhvatee hogee aur aek putra janegee aur usaka nam immanael rakha jaega jis ka arth yah haai parameshvar hamare sath .
40001024	so yoosufa neend se jagakar prabhu ke doot kee agyaa anusar apanee patnee ko apane yahan le aya .
40001025	aur jab tak vah putra n janee tab tak vah usake pas n gaya : aur us ne usaka nam yeesha rakha . .
40002001	herodes raja ke dinon men jab yahoodiya ke baaitalaham men yeesha ka janm hua , to dekho , poorva se kai jyotishaee yarooshalem men akar poochhne lage .
40002002	ki yahoodiyon ka raja jis ka janm hua haai , kahan haai ? kyonaki ham ne poorva men usaka tara dekha haai aur us ko pranam karane ae haain .
40002003	yah sunakar herodes raja aur usake sath sara yarooshalem ghabara gaya .
40002004	aur us ne logon ke sab mahayajakon aur shaaastriayon ko ikatthe karake un se poochha , ki maseeh ka janm kaha hona chahiae ?
40002005	unhon ne us se kaha , yahoodiya ke baaitalaham men kyonki bhvishyadvkta ke dara yon likha haai .
40002006	ki he baaitalaham , jo yahooda ke desh men haai , too kisee reeati se yahooda ke aadhaikaariyon men sab se chhotta naheen kyonki tujh men se aek adhaipaati nikalega , jo meree praja israel kee rakhvalee karega .
40002007	tab herodes ne jyotishaiyon ko chupake se bulakar un se poochha , ki tara tteek kis samay dikhai diya tha .
40002008	aur us ne yah kahakar unhen baaitalaham bheja , ki jakar us balak ke vishay men tteek tteek maloom karo aur jab vah mil jae to mujhe samachar do taaki maain bhee akar us ko pranam karoon .
40002009	ve raja kee bat sunakar chale gaa , aur dekho , jo tara unhon ne poorva men dekha tha , vah un ke age age chala , aur janha balak tha . us jagah ke upar panhuchakar tthar gaya . .
40002010	us tare ko dekhkar ve ati anaandait hae .
40002011	aur us ghar men pahunchakar us balak ko us kee mata maariyam ke sath dekha , aur munh ke bal girakar use pranam kiya aur apana apana thaila kholakar use sona , aur lohaban , aur gandharas kee bhentt chaddhai .
40002012	aur svapn men yah chitaunee pakar ki herodes ke pas fir n jana , ve doosare marga se hokar apane desh ko chale gaae . .
40002013	un ke chale jane ke bad dekho , prabhu ke aek doot ne svapn men yoosufa ko dikhai dekar kaha , utt us balak ko aur us kee mata ko lekar misr desh ko bhag ja aur jab tak maain tujh se n kahoo , tab tak vahee rahana kyonaki herodes is balak ko ddoonddhne par haai ki use marava dale .
40002014	vah rat hee ko uttkar balak aur us kee mata ko lekar misr ko chal diya .
40002015	aur herodes ke marane tak vaheen raha isaliye ki vah vachan jo prabhu ne bhvishyadvkta ke dara kaha tha ki maain ne apane putra ko misr se bulaya poora ho .
40002016	jab herodes ne yah dekha , ki jyotishaiyon ne mere sath ttttha kiya haai , tab vah krodha se bhr gaya aur logon ko bhejakar jyotishaiyon se tteek tteek poochhe hae samay ke anusar baaitalaham aur usake as pas ke sab ladkon ko jo do varsha ke , va us se chhotte the , marava dala .
40002017	tab jo vachan yirmayah bhvishyadvkta ke dara kaha gaya tha , vah poora hua ,
40002018	ki ramah men aek karoon-nad sunai diya , rona aur bada vilap , rahel apane balakon ke liye ro rahee thee , aur shaant hona n chahatee thee , kyonki ve haain naheen . .
40002019	herodes ke marane ke bad dekho , prabhu ke doot ne misr men yoosufa ko svapn men dikhai dekar kaha .
40002020	ki ut , balak aur us kee mata ko lekar israel ke desh men chala ja kyonankai jo balak ke praan lena chahate the , ve mar gaae .
40002021	vah utta , aur balak aur us kee mata ko sath lekar israel ke desh men aya .
40002022	parantu yah sunakar ki araakhailaus apane pita herodes kee jagah yahoodiya par rajy kar raha haai , vahan jane se dra aur svapn men chitaunee pakar galeel desh men chala gaya .
40002023	aur nasarat nam nagar men ja basa taaki vah vachan poora ho , jo bhavishyadvktaon ke dara kaha gaya tha , ki vah nasaree kahalaega . .
40003001	un dinon men yoohanna bapaatisma denevala akar yahoodiya ke jangal men yah prachar karane laga . ki
40003002	man firao kyonki svarga ka rajy nikatt a gaya haai .
40003003	yah vahee haai jis kee charcha yashaayah bhvishyadvkta ke dara kee gai ki jangal men aek pukaranevale ka shabd ho raha haai , ki prabhu ka marga taaiyar karo , us kee sadken seedhaee karo .
40003004	yah yoohanna untt ke rom ka vasr paahine tha , aur apanee kamar men chamade ka pattuka bandho hae tha , aur usaka bhojan ttiiddayan aur banamadha tha .
40003005	tab yarooshalem ke aur sare yahoodiya ke , aur yaradan ke as pas ke sare desh ke log usake pas nikal ae .
40003006	aur apane apane papon ko manakar yaradan nadee men us se bapatisma liya .
40003007	jab us ne bahutere fareeasiyon aur sadookiyon ko bapatisma ke liye apane pas ate dekha , to un se kaha , ki he sanp ke bachchon tumhen kis ne jata diya , ki anevale krodha se bhago ?
40003008	so man firav ke yogy fal lao .
40003009	aur apane apane man men yah n socho , ki hamara pita ibraaheem haai kyonaki maain tum se kahata hoo , ki parameshvar in patthron se ibraaheem ke liye santan utpann kar sakata haai .
40003010	aur ab kulhada pedon kee jad par rakha hua haai , isaliye jo jo ped achchha fal naheen lata , vah katta aur ag men jhonka jata haai .
40003011	maain to panee se tumhen man firav ka bapatisma deta hoo , parantu jo mere bad anevala haai , vah mujh se shaktaishaalee haai maain us kee jootee uttane ke yogy nahee , vah tumhen pavitra atma aur ag se bapatisma dega .
40003012	usaka soop us ke hath men haai , aur vah apana khalihan achchhee reeati se safa karega , aur apane gehoon ko to khtte men ikattha karega , parantu boosee ko us ag men jalaega jo bujhne kee naheen . .
40003013	us samay yeesha maseeh galeel se yaradan ke kinare par yoohanna ke pas us se bapaatisma lene aya .
40003014	parantu yoohanna yah kahakar use rokane laga , ki mujhe tere hath se bapaatisma lene kee avashyakta haai , aur too mere pas aya haai ?
40003015	yeesha ne us ko yah uttr diya , ki ab to aeesa hee hone de , kyonki hamen isee reeti se sab dhaaarmikata ko poora karana uchit haai , tab us ne us kee bat man lee .
40003016	aur yeesha bapaatisma lekar turant panee men se upar aya , aur dekho , usake liye akash khul gaya aur us ne parameshvar ke atma ko kabootar kee nai utarate aur apane upar ate dekha .
40003017	aur dekho , yah akashavanee hui , ki yah mera piry putra haai , jis se maain atyant prasann hoon . .
40004001	tab us samay atma yeesha ko jangal men le gaya taki ibalees se us kee pareeksha ho .
40004002	vah chalees din , aur chalees rat , nirahar raha , ant men use bookh lagee .
40004003	tab parakhnevale ne pas akar us se kaha , yadi too parameshvar ka putra haai , to kah de , ki ye patthr rottyaian ban jaen .
40004004	us ne uttr diya ki likha haai ki manushy keval rottee hee se nahee , parantu har aek vachan se jo parameshvar ke mukh se nikalata haai jeeavit rahega .
40004005	tab ibalees use pavitra nagar men le gaya aur maandair ke kangoore par khda kiya .
40004006	aur us se kaha yadi too parameshvar ka putra haai , to apane ap ko neeche gira de kyonaki likha haai , ki vah tere vishay men apane svargadooton ko agyaa dega aur ve tujhe hathon hath utta lenge kaheen aeesa n ho ki tere panvon men patthr se ttes lage .
40004007	yeesha ne us se kaha yah bhee likha haai , ki too prabhu apane parameshvar kee pareeksha n kara .
40004008	fir shautan use aek bahut unche pahad par le gaya aur sare jagat ke rajy aur usaka vibhv dikhakar
40004009	us se kaha , ki yadi too girakar mujhe pranam kare , to maain yah sab kuchh tujhe de doonga .
40004010	tab yeesha ne us se kaha he shautan door ho ja , kyonaki likha haai , ki too prabhu apane parameshvar ko pranam kar , aur keval usee kee upasana kara .
40004011	tab shautan usake pas se chala gaya , aur dekho , svargadoot akar us kee seva karane lage . .
40004012	jab us ne yah suna ki yoohanna pakadva diya gaya , to vah galeel ko chala gaya .
40004013	aur nasarat ko chhodkar kafaranahoom men jo jheel ke kinare jabooloon aur napatalee ke desh men haai jakar rahane laga .
40004014	taaki jo yashaayah bhavishdvkta ke dara kaha gaya tha , vah poora ho .
40004015	ki jabooloon aur napatalee ke desha , jheel ke marga se yaradan ke pas anyajatiyon ka galeela .
40004016	jo log andhakar men baaitte the unhon ne badee jyonti dekhee aur jo mratyu ke desh aur chhaya men baaitte the , un par jyoti chamakee . .
40004017	us samay se yeesha prachar karana aur yah kahana arambh kiya , ki man firao kyonki svarga ka rajy nikatt aya haai .
40004018	us ne galeel kee jheel ke kinare firate hae do bhaiyon arthata shamaun ko jo pataras kahalata haai , aur usake bhai andairyas ko jheel men jal dalate dekha kyonaki ve machhve the .
40004019	aur un se kaha , mere peechhe chale ao , to maain tum ko manushyon ke pakadnevale banaunga .
40004020	ve turant jalon ko chhodkar usake peechhe ho liae .
40004021	aur vahan se age baddhkar , us ne aur do bhaiyon arthata jabadee ke putra yakoob aur usake bhai yoohanna ko apane pita jabdee ke sath nav par apane jalon ko sudhaarate dekha aur unhen bhee bulaya
40004022	ve turant nav aur apane pita ko chhodkar usake peechhe ho liae . .
40004023	aur yeesha sare galeel men firata hua un kee sabhaon men upadesh karata aur rajy ka susamachar prachar karata , aur logon kee har prakar kee beemaree aur durbalata ko door karata raha .
40004024	aur sare sooriya men usaka yash faail gaya aur log sab beemaron ko , jo nana prakar kee beemariyon aur dukhon men jakade hae the , aur jin men dushttatmaen theen aur mirgeevalon aur jhole ke mare huon ko usake pas lae aur us ne unhen changa kiya .
40004025	aur galeel aur dikapulis aur yarooshalem aur yahoodiya se aur yaradan ke par se bheed kee bheed usake peechhe ho lee . .
40005001	vah is bheed ko dekhkar , pahad par chaddh gaya aur jab baaitt gaya to usake chele usake pas ae .
40005002	aur vah apana munh kholakar unhen yah upadesh dene laga ,
40005003	dhany haain ve , jo man ke deen haai , kyonki svarga ka rajy unheen ka haai .
40005004	dhany haain ve , jo shaek karate haai , kyonki ve shaanti paenge .
40005005	dhany haain ve , jo namra haai , kyonki ve prathvee ke adhaikaree honge .
40005006	dhany haain ve , jo dayavant haai , kyonki un par daya kee jaegee .
40005007	dhany haain ve , jin ke man shauddh haai , kyonki ve parameshvar ko dekhenge .
40005008	dhany haain ve , jo mel karavanevale haai , kyonki ve parameshvar ke putra kahalaenge .
40005009	dhany haain ve , jo dharma ke karan satae jate haai , kyonki svarga ka rajy unheen ka haai .
40005010	dhany ho tum , jab manushy mere karan joott bol bolakar tumharo virodha men sab prakar kee buree bat kahen .
40005011	anandait aur magan hona kyonki tumhare liye svarga men bada fal haai isaliye ki unhon ne un bhvishyadvktaon ko jo tum se pahile the isee reeti se sataya tha . .
40005012	tum prathvee ke namak ho parantu yaadi namak ka svad bigad ja , to vah fir kis vastu se namakeen kiya jaega ?
40005013	tum prathvee ke namak ho parantu yaadi namak ka svad bigad ja , to vah fir kis vastu se namakeen kiya jaega ? fir vah kisee kam ka nahee , keval is ke ki bahar faenka jae aur manushyon ke paairon tale rauna jae .
40005014	tum jagat kee jyoti ho jo nagar pahad par basa hua haai vah chhpai naheen sakata .
40005015	aur log diya jalakar paaimane ke neeche naheen parantu deevatt par rakhte haai , tab us se ghar ke sab logon ko prakash pahunchata haai .
40005016	usee prakar tumhara ujiyala manushyon ke samhane chamake ki ve tumhare bhle kamon ko dekhkar tumhare pita kee , jo svarga men haai , badai karen . .
40005017	yah n samajho , ki maain vyavastha ya bhavishyadvktaon kee pustakon ko lop karane aya hoon .
40005018	lop karane nahee , parantu poora karane aya hoo , kyonki maain tum se sach kahata hoo , ki jab tak akash aur prathvee ttl n jae , tab tak vyavastha se aek matra ya bindu bhee bina poora hae naheen ttlega .
40005019	isaliye jo koi in chhottee se chhottee agyaaon men se kisee aek ko tode , aur vaaisa hee logon ko sikhaa , vah svarga ke rajy men sab se chhotta kahalaega parantu jo koi un ka palan karega aur unhen sikhaaega , vahee svarga ke rajy men mahan kahalaega .
40005020	kyonaki maain tum se kahata hoo , ki yadi tumharee dhaarmikata shaaastriayon aur fareeasiyon kee dhaarmikata se baddhkar n ho , to tum svarga ke rajy men kabhee pravesh karane n paoge . .
40005021	tum sun chuke ho , ki poorvakal ke logon se kaha gaya tha ki hatya n karana , aur jo koi hatya karega vah kachaharee men dand ke yogy hoga .
40005022	parantu maain tum se yah kahata hoo , ki jo koi apane bhai par krodha karega , vah kachaharee men dand ke yogy hoga : aur jo koi apane bhai ko nikamma kahega vah mahasabha men dand ke yogy hoga aur jo koi kahe are moorkh vah narak kee ag ke dand ke yogy hoga .
40005023	isaliye yaadi too apanee bhentt vedee par la , aur vahan too smaran kare , ki mere bhai ke man men meree or se kuchh virodha haai , to apanee bhentt vaheen vedee ke samhane chhod de .
40005024	aur jakar pahile apane bhai se mel milap kara tab akar apanee bhentt chaddha .
40005025	jab tak too apane mui ke sath marga men haai , us se jhttpatt mel milap kar le kaheen aeesa n ho ki mui tujhe hakim ko saunpe , aur hakim tujhe sipahee ko saunp de aur too bandeegrah men dal diya jae .
40005026	maain tum se sach kahata hoon ki jab tak too kaudee kaudee bhr n de tab tak vahan se choottne n paega . .
40005027	tum sun chuke ho ki kaha gaya tha , ki vyaabhaichar n karana .
40005028	parantu maain tum se yah kahata hoo , ki jo koi kisee sree par kudrashtti dale vah apane man men us se vyabhaichar kar chuka .
40005029	yaadi teree daahinee ankh tujhe ttokar khaila , to use nikalakar apane pas se faenk de kyonki tere liye yahee bhla haai ki tere angon men se aek nash ho jae aur tera sara shareer narak men n dala jae .
40005030	aur yaadi tera daahina hath tujhe ttokar khaila , to us ko kattkar apane pas se faenk de , kyonaki tere liye yahee bhla haai , ki tere angon men se aek nash ho jae aur tera sara shareer narak men n dala jae . .
40005031	yah bhee kaha gaya tha , ki jo koi apanee patnee ko tyag de to use tyagapatra de .
40005032	parantu maain tum se yah kahata hoon ki jo koi apanee patnee ko vyabhaichar ke siva kisee aur karan se chhod de , to vah us se vyabhaichar karavata haai aur jo koi us tyagee hui se byah kare , vah vyabhaichar karata haai . .
40005033	fir tum sun chuke ho , ki poorvakal ke logon se kaha gaya tha ki joottee shapath n khana , parantu prabhu ke liye apanee shapath ko pooree karana .
40005034	parantu maain tum se yah kahata hoo , ki kabhee shapath n khana n to svarga kee , kyonaki vah parameshvar ka sinhasan haai .
40005035	n dharatee kee , kyonki vah usake panvon kee chaukee haai n yarooshalem kee , kyonki vah maharaja ka nagar haai .
40005036	apane sir kee bhee shapath n khana kyonaki too aek bal ko bhee n ujala , n kala kar sakata haai .
40005037	parantu tumharee bat han kee ha , ya naheen kee naheen ho kyonki jo kuchh is se adhaik hota haai vah burai se hota haai . .
40005038	tum sun chuke ho , ki kaha gaya tha , ki ankh ke badale ank , aur dant ke badale danta .
40005039	parantu maain tum se yah kahata hoo , ki bure ka samana n karata parantu jo koi tere daahine gal par thppad mare , us kee or doosara bhee faer de .
40005040	aur yaadi koi tujh par naalish karake tera kurata lena chahe , to use dohar bhee le lene de .
40005041	aur jo koi tujhe kos bhr begar men le jae to usake sath do kos chala ja .
40005042	jo koi tujh se mange , use de aur jo tujh se udhaar lena chahe , us se munh n mod . .
40005043	tum sun chuke ho , ki kaha gaya tha ki apane padosee se praem rakhna , aur apane baairee se baaira .
40005044	parantu maain tum se yah kahata hoo , ki apane baaiariyon se praem rakho aur apane satanevalon ke liye praarthna karo .
40005045	jis se tum apane svargeey pita kee santan ttharoge kyonki vah bhlon aur buron dono par apana soorya uday karata haai , aur dhaarmiyon aur adharmiyon donon par menh barasata haai .
40005046	kyonaki yadi tum apane praem rakhnevalon hee se praem rakho , to tumhare liye kya labh hoga ? kya mahasool lenevale bhee aeesa hee naheen karate ?
40005047	aur yaadi tum keval apane bhaiyon kee ko namaskar karo , to kaun sa bada kam karate ho ? kya anyajaati bhee aeesa naheen karate ?
40005048	isaliye chaahiye ki tum siddh bano , jaaisa tumhara svargeey pita siddh haai . .
40006001	savadhaan raho ! tum manushyon ko dikhane ke liye apane dharma ke kam n karo , naheen to apane svargeey pita se kuchh bhee fal n paoge .
40006002	isaliye jab too dan kare , to apane age turahee n bajava , jaaisa kapattee , sabhaon aur galiyon men karate haai , taki log un kee badai kare , maain tum se sach kahata hoo , ki ve apana fal pa chuke .
40006003	parantu jab too dan kare , to jo tera dahina hath karata haai , use tera banya hath n janane pae .
40006004	taaki tera dan gupt rahe aur tab tera pita jo gupt men dekhta haai , tujhe pratifal dega . .
40006005	aur jab too praarthna kare , to kapattyaien ke saman n ho kyonaki logon ko dikhane ke liye sabhaon men aur sadkon ke modon par khde hokar praarthna karana un ko achchha lagata haai maain tum se sach kahata hoo , ki ve apana pratifal pa chuke .
40006006	parantu jab too praarthna kare , to apanee kottree men ja aur dar band kar ke apane pita se jo gupt men haai praarthna kara aur tab tera pita jo gupt men dekhta haai , tujhe pratifal dega .
40006007	praarthna karate samay anyajatiyon kee nai bak bak n karo kyonki ve samajhte haain ki unake bahut bolane se un kee sunee jaegee .

41012028	aur shaastriayon men se aek ne akar unhen vivad karate suna , aur yah janakar ki us ne unhen achchhee reeti se uttr diya us se poochha , sab se mukhy agyaa kaun see haai ?
41012029	yeesha ne use uttr diya , sab agyaaon men se yah mukhy haai he israel suna prabhu hamara parameshvar aek hee prabhu haai .
41012030	aur too prabhu apane parameshvar se apane sare man se aur apane sare praan se , aur apanee saree buddh ise , aur apanee saree shaktai se praem rakhna .
41012031	aur doosaree yah haai , ki too apane padosee se apane saman praem rakhna : is se badee aur koi agyaa naheen .
41012032	shaasree ne us se kaha he guro , bahut tteeka ! too ne sach kaha , ki vah aek hee haai , aur use chhod aur koi naheen .
41012033	aur us se sare man aur saree buaddh iddh aur sare praan aur saree shaktai ke sath praem rakhna aur padosee se apane saman praem rakhna , sare homon aur balidanon se baddhkar haai .
41012034	jab yeesha ne dekha ki us ne samajh se uttr diya , to us se kaha too parameshvar ke rajy se door naheen : aur kisee ko fir us se kuchh poochhne ka sahas n hua . .
41012035	fir yeesha ne maandair men upadesh karate hae yah kaha , ki shaasree kyonkar kahate haai , ki maseeh daud ka putra haai ?
41012036	daud ne apahee pavitra atma men hokar kaha haai , ki prabhu ne mere prabhu se kaha mere daahine baait , jab tak ki maain tere baaiariyon ko tere panvon kee peeddhee n kar doon .
41012037	daud to ap hee use prabhu kahata haai , fir vah usaka putra kahan se tthara ? aur bheed ke log us kee anand se sunate the . .
41012038	us ne apane upadesh men un se kaha , shastriayon se chaukas raho , jo lambe vasr paahine hae firana .
41012039	aur bajaron men namaskar , aur aradhanalayon men mukhy mukhy asan aur jevanaron men mukhy mukhy sthan bhee chahate haain .
41012040	ve vidhavaon ke gharon ko kha jate haai , aur dikhane ke liye badee der tak praarthna karate rahate haai , ye adhaik dand paenge . .
41012041	aur vah maandair ke bhndar ke samhane baaittkar dekh raha tha , ki log mandair ke bhndar men kis prakar paaise dalate haai , aur bahut dhanavanon ne bahut kuchh dala .
41012042	itane men aek kangal vidhava ne akar do damadiya , jo aek adhole ke barabar hotee haai , dalee .
41012043	tab us ne apane chelon ko pas bulakar un se kaha maain tum se sach kahata hoo , ki mandair ke bhndar men dalane valon men se is kangal vidhava ne sab se baddhkar dala haai .
41012044	kyonaki sab ne apane dhan kee baddhtee men se dala haai , parantu is ne apanee ghattee men se jo kuchh usaka tha , arthata apanee saree jeevika dal dee haai .
41013001	jab vah maandair se nikal raha tha , to usake chalon men se aek ne us se kaha he guro , dek , kaaise kaaise patthr aur kaaise kaaise bhvan haain !
41013002	yeesha ne us se kaha kya tum ye bade bade bhvan dekhte ho : yahan patthr par patthr bhee bacha n rahega jo ddhaya n jaega . .
41013003	jab vah jaaitoon ke pahad par mandair ke samhane baaitta tha , to pataras aur yakoob aur yoohanna aur andairyas ne alag jakar us se poochha .
41013004	ki hamen bata ki ye baten kab hongee ? aur jab ye sab baten pooree hone par hongee us samay ka kya chinh hoga ?
41013005	yeesha un se kahane laga chaukas raho ki koi tumhen n bhramae .
41013006	bahutere mere nam se akar kahenge , ki maain vahee hoon aur bahuton ko bhramaenge .
41013007	aur jab tum ladaiya , aur ladaiyon kee charcha suno to n ghabarana : kyonki in ka hona avashy haai parantu us samay ant n hoga .
41013008	kyonaki jati par jati , aur rajy par rajy chaddhai karega , aur har kaheen booindol honge , aur akal padenge yah to peedaon ka arambh hee hoga . .
41013009	parantu tum apane vishay men chaukas raho kyonaki log tumhen mahasabhaon men saunpenge aur tum panchayaton men peette jaoge aur mere karan haakimon aur rajaon ke age khde kiae jaoge , taki un ke liye gavahee ho .
41013010	par avashy haai ki pahile susamachar sab jatiyon men prachar kiya jae .
41013011	jab ve tumhen le jakar saunpenge , to pahile se chinta n karana , ki ham kya kahenge par jo kuchh tumhen usee ghadee bataya ja , vahee kahana kyonaki bolanevale tum naheen ho , parantu pavitra atma haai .
41013012	aur bhai ko bhai , aur pita ko putra ghaat ke liye saunpenge , aur ladkebale mata-apita ke virodha men uttkar unhen marava dalenge .
41013013	aur mere nam ke karan sab log tum se baair karenge par jo ant tak dhaeeraj dhare rahega , usee ka uddhar hoga . .
41013014	so jab tum us ujadnevalee gharanait vastu ko jahan uchit naheen vahan khdee dekho , paddhnevala samajh le tab jo yahoodiya men ho , ve pahadon par bhag jaen .
41013015	so kotte par ho , vah apane ghar se kuchh lene ko neeche n utare aur n bheetar jae .
41013016	aur jo khet men ho , vah apana kapada lene ke liye peechhe n lautte .

41013018	aur praarthna kiya karo ki yah jade men n ho .

41013020	aur yaadi prabhu un dinon ko n ghattata , to koi praanee bhee n bachata parantu un chune huon ke karan jin ko us ne chuna haai , un dinon ko ghattaya .
41013021	us samay yadi koi tum se kahe dekho , maseeh yahan haai , ya dekho , vahan haai , to prateeti n karana .
41013022	kyonaki jootte maseeh aur jootte bhavishyadvkta utt khde honge , aur chinh aur adabhut kam dikhaaenge ki yadi ho sake to chune huon ko bhee bhrama den .
41013023	par tum chaukas raho : dekho , maain ne tumhen sab baten pahile hee se kah dee haain .
41013024	un dinon me , us klesh ke bad sooraj andhora ho jaega , aur chand prakash n dega .
41013025	aur akash se taragan girane lagenge : aur akash kee shaktaiyan hilai jaengeee .
41013026	tab log manushy ke putra ko badee samarth aur mahima ke sath badalon men ate dekhnege .

41013028	anjeer ke ped se yah drashttant seekho : jab us kee dalee komal ho jatee aur patte nikalane lagate haain to tum jan lete ho , ki graeeshmakal nikatt haai .
41013029	isee reeti se jab tum in baton ko hote dekho , to jan lo , ki vah nikatt haai varan dar hee par haai .
41013030	maain tum se sach kahata hoo , ki jab tak ye sab baten n ho lengee , tab tak yah log jate n rahenge .

41013034	yah us manushy kee see dasha haai , jo paradesh jate samay apana ghar chhod ja , aur apane dason ko adhaikar de : aur har aek ko usaka kam jata de , aur darapal ko jagate rahane kee agyaa de .
41013035	isaliye jagate raho kyonki tum naheen janate ki ghar ka svamee kab aega , sanjh ko ya adhaee rat ko , ya murga ke bang dene ke samay ya bhor ko .

41014001	do din ke bad fasah aur akhmeeree rottee ka pavrva honevala tha : aur mahayajak aur shaasree is bat kee khoj men the ki use kyonkar chhl se pakad kar mar dalen .
41014002	parantu kahate the , ki pavrva ke din nahee , kaheen aeesa n ho ki logon me balava mache . .
41014003	jab vah baaitaaniyyah men shamaun koddhee ke ghar bhojan karane baaitta hua tha jab aek sree sangamaramar ke patra men jattamansee ka bahumooly shauddh itra lekar ai aur patra tod kar itra ko usake sir par undela .
41014004	parantu koi koi apane man men risiyakar kahane lage , is itra ko kyon satyanash kiya gaya ?
41014005	kyoki yah itra to tee sau deenar se adhaik mooly men bechakar kangalon ko bantta ja sakata tha , or ve us ko jhdikane lage .

41014017	jab sanjh hui , to vah barahon ke sath aya .

41015001	aur bhor hote hee turant mahayako , puraaniyo , aur shaaastriayon ne varan saree mahasabha ne salah karake yeesha ko bandhavaya , aur use le jakar peelatus ke hath saunp diya .

42009010	fir praeariton ne lauttkar jo kuchh unhon ne kiya tha , us ko bata diya , aur vah unhen alag karake baaitasaaida nam aek nagar ko le gaya .

42009012	jab din ddhlane laga , to barahon ne akar usase kaha , bheed ko vida kar , ki charon or ke gavon aur bastaiyon men jakar ttkaie , aur bhojan ka upay kare , kyonki ham yahan sunasan jagah men haain .
42009013	us ne un se kaha , tum hee unhen khane ko do : unhon ne kaha , hamare pas panch rottyaian aur do machhlee ko chhod aur kuchh naheen : parantu ha , yadi ham jakar in sab logon ke liye bhojan mol le , to ho sakata haai : ve log to panch hajar purooshaen ke lagabhg the .

42009018	jab vah aekant men praarthna kar raha tha , aur chele usake sath the , to us ne un se poochha , ki log mujhe kya kahate haain ?
42009019	unhon ne uttr diya , yuhanna bapaatisma denevala , aur koi koi aeliyyah , aur koi yah ki purane bhvishyadvktaon men se koi jee utta haai .

42011045	tab aek vyavasthapak ne us ko uttr diya , ki he guro , in baton ke kahane se too hamaree ninda karata haai .

43001037	tab ve donon chele us kee sunakar yeesha ke peechhe ho liae .
43001038	yeesha ne firakar aur un ko peechhe ate dekhkar un se kaha , tum kis kee khoj men ho ? unhon ne us se kaha , he rabbee , arthata he guroo too kahan rahata haai ? us ne un se kaha , chalo , to dekh loge .
43001039	tab unhon ne akar usake rahane ka sthan dekha , aur us din usee ke sath rahe aur yah dasaven ghantte ke lagabhg tha .

43002001	fir us se kaha , maain tum se sach sach kahata hoon ki tum svarga ko khula hua , aur parameshvar ke svargadooton ko upar jate aur manushy ke putra ke upar utarate dekhoge . .

43002010	har aek manushy paahile achchha dakhras deta haai aur jab log peekar chhk jate haai , tab madhyam deta haai parantu too ne achchha dakhras ab tak rakh chhoda haai .
43002011	yeesha ne galeel ke kana men apana yah pahila chinh dikhakar apanee mahima pragatt kee aur usake chelon ne us par vishvas kiya . .

43005019	is par yeesha ne un se kaha , maain tum se sach sach kahata hoo , putra ap se kuchh naheen kar sakata , keval vah jo pita ko karate dekhta haai , kyonki jin jin kamon ko vah karata haai unhen putra bhee usee reeati se karata haai .
43005020	kyonaki pita putra se praeeati rakhta haai aur jo jo kam vah ap karata haai , vah sab use dikhata haai aur vah in se bhee bade kam use dikhaaega , taaki tum achambha karo .
43005021	kyoki jaaisa pita mare huon ko uttata aur jilata haai , vaaisa hee putra bhee jinhen chahata haai unhen jilata haai .
43005022	aur pita kisee ka nyay bhee naheen karata , parantu nyay karane ka sab kam putra ko saunp diya haai .
43005023	isaliye ki sab log jaaise pita ka adar karate haain vaaise hee putra ka bhee adar karen : jo putra ka adar naheen karata , vah pita ka jis ne use bheja haai , adar naheen karata .
43005024	maain tum se sach sach kahata hoo , jo mera vachan sunakar mere bhejanevale kee prateeti karata haai , anant jeevan usaka haai , aur us par dand kee agyaa naheen hotee parantu vah mratyu se par hokar jeevan men pravesh kar chuka haai .
43005025	maain tum se sach sach kahata hoo , vah samay ata haai , aur ab haai , jis men mratak parameshvar ke putra ka shabd sunenge , aur jo sunenge ve jaenge .
43005026	kyonaki jis reeti se pita apane ap men jeevan rakhta haai , usee reeti se us ne putra ko bhee yah aadhaikar diya haai ki apane ap men jeevan rakhe .
43005027	baran use nyay karane ka bhee adhaikar diya haai , isaaliye ki vah manushy ka putra haai .
43005028	is se achambha mat karo , kyonaki vah samay ata haai , ki jitane kabraen men haai , usaka shabd sunakar nikalenge .
43005029	jinhon ne bhlai kee haai ve jeevan ke punarootthan ke liye jee uttenge aur jinhon ne burai kee haai ve dand ke punarootthan ke liye jee uttenge .
43005030	maain apane ap se kuchh naheen kar sakata jaaisa sunata hoo , vaaisa nyay karata hoo , aur mera nyay sachcha haai kyonaki maain apanee ichchha nahee , parantu apane bhejanevale kee ichchha chahata hoon .
43005031	yaadi maain ap hee apanee gavahee doon to meree gavahee sachchee naheen .
43005032	aek aur haai jo meree gavahee deta haai vah sachchee haai .
43005033	tum ne yoohanna se puchhvaya aur us ne sachchai kee gavahee dee haai .
43005034	parantu maain apane vishay men manushy kee gavahee naheen chahata taubhee maain ye baten isaliye kahata hoo , ki tumhen uddhar mile .
43005035	vah jo jalata aur chamakata hua deepak tha aur tumhen kuchh der tak us kee jyoti me , magan hona achchha laga .
43005036	parantu mere pas jo gavahee haai vah yoohanna kee gavahee se badee haai : kyonki jo kam pita ne mujhe poora karane ko saunpa haai arthata yahee kam jo maain karata hoo , ve mere gavah haai , ki pita ne mujhe bheja haai .
43005037	aur pita jis ne mujhe bheja haai , usee ne meree gavahee dee haai : tum ne n kabhee usaka shabd suna , aur n usaka roop dekha haai .
43005038	aur usake vachan ko man men sthiar naheen rakhte kyonki jise us ne bheja us kee prateeati naheen karate .
43005039	tum paavitra shaasr men ddoonddhte ho , kyonaki samajhte ho ki us men anant jeevan tumhen milata haai , aur yah vahee haai , jo meree gavahee deta haai .
43005040	fir bhee tum jeevan pane ke liye mere pas ana naheen chahate .
43005041	maain manushyon se adar naheen chahata .
43005042	parantu maain tumhen janata hoo , ki tum men parameshvar ka praem naheen .
43005043	maain apane pita ke nam se aya hoo , aur tum mujhe grahan naheen karate yaadi koi aur apane hee nam se a , to use grahan kar loge .
43005044	tum jo aek doosare se adar chahate ho aur vah adar jo advait parameshvar kee or se haai , naheen chahate , kisee prakar vishvas kar sakate ho ?
43005045	yah n samajho , ki maain pita ke samhane tum par dosh lagaunga : tum par dosh laganevala to haai , arthata moosa jis par tum ne bhrosa rakha haai .
43005046	kyonaki yadi tum moosa kee prateeati karate , to meree bhee prateeti karate , isaaliye ki us ne mere vishay men likha haai .
43005047	parantu yadi tum us kee likhee hui baton kee prateeti naheen karate , to meree baton kee kyonkar prateeati karoge . .
43006001	in baton ke bad yeesha galeel kee jheel arthata tibiriyas kee jheel ke pas gaya .
43006002	aur aek badee bheed usake peechhe ho lee kayonaki jo ashcharya karma vah beemaron par dikhata tha ve un ko dekhte the .
43006003	tab yeesha pahad par chaddhkar apane chelon ke sath vahan baaitta .
43006004	aur yahoodiyon ke fasah ke pabrba nikatt tha .
43006005	tab yeesha ne apanee ankhe uttakar aek badee bheed ko apane pas ate dekha , aur filippus se kaha , ki ham in ke bhojan ke liye kahan se rottee mol laen ?
43006006	parantu us ne yah bat use parakhne ke liye kahee kyonki vah ap janata tha ki maain kya karoonga .
43006007	filippus ne us ko uttr diya , ki do sau deenar kee rottee un ke liye pooree bhee n hongee ki un men se har aek ko thodee thodee mil jae .
43006008	usake chelon men se shamaun pataras ke bhai andairyas ne us se kaha .
43006009	yahan aek ladka haai jis ke pas jav kee panch rottee aur do machhaliyan haain parantu itane logon ke liye ve kya haain .
43006010	yeesha ne kaha , ki logon ko baaitta do . us jagah bahut ghaas thee : tab ve log jo ginatee men lagabhg panch hajar ke the , baaitt gaae :
43006011	tab yeesha ne rottyaian lee , aur dhanyavad karake baaittnevalon ko bantt dee : aur vaaise hee machhliyon men se jitanee ve chahate the bantt diya .
43006012	jab ve khakar trapt ho gaae to us ne apane chelon se kaha , ki bache hae ttukade battor lo , ki kuchh faenka n jae .
43006013	so unhon ne battora , aur jav kee panch rottyaien ke ttukade jo khanevalon se bach rahe the un kee barah ttokariyan bhreen .
43006014	tab jo ashcharya karma us ne kar dikhaya use ve log dekhkar kahane lage ki vah bhvishyadvkta jo jagat men anevala tha nishchay yahee haai .
43006015	yeesha yah janakar ki ve mujhe raja banane ke liye akar pakadna chahate haai , fir pahad par akela chala gaya .
43006016	fir jab sandhya hui , to usake chele jheel ke kinare gaae .
43006017	aur nav par chaddhkar jheel ke par kafaranahoom ko jane lage : us samay andhora ho gaya tha , aur yeesha abhee tak un ke pas naheen aya tha .
43006018	aur andhaee ke karan jheel men lahare uttne lageen .
43006019	so jab ve khete khete teen char meel ke lagabhg nikal gaa , to unhon ne yeesha ko jheel par chalate , aur nav ke nikatt ate dekha , aur dr gaae .
43006020	parantu us ne un se kaha , ki maain hoon dro mata .
43006021	so ve use nav par chaddha lene ke liye taaiyar hae aur turant vah nav ke sthan par ja pahunchee jahan vah jate the .
43006022	doosare din us bheed ne , jo jheel ke par khdee thee , yah dekha , ki yahan aek ko chhodkar aur koi chhottee nav n thee , aur yeesha apane chelon ke sath us nav par n chaddha , parantu keval usake chele chale gaae the .
43006023	taubhee aur chhottee naven tibiriyas se us jagah ke nikatt ai , jahan unhon ne prabhu ke dhanyavad karane ke bad rottee khai thee .
43006024	so jab bheed ne dekha , ki yahan n yeesha haai , aur n usake chele , to ve bhee chhottee chhottee navon par chaddh ke yeesha ko ddoonddhte hae kafaranahoom ko pahunche .
43006025	aur jheel ke par us se milakar kaha , he rabbee , too yahan kab aya ?
43006026	yeesha ne unhen uttr diya , ki maain tum se sach sach kahata hoo , tum mujhe isaliye naheen ddoonddhte ho ki tum ne achaambhiat kam dekhe , parantu isaliye ki tum rottyaian khakar trapt hae .
43006027	nashaman bhojan ke liye paarishram n karo , parantu us bhojan ke liye jo anant jeevan tak ttharata haai , jise manushy ka putra tumhen dega , kyonaki pita , arthata parameshvar ne usee par chhap kar dee haai .
43006028	unhon ne us se kaha , parameshvar ke kayrya karane ke liye ham kya karen ?
43006029	yeesha ne unhen uttr diya parameshvar ka kayrya yah haai , ki tum us par , jise us ne bheja haai , vishvas karo .
43006030	tab unhon ne us se kaha , fir too kaun ka chinh dikhata haai ki ham use dekhkar teree prateeati kare , too kaun sa kam dikhata haai ?
43006031	hamare bapadadon ne jangal men manna khaya jaaisa likha haai ki us ne unhen khane ke liye svarga se rottee dee .
43006032	yeesha ne un se kaha , maain tum se sach sach kahata hoon ki moosa ne tumhen vah rottee svarga se n dee , parantu mera pita tumhen sachchee rottee svarga se deta haai .
43006033	kyoki parameshvar kee rottee vahee haai , jo svarga se utarakar jagat ko jeevan detee haai .
43006034	tab unhon ne us se kaha , he prabhu , yah rottee hamen sarvada diya kara .
43006035	yeesha ne un se kaha , jeevan kee rottee maain hoon : jo mere pas aega vah kabhee bookha n hoga aur jo mujh par vishvas karega , vah kabhee piyasa n hoga .
43006036	parantu maain ne tum se kaha , ki tum ne mujhe dekh bhee liya haai , tobhee vishvas naheen karate .

43006039	aur mere bhejanevale kee ichchha yah haai ki jo kuchh us ne mujhe diya haai , us men se maain kuchh n khoun parantu use antim din fir jila uttaun .
43006040	kyonaki mere pita kee ichchha yah haai , ki jo koi putra ko dekhe , aur us par vishvas kare , vah anant jeevan pae aur maain use antim din fir jila uttaunga .

43006042	aur unhon ne kaha kya yah yoosufa ka putra yeesha nahee , jis ke mata pita ko ham janate haain ? to vah kyonkar kahata haai ki maain svarga se utara hoon .
43006043	yeesha ne un ko uttr diya , ki apas men mat kudkudao .
43006044	koi mere pas naheen a sakata , jab tak pita , jis ne mujhe bheja haai , use kheench n le aur maain us ko antim din fir jila uttaunga .
43006045	bhavishyadvktaon ke lekhon men yah likha haai , ki ve sab parameshvar kee or se sikhaae hae honge . jis kisee ne pita se suna aur seekha haai , vah mere pas ata haai .
43006046	yah nahee , ki kisee ne pita ko dekha parantu jo parameshvar kee or se haai , keval usee ne pita ko dekha haai .
43006047	maain tum se sach sach kahata hoo , ki jo koi vishvas karata haai , anant jeevan usee ka haai .
43006048	jeevan kee rottee maain hoon .
43006049	tumhare bapadadon ne jangal men manna khaya aur mar gaae .
43006050	yah vah rottee haai jo svarga se utaratee haai taaki manushy us men se khaae aur n mare .
43006051	jeevan kee rottee jo svarga se utaree maain hoon . yadi koi is rottee men se khaa , to sarvada jeeavit rahega aur jo rottee maain jagat ke jeevan ke liye doonga , vah mera mans haai .
43006052	is par yahoodee yah kahakar apas men jhgadne lage , ki yah manushy kyonkar hamen apana mans khane ko de sakata haai ?
43006053	yeesha ne un se kaha maain tum se sach sach kahata hoon jab tak manushy ke putra ka mans n khao , aur usaka lohoo n peeo , tum men jeevan naheen .
43006054	jo mera mans khata , aur mera lohoo peeta he , anant jeevan usee ka haai , aur maain antim din fir use jila uttaunga .
43006055	kyonaki mera mans vastav men khane kee vastu haai aur mera lohoo vastav men peen kee vastu haai .
43006056	jo mera mans khata aur mera lohoo peeta haai , vah mujh men sthiar bana rahata haai , aur maain us men .

43007002	aur yahoodiyon ka mandpon ka pabrba nikatt tha .

43007036	yah kya bat haai jo us ne kahee , ki tum mujhe ddoonddhoge , parantu n paoge : aur jahan maain hoo , vahan tum naheen a sakate ?
43007037	fir pabrba ke anatim din , jo mukhy din haai , yeesha khda hua aur pukar kar kaha , yaadi koi piyasa ho to mere pas akar pae .

43007049	parantu ye log jo vyavastha naheen janate , srapit haain .

43008001	parantu yeesha jaaitoon ke pahad par gaya .
43008002	aur bhor ko fir mandair men aya , aur sab log usake pas ae aur vah baaittkar unhen upadesh dene laga .
43008003	tab shaasree aur fareesee aek sree ko la , jo vyaabhaichar men pakadee gai thee , aur us ko beech men khdee karake yeesha se kaha .
43008004	he guro , yah sree vyaabhaichar karate hee pakadee gai haai .
43008005	vyavastha men moosa ne hamen agyaa dee haai ki aeesee striayon kon patthravah karen : so too is sree ke vishay men kya kahata haai ?
43008006	unhon ne us ko parakhne ke liye yah bat kahee taki us par dosh lagane ke liye koi bat pae , parantu yeesha jhukakar ungalee se boomi par likhne laga .
