43008009	parantu ve yah sunakar badon se lekar chhotton tak aek aek karake nikal gaa , aur yeesha akela rah gaya , aur sree vaheen beech men khdee rah gai .
43008010	yeesha ne seedho hokar us se kaha , he naree , ve kahan gaae ? kya kisee ne tujh par dand kee agyaa n dee .
43008011	usa ne kaha , he prabhu , kisee ne naheen : yeesha ne kaha , maain bhee tujh par dand kee agyaa naheen deta ja , aur fir pap n karana . .
43008012	tab yeesha ne fir logon se kaha , jagat kee jyoti maain hoon jo mere peechhe ho lega , vah andhakar men n chalega , parantu jeevan kee jyoti paega .
43008013	fareesiyon ne us se kaha too apanee gavahee ap deta haai teree gavahee tteek naheen .
43008014	yeesha ne un ko uttr diya ki yadi maain apanee gavahee ap deta hoo , taubhee meree gavahee tteek haai , kyonaki maain janata hoo , ki maain kahan se aya hoon aur kahan ko jata hoon ? parantu tum naheen janate ki maain kahan se ata hoon ya kahan ko jata hoon .
43008015	tum shareer ke anusar nyay karate ho maain kisee ka nyay naheen karata .
43008016	aur yaadi maain nyay karoon bhee , to mera nyay sachcha haai kyonki maain akela nahee , parantu maain hoo , aur pita haai jis ne mujhe bheja .
43008017	aur tumharee vyavastha men bhee likha haai ki do janon kee gavahee milakar tteek hotee haai .
43008018	aek to maain ap apanee gavahee deta hoo , aur doosara pita meree gavahee deta haai jis ne mujhe bheja .
43008019	unhon ne us se kaha , tera pita kahan haai ? yeesha ne uttr diya , ki n tum mujhe janate , to mere pita ko bhee janate .
43008020	ye baten us ne mandair men upadesh dete hae bhndar ghar men kahee , aur kisee ne use n pakada kyonki usaka samay ab tak naheen aya tha . .
43008021	us ne fir un se kaha , maain jata hoon aur tum mujhe ddoonddhoge aur apane ap men maroge : jahan maain jata hoo , vahan tum naheen a sakate .
43008022	is par yahoodiyon ne kaha , kya vah apane ap ko mar dalega , jo kahata haai ki jahan maain jata hoon vahan tum naheen a sakate ?
43008023	us ne un se kaha , tum neeche ke ho , maain upar ka hoon tum sansar ke ho , maain sansar ka naheen .
43008024	isaliye maain ne tum se kaha , ki tum apane papon men maroge kyonaki yadi tum vishvas n karoge ki maain vaheen hoo , to apane papon men maroge .
43008025	unhon ne us se kaha , too kaun haai ? yeesha ne un se kaha , vahee hoon jo praarambh se tum se kahata aya hoon .
43008026	tumhare vishay men mujhe bahut kuchh kahana aur nirny karana haai parantu mera bhejanevala sachcha haai aur jo maain ne us se suna he , vahee jagat se kahaha hoon .
43008027	ve n samajhe ki ham se pita ke vishay men kahata haai .
43008028	tab yeesha ne kaha , ki jab tum manushy ke putra ko unche par chaddhaoge , to janoge ki maain vahee hoo , aur apane ap se kuchh naheen karata , parantu jaaise pita ne mujhe sikhaya , vaaise hee ye baten kahata hoon .
43008029	aur mera bhejanevala mere sath haai us ne mujhe akela naheen chhoda kyonki maain sarvada vahee kam karata hoo , jis se vah prasann hota haai .
43008030	vah ye baten kah hee raha tha , ki bahuteron ne us par vishvas kiya . .
43008031	tab yeesha ne un yahoodiyon se jinhon ne un kee prateeati kee thee , kaha , yaadi tum mere vachan men bane rahoge , to sachamuch mere chele ttharoge .
43008032	aur saty ko janoge , aur saty tumhen svatantra karega .
43008033	unhon ne us ko uttr diya ki ham to ibraaheem ke vansh se haain aur kabhee kisee ke das naheen hae fir too kyonkar kahata haai , ki tum svatantra ho jaoge ?
43008034	yeesha ne un ko uttr diya maain tum se sach sach kahata hoon ki jo koi pap karata haai , vah pap ka das haai .
43008035	aur das sada ghar men naheen rahata putra sada rahata haai .
43008036	so yaadi putra tumhen svatantra karega , to sachamuch tum svatantra ho jaoge .
43008037	maain janata hoon ki tum ibraaheem ke vansh se ho taubhee mera vachan tumhare day men jagah naheen pata , isaaliye tum mujhe mar dalana chahate ho .
43008038	maain vahee kahata hoo , jo apane pita ke yahan dekha haai aur tum vahee karate rahate ho jo tumane apane pita se suna haai .
43008039	unhon ne un ko uttr diya , ki hamara pita to ibraaheem haai : yeesha ne un se kaha yaadi tum ibraaheem ke santan hote , to ibraaheem ke saman kam karate .
43008040	parantu ab tum mujh aeese manushy ko mar dalana chahate ho , jis ne tumhen vah saty vachan bataya jo parameshvar se suna , yah to ibraaheem ne naheen kiya tha .
43008041	tum apane pita ke saman kam karate ho : unhon ne us se kaha , ham vyabhaichar se naheen janme hamara aek pita haai arthata parameshvara .
43008042	yeesha ne un se kaha yaadi parameshvar tumhara pita hota , to tum mujh se praem rakhte kyonaki maain parameshvar men se nikal kar aya hoon maain ap se naheen aya , parantu usee ne mujhe bheja .
43008043	tum meree bat kyon naheen samajhte ? isaliye ki mera vachan sun naheen sakate .
43008044	tum apane pita shautan se ho , aur apane pita kee lalasaon ko poora karana chahate ho . vah to arambh se hatyara haai , aur saty par sthiar n raha , kyonaki saty us men haai hee naheen : jab vah joott bolata , to apane svabhav hee se bolata haai kyonaki vah jootta haai , baran joott ka pita haai .
43008045	parantu maain jo sach bolata hoo , iseealiye tum meree prateeati naheen karate .
43008046	tum men se kaun mujhe papee ttharata haai ? aur yaadi maain sach bolata hoo , to tum meree prateeti kyon naheen karate ?
43008047	jo parameshvar se hota he , vah parameshvar kee baten sunata haai aur tum isaaliye naheen sunate ki parameshvar kee or se naheen ho .
43008048	yah sun yahoodiyon ne us se kaha kya ham tteek naheen kahate , ki too samaree haai , aur tujh men dushttatma haai ?
43008049	yeesha ne uttr diya , ki mujh men dushttatma naheen parantu maain apane pita ka adar karata hoo , aur tum mera niradar karate ho .
43008050	parantu maain apanee praatishtta naheen chahata , ha , aek to haai jo chahata haai , aur nyay karata haai .
43008051	maain tum se sach sach kahata hoo , ki yadi koi vyaktai mere vachan par chalega , to vah anant kal tak mratyu ko n dekhega .
43008052	yahoodiyon ne us se kaha , ki ab ham ne jan liya ki tujh men dushttatma haai : ibraaheem mar gaya , aur bhavishyadvkta bhee mar gaae haain aur too kahata haai , ki yadi koi mere vachan par chalega to vah anant kal tak mratyu ka svad n chakhega .
43008053	hamara pita ibraaheem to mar gaya , kya too us se bada haai ? aur bhavishyadvkta bhee mar gaa , too apane ap ko kya ttharata haai .
43008054	yeesha ne uttr diya yaadi maain ap apanee maahima karoo , to meree maahima kuchh nahee , parantu meree mahima karanevala mera pita haai , jise tum kahate ho , ki vah hamara parameshvar haai .
43008055	aur tum ne to use naheen jana : parantu maain use janata hoon aur yaadi kahoon ki maain use naheen janata , to maain tumharee nain jootta ttharoonga : parantu maain use janata , aur usake vachan par chalata hoon .
43008056	tumhara pita ibraaheem mera din dekhne kee asha se bahut magan tha aur us ne dekha , aur anand kiya .
43008057	yahoodiyon ne us se kaha , ab tak too pachas varsha ka naheen fir bhee too ne ibraaheem ko dekha haai ?
43008058	yeesha ne un se kaha maain tum se sach sach kahata hoon ki pahile isake ki ibraaheem utpann hua maain hoon .
43008059	tab unhon ne use marane ke liye patthr uttaa , parantu yeesha chhpaikar maandair se nikal gaya . .
43009001	fir jate hae us ne aek manushy ko dekha , jo janm ka andha tha .
43009002	aur usake chelon ne us se poochha , he rabbee , kis ne pap kiya tha ki yah andha janma , is manushy ne , ya usake mata pita ne ?
43009003	yeesha ne uttr diya , ki n to is ne pap kiya tha , n is ke mata pita ne : parantu yah isaaliye hua , ki parameshvar ke kam us men pragatt hon .
43009004	jis ne mujhe bheja haai hamen usake kam din hee din men karana avashy haai : vah rat anevalee haai jis men koi kam naheen kar sakata .
43009005	jab tak maain jangal men hoo , tab tak jagat kee jyoti hoon .
43009006	yah kahakar us ne boomi par tooka aur us took se mittee sanee , aur vah mittee us andho kee ankhon par lagakara .
43009007	us se kaha ja shaeeloh ke kund men dhae le , jis ka arth bheja hua haai so us ne jakar dhaeya , aur dekhta hua lautt aya .
43009008	tab padosee aur jinhon ne pihale use bheekh mangate dekha tha , kahane lage kya yah vahee nahee , jo baaitta bheekh manga karata tha ?
43009009	kitanon ne kaha , yah vahee haai : auron ne kaha , naheen parantu usake saman haai : us ne kaha , maain vahee hoon .
43009010	tab ve us se poochhne lage , teree ankhen kyonkar khul gai ?
43009011	us ne uttr diya , ki yeesha nam aek vyaktai ne mittee sanee , aur meree ankhon par lagakar mujh se kaha , ki shaeeloh men jakar dhae le so maain gaya , aur dhaekar dekhne laga .
43009012	unhon ne us se poochha vah kahan haai ? us ne kaha maain naheen janata . .
43009013	log use jo pahile andha tha fareesiyon ke pas le gaae .
43009014	jis din yeesha ne mittee sanakar us kee ankhe kholee thee vah sabt ka din tha .
43009015	fir fareeasiyon ne bhee us se poochha teree ankhen kis reeti se khul gai ? us n eun se kaha us ne meree ankho par mittee lagai , fir maain ne dhae liya , aur ab dekhta hoon .
43009016	is par kai fareesee kahane lage yah manushy parameshvar kee or se nahee , kyonki vah sabt ka din naheen manata . auron ne kaha , papee manushy kyonkar aeese chinh dikha sakata haai ? so un men foott padee .
43009017	unhon ne us andho se fir kaha , us ne jo teree ankhe kholee , too usake vishay men kya kahata haai ? us ne kaha , yah bhvishyadvkta haai .
43009018	parantu yahoodiyon ko vishvas n hua ki yah andha tha aur ab dekhta haai jab tak unhon ne usake mata-pita ko jis kee ankhe khul gai thee , bulakara .
43009019	un se n poochha , ki kya yah tumhara putra haai , jise tum kahate ho ki andha janma tha ? fir ab kyonkar dekhta haai ?
43009020	usake mata-apita ne uttr diya ham to janate haain ki yah hamara putra haai , aur andha janma tha .
43009021	parantu ham yah naheen janate haain ki ab kyonkar dekhta haai aur n yah janate haai , ki kis ne us kee ankhe kholeen vah sayana haai usee se poochh lo vah apane vishay men ap kah dega .
43009022	ye baten usake mata-pita ne isaliye kaheen kyonki ve yahoodiyon se drate the kyoki yahoodee aeka kar chuke the , ki yadi koi kahe ki vah maseeh haai , to aradhanalay se nikala jae .
43009023	isee karan usake mata-apita ne kaha , ki vah sayana haai usee se poochh lo .
43009024	tab unhon ne us manushy ko jo andha tha doosaree bar bulakar us se kaha , parameshvar kee stuti kara ham to janate haain ki vah manushy papee haai .
43009025	us ne uttr diya : maain naheen janata ki vah papee haai ya naheen : maain aek bat janata hoon ki maain andha tha aur ab dekhta hoon .
43009026	unhon ne us se fir kaha , ki us ne tere sath kya kiya ? aur kis terah teree ankhen kholee ?
43009027	us ne un se kaha maain to tum se kah chuka , aur tum ne ne suna ab doosaree bar kyon sunana chahate ho ? kya tum bhee usake chele hona chahate ho ?
43009028	tab ve use bura-bhla kahakar bole , too hee usaka chela haai ham to moosa ke chele haain .
43009029	ham janate haain ki parameshvar ne moosa se baten keen parantu is manushy ko naheen janate kee kahan ka haai .
43009030	us ne un ko uttr diya yah to achambhe kee bat haai ki tum naheen janate kee kahan ka haai taubhee us ne meree ankhen khol deen .
43009031	ham janate haain ki parameshvar papiyon kee naheen sunata parantu yaadi koi parameshvar ka bhkt ho , aur us kee ichchha par chalata haai , to vah us kee sunata haai .
43009032	jagat ke arambh se yah kabhee sunane men naheen aya , ki kisee ne bhee janm ke andho kee ankhe kholee hon .
43009033	yaadi yah vyaaktai parameshvar kee or se n hota , to kuchh bhee naheen kar sakata .
43009034	unhon ne us ko uttr diya , ki too to bilakul papon men janma haai , too hamen kya sikhata haai ? aur unhon ne use bahar nikal diya . .
43009035	yeesha ne suna , ki unhon ne use bahar nikal diya haai aur jab use bhentt hui to kaha , ki kya too parameshvar ke putra par vishvas karata haai ?
43009036	us ne uttr diya , ki he prabhu vah kaun haai ki maain us par vishvas karoon ?
43009037	yeesha ne us se kaha , too ne use dekha bhee haai aur jo tere sath baten kar raha haai vahee haai .
43009038	us ne kaha , he prabhu , maain vishvas karata hoon : aur use dandvat kiya .
43009039	tab yeesha ne kaha , maain is jagat men nyay ke liye aya hoo , taki jo naheen dekhte ve dekhe , aur jo dekhte haain ve andho ho jaen .
43009040	jo fareesee usake sath the , unhon ne ye baten sun kar us se kaha , kya ham bhee andho haain ?
43009041	yeesha ne un se kaha , yaadi tum andho hote to papee n ttharate parantu ab kahate ho , ki ham dekhte haai , isaaliye tumhara pap bana rahata haai . .
43010001	maain tum se sach sach kahata hoo , ki jo koi dar se bhedshaala men pravesh naheen karata , parantu aur kisee or se chaddh jata haai , vah chor aur dakoo haai .
43010002	parantu jo dar se bheetar pravesh karata haai vah bhedon ka charavaha haai .
43010003	usake liye darapal dar khol deta haai , aur bhenden usaka shabd sunatee haai , aur vah apanee bhedon ko nam le lekar bulata haai aur bahar le jata haai .
43010004	aur jab vah apanee sab bhedon ko bahar nikal chukata haai , to un ke age age chalata haai , aur bheden usake peechhe peechhe ho letee haain kyonki ve usak shabd pahachanatee haain .
43010005	parantu ve paraye ke peechhe naheen jaengee , parantu us se bhagengee , kyonaki ve parayon ka shabd naheen pahachanatee .
43010006	yeesha ne un se yah drashttant kaha , parantu ve n samajhe ki ye kya baten haain jo vah ham se kahata haai . .
43010007	tab yeesha ne un se fir kaha , maain tum se sach sach kahata hoo , ki bhedon ka dar maain hoon .
43010008	jitane mujh se pahile ae ve sab chor aur dakoo haain parantu bhedon ne un kee n sunee .
43010009	dar maain hoon : yadi koi mere dara bheetar pravesh kare to uddhar paega aushra bheetar bahar aya jaya karega aur chara paega .
43010010	chor kisee aur kam ke liye naheen parantu keval choree karane aur ghaat karane aur nashtt karane ko ata haai . maain isaaliye aya ki ve jeevan pae , aur bahutayat se paen .
43010011	achchha charavaha maain hoon achchha charavaha bhedon ke liye apana praan deta haai .
43010012	majadoor jo n charavaha haai , aur n bhedon ka malik haai , bheadiae ko ate hae dek , bhedon ko chhodkar bhag jata haai , aur bheadiya unhen pakadta aur tittr bittr kar deta haai .
43010013	vah isaliye bhag jata haai ki vah majadoor haai , aur us ko bhedon kee chinta naheen .
43010014	achchha charavaha maain hoon jis tarah pita mujhe janata haai , aur maain pita ko janata hoon .
43010015	isee tarah maain apee bhedon ko janata hoo , aur meree bheden mujhe janatee haai , aur maain bhedon ke liye apana praan deta hoon .
43010016	aur meree aur bhee bheden haai , jo is bhedshaala kee naheen mujhe un ka bhee lana avashy haai , ve mera shabd sunengee tab aek hee jhund aur aek hee charavaha hoga .
43010017	pita isaliye mujh se praem rakhta haai , ki maain apana praan deta hoo , ki use fir le loon .
43010018	koi use mujh se chheenata nahee , baran maain use ap hee deta hoon : mujhe usake dene ka adhaikar haai , aur use fir lene ka bhee aadhaikar haai : yah agyaa mere pita se mujhe milee haai . .
43010019	in baton ke karan yahoodiyon men fir foott padee .
43010020	un men se bahutere kahane lage , ki us men dushttatma haai , aur vah pagal haai us kee kyon sunate ho ?
43010021	auron ne kaha , ye bat aeese manushy kee naheen jis men dushttatma ho : kya dushttatma andhaen kee ankhe khol sakatee haai ?
43010022	yarooshalem men sthapan pabrba hua , aur jade kee retu thee .
43010023	aur yeesha mandair men sulaaiman ke osare men tthal raha tha .
43010024	tab yahoodiyon ne use a ghora aur poochha , too hamare man ko kab tak duavidha men rakhega ? yaadi too maseeh haai , to ham se safa kah de .
43010025	yeesha ne unhen uttr diya , ki maain ne tum se kah diya , aur tum prateeti karate hee nahee , jo kam maain apane pita ke nam se karata hoon ve hee mere gavah haain .
43010026	parantu tum isaaliye prateeti naheen karate , ki meree bhedon men se naheen ho .
43010027	meree bheden mera shabd sunatee haai , aur maain unhen janata hoo , aur ve mere peechhe peechhe chalatee haain .
43010028	aur maain unhen anant jeevan deta hoo , aur ve kabhee nash naheen hongee , aur koi unhen mere hath se chheen n lega .
43010029	mera pita , jis ne unhen mujh ko diya haai , sab se bada haai , aur koi unhen pita ke hath se chheen naheen sakata .
43010030	maain aur pita aek haain .
43010031	yahoodiyon ne use patthravah karate ko fir patthr uttaae .
43010032	is par yeesha ne un se kaha , ki maain ne tumhen apane pita kee or se bahut se bhle kam dikhaae haai , un men se kis kam ke liye tum mujhe patthravah karate ho ?
43010033	yahoodiyon ne us ko uttr diya , ki bhle kam ke liye ham tujhe patthravah naheen karate , parantu parameshvar kee ninda ke karan aur isaliye ki too manushy hokar apane ap ko parameshvar banata haai .
43010034	yeesha ne unhen uttr diya , kya tumharee vyavastha men naheen likha haai ki maain ne kaha , tum ishvar ho ?
43010035	yaadi us ne unhen ishvar kaha jin ke pas parameshvar ka vachan pahuncha aur paavitra shaasr kee bat lop naheen ho sakatee .
43010036	to jise pita ne paavitra ttharakar jagat men bheja haai , tum us se kahate ho ki too ninda karata haai , isaliye ki maain ne kaha , maain parameshvar ka putra hoon .
43010037	yaadi maain apane pita ke kam naheen karata , to meree prateeti n karo .
43010038	parantu yadi maain karata hoo , to chahe meree prateeati n bhee karo , parantu un kamon kee to prateeati karo , taaki tum jano , aur samajho , ki pita mujh men haai , aur maain pita men hoon .
43010039	tab unhon ne fir use pakadne ka prayatn kiya parantu vah un ke hath se nikal gaya . .
43010040	fir vah yaradan ke par us sthan par chala gaya , jahan yoohanna pahile bapatisma diya karata tha , aur vaheen raha .
43010041	aur bahutere usake pas akar kahate the , ki yuhanna ne to koi chinh naheen dikhaya , parantu jo kuchh yoohanna ne is ke vishay men kaha tha vah sab sach tha .
43010042	aur vahan bahuteron ne us par vishvas kiya . .
43011001	maariyam aur us kee baahin maratha ke ganv baaitaaniyyah ka lajar nam aek manushy beemar tha .
43011002	yah vahee mariyam thee jis ne prabhu par itra dalakar usake panvon ko apane balon se ponchha tha , isee ka bhai lajar beemar tha .
43011003	so us kee baahinon ne use kahala bheja , ki he prabhu , dek , jis se too praeeati rakhta haai , vah beemar haai .
43011004	yah sunakar yeesha ne kaha , yah beemaree mratyu kee nahee , parantu parameshvar kee maahima ke liye haai , ki usake dara parameshvar ke putra kee mahima ho .
43011005	aur yeesha maratha aur us kee bahan aur lajar se praem rakhta tha .
43011006	so jab us ne suna , ki vah beemar haai , to jis sthan par vah tha , vahan do din aur tthar gaya .
43011007	fir is ke bad us ne chelon se kaha , ki ao , ham fir yahoodiya ko chalen .
43011008	chelon ne us se kaha , he rabbee , abhee to yahoodee tujhe patthravah karana chahate the , aur kya too fir bhee vaheen jata haai ?
43011009	yeesha ne uttr diya , kya din ke barah ghantte naheen hote ? yaadi koi din ko chale , to ttokar naheen khata haai , kyonaki is jagat ka ujala dekhta haai .
43011010	parantu yadi koi rat ko chale , to ttokar khata haai , kyonaki us men prakash naheen .
43011011	us ne ye baten kahee , aur is ke bad un se kahane laga , ki hamara mitra lajar so gaya haai , parantu maain use jagane jata hoon .
43011012	tab chelon ne us se kaha , he prabhu , yadi vah so gaya haai , to bach jaega .
43011013	yeesha ne to us kee mratyu ke vishay men kaha tha : parantu ve samajhe ki us ne neend se so jane ke vishay men kaha .
43011014	tab yeesha ne un se safa kah diya , ki lajar mar gaya haai .
43011015	aur maain tumhare karan anaandait hoon ki maain vahan n tha jis se tum vishvas karo , parantu ab ao , ham usake pas chalen .
43011016	tab thoma ne jo didumus kahalata haai , apane sath ke chelon se kaha , ao , ham bhee usake sath marane ko chalen .
43011017	so yeesha ko akar yah maloom hua ki use kabra men rakhe char din ho chuke haain .
43011018	baaitaaniyyah yarooshalem ke sameep koi do meel kee dooree par tha .
43011019	aur bahut se yahoodee maratha aur maariyam ke pas un ke bhai ke vishay men shaantai dene ke liye ae the .
43011020	so maratha yeesha ke ane ka samachar sunakar us se bhentt karane ko gai , parantu mariyam ghar men baaittee rahee .
43011021	maratha ne yeesha se kaha , he prabhu , yadi too yahan hota , to mera bhai kadaapi n marata .
43011022	aur ab bhee maain janatee hoo , ki jo kuchh too parameshvar se mangega , parameshvar tujhe dega .
43011023	yeesha ne us se kaha , tera bhai jee uttega .
43011024	maratha ne us se kaha , maain janatee hoo , ki antaim din men punarootthan ke samay vah jee uttega .
43011025	yeesha ne us se kaha , punarootthan aur jeevan maain hee hoo , ja koi mujh par vishvas karata haai vah yadi mar bhee ja , taubhee jaega .
43011026	aur jo koi jeevata haai , aur mujh par vishvas karata haai , vah anantakal tak n marega , kya too is bat par vishvas karatee haai ?
43011027	us ne us se kaha , han he prabhu , maain vishvas kar chukee hoo , ki parameshvar ka putra maseeh jo jagat men anevala tha , vah too hee haai .
43011028	yah kahakar vah chalee gai , aur apanee baahin mariyam ko chupake se bulakar kaha , guroo yaheen haai , aur tujhe bulata haai .
43011029	vah sunate hee turant uttkar usake pas ai .
43011030	yeesha abhee ganv men naheen pahuncha tha , parantu usee sthan men tha jahan maratha ne us se bhentt kee thee .
43011031	tab jo yahoodee usake sath ghar men the , aur use shaantai de rahe the , yah dekhkar ki mariyam turant uttke bahar gai haai aur yah samajhkar ki vah kabra par rone ko jatee haai , usake peechhe ho liye .
43011032	jab maariyam vahan pahunchee jahan yeesha tha , to use dekhte hee usake panvon par gir ke kaha , he prabhu , yadi too yahan hota to mera bhai n marata .
43011033	jab yeesha n us ko aur un yahoodiyon ko jo usake sath ae the rote hae dekha , to atma men bahut hee udas hua , aur ghabara kar kaha , tum ne use kahan rakha haai ?
43011034	unhon ne us se kaha , he prabhu , chalakar dekh le .
43011035	yeesha ke ansoo bahane lage .
43011036	tab yahoodee kahane lage , dekho , vah us se kaaisee praeeati rakhta tha .
43011037	parantu un men se kitanon ne kaha , kya yah jis ne andho kee ankhen kholee , yah bhee n kar saka ki yah manushy n marata ?
43011038	yeesha man men fir bahut hee udas hokar kabra par aya , vah aek gufaa thee , aur aek patthr us par dhara tha .
43011039	yeesha ne kaha patthr ko uttao : us mare hae kee bahin maratha us se kahane lagee , he prabhu , us men se ab to durgandha atee haai kyonki use mare char din ho gaae .
43011040	yeesha ne us se kaha , kya maain ne tujh se n kaha i ki yadi too vishvas karegee , to parameshvar kee mahima ko dekhegee .
43011041	tab unhon ne us patthr ko hattaya , fir yeesha ne ankhen uttakar kaha , he pita , maain tera dhanyavad karata hoon ki too ne meree sun lee haai .
43011042	aur maai janata tha , ki too sada meree sunata haai , parantu jo bheed as pas khdee haai , un ke karan maain ne yah kaha , jis se ki ve vishvas kare , ki too ne mujhe bheja haai .
43011043	yah kahakar us ne bade shabd se pukara , ki he lajar , nikal a .
43011044	jo mar gaya tha , vah kafan se hath panv bandho hae nikal aya aur usaka munh angochhe se lipatta hua tharoo yeesha ne un se kaha , use kholakar jane do . .
43011045	tab jo yahoodee mariyam ke pas ae the , aur usaka yah kam dekha tha , un men se bahuton ne us par vishvas kiya .
43011046	parantu un men se kitanon ne fareeasiyon ke pas jakar yeesha ke kamon ka samachar diya . .
43011047	is par mahayajakon aur fareesiyon ne mukhy sabha ke logon ko ikattha karake kaha , ham karate kya haain ? yah manushy to bahut chinh dikhata haai .
43011048	yaadi ham use yonhee chhod de , to sab us par vishvas le aenge aur romee akar hamaree jagah aur jati donon par aadhaikar kar lenge .
43011049	tab un men se kaifaa nam aek vyaktai ne jo us varsha ka mahayajak tha , un se kaha , tum kuchh naheen janate .
43011050	aur n yah sochate ho , ki tumhare liye yah bhla haai , ki hamare logon ke liye aek manushy mare , aur n yah , ki saree jaati nash ho .
43011051	yah bat us ne apanee or se n kahee , parantu us varsha ka mahayajak hokar bhavishyadvnee kee , ki yeesha us jaati ke liye marega .
43011052	aur n keval us jaati ke liye , baran isaaliye bhee , ki parameshvar kee tittr bittr santanon ko aek kar de .
43011053	so usee din se ve usake mar dalane kee sammati karane lage . .
43011054	isaliye yeesha us samay se yahoodiyon men pragatt hokar n fira parantu vahan se jangal ke nikatt ke dekh men iaim nam , aek nagar ko chala gaya aur apane chelon ke sath vaheen rahane laga .
43011055	aur yahoodiyon ka fasah nikatt tha , aur bahutere log fasah se paahile dihat se yarooshalem ko gaae ki apane ap ko shauddh karen .
43011056	so ve yeesha ko ddoonddhne aur maandair men khde hokar apas men kahane lage , tum kya samajhte ho ?
43011057	kya vah pabrba men naheen aega ? aur mahayajakon aur fareeasiyon ne bhee agyaa de rakhee thee , ki yadi koi yah jane ki yeesha kahan haai to bata , ki use pakad len . .
43012001	fir yeesha fatah se chh : din pahile baaitaaniyyah men aya , janha lajar tha : jise yeesha ne mare huon men se jilaya tha .
43012002	vahan unhon ne usake liye bhojan taaiyar kiya , aur maratha seva kar rahee thee , aur lajar un men se aek tha , jo usake sath bhojan karane ke liye baaitte the .
43012003	tab maariyam ne jattamasee ka adha ser bahumol itra lekar yeesha ke pavon par dala , aur apane balon se usake panv ponchhe , aur itra kee sugandha se ghar sugaandhiat ho gaya .
43012004	parantu usake chelon men se yahooda iskariyotee nam aek chela jo use pakadvane par tha , kahane laga .
43012005	yah itra teen sau deenar men bechakar kangalon ko kayon n diya gaya ?
43012006	us ne yah bat isaliye n kahee , ki use kangalon kee chinta thee , parantu isaliye ki vah chor tha aur usake pas un kee thailee rahatee thee , aur us men jo kuchh dala jata tha , vah nikal leta tha .
43012007	yeesha ne kaha , use mere gade jane ke din ke liye rahane de .
43012008	kyonaki kangal to tumhare sath sada rahate haai , parantu maain tumhare sath sada n rahoonga . .
43012009	yahoodiyon men se sadhaaran log jan gaa , ki vah vahan haai , aur ve n keval yeesha ke karan ae parantu isaliye bhee ki lajar ko denkhe , jise us ne mare huon men se jilaya tha .
43012010	tab mahayajakon ne lajar ko bhee mar dalane kee sammati kee .
43012011	kyonaki usake karan bahut se yahoodee chale gaa , aur yeesha par vishvas kiya . .
43012012	doosare din bahut se logon ne jo pabrba men ae the , yah sunakar , ki yeesha yarooshalem men ata haai .
43012013	khjoor kee , daaliyan leee , aur us se bhentt karane ko nikale , aur pukarane lage , ki hoshaana , dhany israael ka raja , jo prabhu ke nam se ata haai .
43012014	jab yeesha ko aek gadahe ka bachcha mila , to us par baaitta .
43012015	jaaisa likha haai , ki he siyyon kee bettee , mat dr , dek , tera raja gadahe ke bachche par chaddha hua chala ata haai .
43012016	usake chele , ye baten paahile n samajhe the parantu jab yeesha kee mahima pragatt hui , to un ko smaran aya , ki ye baten usake vishay men likhee hui theen aur logon ne us se is prakar ka vyavahar kiya tha .
43012017	tab bheed ke logon ne jo us samay usake sath the yah gavahee dee ki us ne lajar ko kabra men se bulakar , mare huon men se jilaya tha .
43012018	isee karan log us se bhentt karane ko ae the kyonki unhon ne suna tha , ki us ne yah ashcharyakarma dikhaya haai .
43012019	tab fareesiyon ne apas men kaha , socho to sahee ki tum se kuchh naheen ban padta : dekho , sansar usake peechhe ho chala haai . .
43012020	jo log us pabrba men bhjan karane ae the un men se kai yoonanee the .
43012021	unhon ne galeel ke baaitasaaida ke rahanevale filippus ke pas akar us se binatee kee , ki shraeemana ham yeesha se bhentt karana chahate haain .
43012022	filippus ne akar aadiryas se kaha tab aandairyas aur filippus ne yeesha se kaha .
43012023	is par yeesha ne un se kaha , vah samay a gaya haai , ki manushy ke putra ki mahima ho .
43012024	maain tum se sach sach kahata hoo , ki jab tak gehoon ka dana boomi men padkar mar naheen jata , vah akela rahata haai parantu jab mar jata haai , to bahut fal lata haai .
43012025	jo apane praan ko piry janata haai , vah use kho deta haai aur jo is jagat men apane praan ko aapiry janata he , vah use kho deta haai aur jo is jagat men apane praan ko apiry janata haai vah anant jeevan ke liye us kee raksha karata karega .
43012026	yaadi koi meree seva kare , to mere peechhe ho le aur jahan maain hoon vahan mera sevak bhee hoga yaadi koi meree seva kare , to pita usaka adar karega .
43012027	jab mera jee vyakul ho raha haai . isaaliye ab maain kya kahoon ? he pita , mujhe is ghadee se bacha ? parantu maain isee karan is ghadee ko pahuncha hoon .
43012028	he pita apane nam kee maahima kara : tab yah akashavanee hui , ki maain ne us kee maahima kee haai , aur fir bhee karoonga .
43012029	tab jo log khde hae sun rahe the , unhon ne kaha ki badal garaja , auron ne kaha , koi svargadoot us se bola .
43012030	is par yeesha ne kaha , yah shabd mere liye naheen parantu tumhare liye aya haai .
43012031	ab is jagat ka nyay hota haai , ab is jagat ka saradar nikal diya jaega .
43012032	aur maain yadi prathvee par se unche par chaddhaya jaunga , to sab ko apane pas kheechaooga .
43012033	aeesa kahakar us ne yah pragatt kar diya , ki vah kaaisee mratyu se marega .
43012034	is par logon ne us se kaha , ki ham ne vyavastha kee yah bat sunee haai , ki maseeh sarvada rahega , fir too kyon kahata haai , ki manushy ke putra ko unche par chaddhaya jana avashy haai ?
43012035	yah manushy ka putra kaun haai ? yeesha ne un se kaha , jyoti ab thodee den tak tumhare beech men haai , jab tak jyoti tumhare sath haai tab tak chale chalo aeesa n ho ki andhakar tumhen a ghore jo andhakar men chalata haai vah naheen janata ki kidhar jata haai .
43012036	jab tak jyoti tumhare sath haai , jyoti par vishvas karo ki tum jyoti ke santan hoo . . ye baten kahakar yeesha chala gaya aur un se chhpai raha .
43012037	aur us ne un ke samhane itane chinh dikhaa , taubhee unhon ne us par vishvas n kiya .
43012038	taaki yashaayah bhavishyadvkta ka vachan poora ho jo us ne kaha ki he prabhu hamare samachar kee kis ne prateeati kee haai ? aur prabhu ka bhujabal kis par pragatt hua ?
43012039	is karan ve vishvas n kar sake , kyonki yashaayah ne fir bhee kaha .
43012040	ki us ne un kee ankhen andhae , aur un ka man kattor kiya haai kaheen aeesa n ho , ki ankhon se dekhe , aur man se samajhe , aur fire , aur maain unhen changa karoon .
43012041	yashaayah ne ye baten isaliye kahee , ki us ne us kee mahima dekhee aur us ne usake vishay men baten kee .
43012042	taubhee saradaron men se bhee bahuton ne us par vishvas kiya , parantu fareeasiyon ke karan pragatt men naheen manate the , aeesa n ho ki aradhanalay men se nikale jaen .
43012043	kyonaki manushyon kee prashansa un ko parameshvar kee prashansa se aadhaik piry lagatee thee . .
43012044	yeesha ne pukarakar kaha , jo mujh par vishvas karata haai , vah mujh par nahee , baran mere bhejanevale par vishvas karata haai .
43012045	aur jo mujhe dekhta haai , vah mere bhejanevale ko dekhta haai .
43012046	maain jagat men jyoti hokar aya hoon taaki jo koi mujh par vishvas kare , vah andhakar men ne rahe .
43012047	yaadi koi meree baten sunakar n mane , to maain use doshaee naheen ttharata , kyonki maain jagat ko doshaee ttharane ke liye nahee , parantu jagat ka uddhar karane ke liye aya hoon .
43012048	jo mujhe tuchchh janata haai aur meree baten grahan naheen karata haai us ko doshaee ttharanevala to aek haai : arthata jo vachan maain ne kaha haai , vah pichhle din men use doshaee ttharaega .
43012049	kyonaki maain ne apanee or se baten naheen kee , parantu pita jis ne mujhe bheja haai usee ne mujhe agyaa dee haai , ki kya kya kahoon ? aur kya kya boloon ?
43012050	aur maain janata hoo , ki us kee agyaa anant jeevan haai isaaliye maain jo bolata hoo , vah jaaisa pita ne mujh se kaha haai vaaisa hee bolata hoon . .
43013001	fasah ke pabrba se pahile jab yeesha ne jan liya , ki meree vah ghadee a pahunchee haai ki jagat chhodkar pita ke pas jau , to apane logon se , jo jagat men the , jaaisa praem vah rakhta tha , ant tak vaaisa hee praem rakhta raha .
43013002	aur jab shautan shamaun ke putra yahooda iskaariyotee ke man men yah dal chuka tha , ki use pakadva , to bhojan ke samaya .
43013003	yeesha ne yah janakar ki pita ne sab kuchh mere hath men kar diya haai aur maain parameshvar ke pas se aya hoo , aur parameshvar ke pas jata hoon .
43013004	bhojan par se uttkar apane kapade utar dia , aur angochha lekar apanee kamar bandhaee .
43013005	tab baratan men panee bhrakar chelon ke panv dhaene aur jis angochhe se us kee kamar bandhaee thee usee se ponchhne laga .
43013006	jab vah shamaun pataras ke pas aya : tab us ne us se kaha , he prabhu ,
43013007	kya too mere panv dhaeta haai ? yeesha ne us ko uttr diya , ki jo maain karata hoo , too ab naheen janata , parantu is ke bad samajhega .
43013008	pataras ne us se kaha , too mere panv kabhee n dhaene paega : yah sunakar yeesha ne us se kaha , yadi maain tujhe n dhaeu , to mere sath tera kuchh bhee sajha naheen .
43013009	shamaun pataras ne us se kaha , he prabhu , to mere panv hee nahee , baran hath aur sir bhee dhae de .
43013010	yeesha ne us se kaha , jo naha chuka haai , use panv ke siva aur kuchh dhaene ka prayojan naheen parantu vah bilakul shauddh haai : aur tum shauddh ho parantu sab ke sab naheen .
43013011	vah to apane pakadvanevale ko janata tha isee liye us ne kaha , tum sab ke sab shauddh naheen . .
43013012	jab vah un ke panv dhae chuka aur apane kapade paahinakar fir baaitt gaya to un se kahane laga , kya tum samajhe ki maain ne tumhare sath kya kiya ?
43013013	tum mujhe guro , aur prabhu , kahate ho , aur bhla kahate ho , kyonaki maain vaheen hoon .
43013014	yaadi maain ne prabhu aur guroo hokar tumhare panv dhaae to tumhen bhee aek dusare ke panv dhaena chahiae .
43013015	kyonaki maain ne tumhen namoona dikha diya haai , ki jaaisa maain ne tumhare sath kiya haai , tum bhee vaaisa hee kiya karo .
43013016	maain tum se sach sach kahata hoo , das apane svamee se bada naheen aur n bheja hua apane bhejanevale se .
43013017	tum to ye baten janate ho , aur yadi un par chalo , to dhany ho .
43013018	maain tum sab ke vishay men naheen kahata : jinhen maain ne chun liya haai , unhen maain janata hoon : parantu yah isaaliye haai , ki pavitra shaasr ka yah vachan poora ho , ki jo meree rottee khata haai , us ne mujh par lat uttai .
43013019	ab maain usake hone se paahile tumhen jatae deta hoon ki jab ho jae to tum vishvas karo ki maain vaheen hoon .
43013020	maain tum se sach sach kahata hoo , ki jo mere bheje hae ko grahan karata haai , vah mujhe grahan karata haai , aur jo mujhe grahan karata haai , vah mere bhejanevale ko grahan karata haai . .
43013021	ye baten kahakar yeesha atma men vyakul hua aur yah gavahee dee , ki maain tum se sach sach kahata hoo , ki tum men se aek mujhe pakadvaega .
43013022	chele yah sandeh karate ha , ki vah kis ke vishay men kahata haai , aek doosare kee or dekhne lage .
43013023	usake chelon men se aek jis se yeesha praem rakhta tha , yeesha kee chhatee kee or jhuka hua baaitta tha .
43013024	tab shamaun pataras ne us kee or saain karake poochha , ki bata to , vah kis ke vishay men kahata haai ?
43013025	tab us ne usee tarah yeesha kee chhatee kee or jhuk kar poochha , he prabhu , vah kaun haai ? yeesha ne uttr diya , jise maain yah rottee ka ttukada dubokar doonga , vahee haai .
43013026	aur us ne ttukada dubokar shamaun ke putra yahooda iskaariyotee ko diya .
43013027	aur ttukada lete hee shautan us men sama gaya : tab yeesha ne us se kaha , jo too karata haai , turant kara .
43013028	parantu baaittnevalon men se kisee ne n jana ki us ne yah bat us se kis liye kahee .
43013029	yahooda ke pas thailee rahatee thee , isaaliye kisee kisee ne samajha , ki yeesha us se kahata haai , ki jo kuchh hamen pabrba ke liye chaahiae vah mol le , ya yah ki kangalon ko kuchh de .
43013030	tab vah ttukada lekar turant bahar chala gaya , aur ratrai ka samay tha . .
43013031	jab vah bahar chala gaya to yeesha ne kaha ab manushy putra kee maahima hui , aur parameshvar kee mahima us men hui .
43013032	aur parameshvar bhee apane men us kee maahima karega , baran turant karega .
43013033	he balako , maain aur thodee den tumhare pas hoon : fir tum mujhe ddoonddhoge , aur jaaisa maain ne yahoodiyon se kaha , ki jahan maain jata hoo , vahan tum naheen a sakate vaaisa hee maain ab tum se bhee kahata hoon .
43013034	maain tumhen aek nai agyaa deta hoo , ki aek doosare se praem rakho : jaaisa maain ne tum se praem rakha haai , vaaisa hee tum bhee aek dusare se praem rakho .
43013035	yaadi apas men praem rakhoge to isee se sab janenge , ki tum mere chele ho . .
43013036	shamaun pataras ne us se kaha , he prabhu , too kahan jata haai ? yeesha ne uttr diya , ki jahan maain jata hoo , vahan too ab mere peechhe a naheen sakata ! parantu is ke bad mere peechhe aega .
43013037	pataras ne us se kaha , he prabhu , abhee maain tere peechhe kyon naheen a sakata ? maain to tere liye apana praan doonga .
43013038	yeesha ne uttr diya , kya too mere liye apana praan dega ? maain tujh se sach sach kahata hoon ki murga bang n dega jab tak too teen bar mera inkar n kar lega .
43014001	tumhara man vyakul n ho , tum parameshvar par vishvas rakhte ho mujh par bhee vishvas rakho .
43014002	mere pita ke ghar men bahut se rahane ke sthan haai , yadi n hote , to maain tum se kah deta kyonki maain tumhare liye jagah taaiyar karane jata hoon .
43014003	aur yaadi maain jakar tumhare liye jagah taaiyar karoo , to fir akar tumhen apane yahana le jaunga , ki jahan maain rahoon vahan tum bhee raho .
43014004	aur jahan maain jata hoon tum vahan ka marga janate ho .
43014005	thoma ne us se kaha , he prabhu , ham naheen janate ki too han jata haai ? to marga kaaise janen ?
43014006	yeesha ne us se kaha , marga aur sachchai aur jeevan maain hee hoon bina mere dara koi pita ke pas naheen pahunch sakata .
43014007	yaadi tum ne mujhe jana hota , to mere pita ko bhee janate , aur ab use janate ho , aur use dekha bhee haai .
43014008	filippus ne us se kaha , he prabhu , pita ko hamen dikha de : yahee hamare liye bahut haai .
43014009	yeesha ne us se kaha he filippus , maain itane din se tumhare sath hoo , aur kya too mujhe naheen janata ? jis ne mujhe dekha haai us ne pita ko dekha haai : too kyon kahata haai ki pita ko hamen dikha .
43014010	kya too prateeati naheen karata , ki maain pita men hoo , aur pita mujh men haain ? ye baten jo maain tum se kahata hoo , apanee or se naheen kahata , parantu pita mujh men rahakar apane kam karata haai .
43014011	meree hee prateeati karo , ki maain pita men hoon aur pita mujh men haai naheen to kamon hee ke karan meree prateeati karo .
43014012	maain tum se sach sach kahata hoo , ki jo mujh par vishvas rakhta haai , ye kam jo maain karata hoon vahee bhee karega , baran in se bhee bade kam karega , kyonaki maain pita ke pas jata hoon .
43014013	aur jo kuchh tum mere nam se mangoge , vahee maain karoonga ki putra ke dara pita kee maahima ho .
43014014	yaadi tum mujh se mere nam se kuchh mangoge , to maain use karoonga .
43014015	yaadi tum mujh se praem rakhte ho , to meree agyaaon ko manoge .
43014016	aur maain pita se binatee karoonga , aur vah tumhen aek aur sahayak dega , ki vah sarvada tumhare sath rahe .
43014017	arthata saty ka atma , jise sansar grahan naheen kar sakata , kyonaki vah n use dekhta haai aur n use janata haai : tum use janate ho , kyonki vah tumhare sath rahata haai , aur vah tum men hoga .
43014018	maain tumhen anath n chhooonga , maain tumhare pas ata hoon .
43014019	aur thodee der rah gai haai ki sansar mujhe n dekhega , parantu tum mujhe dekhoge , isaaliye ki maain jeeavit hoo , tum bhee jeevit rahoge .
43014020	us din tum janoge , ki maain apane pita men hoo , aur tum mujh me , aur maain tum men .
43014021	jis ke pas meree agyaa haai , aur vah unhen manata haai , vahee mujh se praem rakhta haai , aur jo mujh se praem rakhta haai , us se mera pita praem rakhega , aur maain us se praem rakoonga , aur apane ap ko us par pragatt karoonga .
43014022	us yahooda ne jo iskariyotee n tha , us se kaha , he prabhu , kya hua kee too apane ap ko ham par pragatt kiya chahata haai , aur sansar par naheen .
43014023	yeesha ne us ko uttr diya , yaadi koi mujh se praem rakhe , to vah mere vachan ko manega , aur mera pita us se praem rakhega , aur ham usake pas aenge , aur usake sath vas karenge .
43014024	jo mujh se praem naheen rakhta , vah mere vachan naheen manata , aur jo vachan tum sunate ho , vah mera naheen varan pita ka haai , jis ne mujhe bheja . .
43014025	ye baten maain ne tumhare sath rahate hae tum se kahee .
43014026	parantu sahayak arthata pavitra atma jise pita mere nam se bhejega , vah tumhen sab baten sikhaaega , aur jo kuchh maain ne tum se kaha haai , vah sab tumhen smaran karaega .
43014027	maain tumhen shaaantai diae jata hoo , apanee shaaantai tumhen deta hoon jaaise sansar deta haai , maain tumhen naheen deta : tumhara man n ghabarae aur n dre .
43014028	tum ne suna , ki maain ne tum se kaha , ki maain jata hoo , aur tumhare pas fir ata hoon : yaadi tum mujh se praem rakhte , to is bat se anandait hote , ki maain pita ke pas jata hoon kyonaki pita mujh se bada haai .
43014029	aur maain ne ab is ke hone ke paahile tum se kah diya haai , ki jab vah ho ja , to tum prateeti karo .
43014030	maain ab se tumhare sath aur bahut baten n karoonga , kyonaki is sansar ka saradar ata haai , aur mujh men usaka kuchh naheen .
43014031	parantu yah isaaliye hota haai ki sansar jane ki maain pita se praem rakhta hoo , aur jis tarah pita ne mujhe agyaa dee , maain vaaise hee karata hoon : utto , yahan se chalen . .
43015001	sachchee dakhlata maain hoon aur mera pita kisan haai .
43015002	jo dalee mujh men haai , aur naheen falatee , use vah katt dalata haai , aur jo falatee haai , use vah chhanttta haai taaki aur fale .
43015003	tum to us vachan ke karan jo maain ne tum se kaha haai , shauddh ho .
43015004	tum mujh men bane raho , aur maain tum men : jaaise dalee yadi dakhlata men banee n rahe , to apane ap se naheen fal sakatee , vaaise hee tum bhee yaadi mujh men bane n raho to naheen fal sakate .
43015005	men dakhlata hoon : tum daliyan ho jo mujh men bana rahata haai , aur maain us me , vah bahut fal falata haai , kyonki mujh se alag hokar tum kuchh bhee naheen kar sakate .
43015006	yaadi koi mujh men bana n rahe , to vah dalee kee nai faenk diya jata , aur sookh jata haai aur log unhen battorakar ag men jhonk dete haai , aur ve jal jatee haain .
43015007	yaadi tum mujh men bane raho , aur meree baten tum men banee rahen to jo chaho mango aur vah tumhare liye ho jaega .
43015008	mere pita kee maahima isee se hotee haai , ki tum bahut sa fal lao , tab hee tum mere chele ttharoge .
43015009	jaaisa pita ne mujh se praem rakha , mere praem men bane raho .
43015010	yaadi tum meree agyaaon ko manoge , to mere praem men bane rahoge : jaaisa ki maain ne apane pita kee agyaaon ko mana haai , aur usake praem men bana rahata hoon .
43015011	maain ne ye baten tum se isaliye kahee haai , ki mera anand tum men bana rahe , aur tumhara anand poora ho jae .
43015012	meree agyaa yah haai , ki jaaisa maain ne tum se praem rakha , vaaisa hee tum bhee aek doosare se praem rakho .
43015013	is se bada praem kisee ka nahee , ki koi apane mitraen ke liye apana praan de .
43015014	jo kuchh maain tumhen agyaa deta hoo , yadi use karo , to tum mere mitra ho .
43015015	ab se maain tumhen das n kahoonga , kyonaki das naheen janata , ki usaka svamee kya karata haai : parantu maain ne tumhen mitra kaha haai , kyonaki maain ne jo baten apane pita se sunee , ve sab tumhen bata deen .
43015016	tum ne mujhe naheen chuna parantu maain ne tumhen chuna haai aur tumhen ttharaya taki tum jakar fal lao aur tumhara fal bana rahe , ki tum mere nam se jo kuchh pita se mango , vah tumhen de .
43015017	in baten kee agyaa maain tumhen isaaliye deta hoo , ki tum aek doosare se praem rakho .
43015018	yaadi sansar tum se baair rakhta haai , to tum janate ho , ki us ne tum se pahile mujh se bhee baair rakha .
43015019	yaadi tum sansar ke hote , to sansar apanon se praeeti rakhta , parantu is karan ki tum sansar men se chun liya haai isee liye sansar tum se baair rakhta haai .
43015020	jo bat maai . ne tum se kahee thee , ki das apane svamee se bada naheen hota , usako yad rakho : yaadi unhon ne mujhe sataya , to tumhen bhee sataenge yaadi unhon ne meree bat manee , to tumharee bhee manenge .
43015021	parantu yah sab kuchh ve mere nam ke karan tumhare sath karenge kyonki ve mere bhejanevale ko naheen janate .
43015022	yaadi maain n ata aur un se baten n karata , to ve papee n ttharate parantu ab unhen un ke pap ke liye koi bahana naheen .
43015023	jo mujh se baair rakhta haai , vah mere pita se bhee baair rakhta haai .
43015024	yaadi maain un men ve kam n karata , jo aur kisee ne naheen kiae to ve papee naheen ttharate , parantu ab to unhon ne mujhe aur mere pita donon ko dekha , aur donon se baair kiya .
43015025	aur yah isaliye hua , ki vahi vachan poora ho , jo un kee vyavastha men likha haai , ki unhon ne mujh se vyarth baair kiya .
43015026	parantu jab vah sahayak aega , jise maain tumhare pas bhejoonga , arthata saty ka atma jo pita kee or se nikalata haai , to vah meree gavahee dega .
43015027	aur tum bhee gavah ho kyonki tum arambh se mere sath rahe ho . .
43016001	ye baten maain ne tum se isaliye kaheen ki tum ttokar n khao .
43016002	ve tumhen aradhanalayon men se nikal denge , varan vah samay ata haai , ki jo koi tumhen mar dalega yah samajhega ki maain parameshvar kee seva karata hoon .
43016003	aur yah ve isaliye karenge ki unhon ne n pita ko jana haai aur n mujhe janate haain .
43016004	parantu ye baten maain ne isaaliye tum se kahee , ki jab un ka samay ae to tumhen smaran a ja , ki maain ne tum se paahile hee kah diya tha : aur maain ne arambh men tum se ye baten isaliye naheen kaheen kyonaki maain tumhare sath tha .
43016005	ab maain apane bhejanevale ke pas jata hoon aur tum men se koi mujh se naheen poochhta , ki too kahan jata haain ?
43016006	parantu maain ne jo ye baten tum se kahee haai , isaaliye tumhara man shaek se bhr gaya .
43016007	taubhee maain tum se sach kahata hoo , ki mera jana tumhare liye achchha haai , kyonki yadi maain n jau , to vah sahayak tumhare pas n aega , parantu yaadi maain jaunga , to use tumhare pas bhej doonga .
43016008	aur vah akar sansar ko pap aur dhaaarmikata aur nyay ke vishay men niroottr karega .
43016009	pap ke vishay men isaliye ki ve mujh par vishvas naheen karate .
43016010	aur dhaarmikata ke vishay men isaliye ki maain pita ke pas jata hoo ,
43016011	aur tum mujhe fir n dekhoge : nyay ke vishay men isaliye ki sansar ka saradar doshaee ttharaya gaya haai .
43016012	mujhe tum se aur bhee bahut see baten kahanee haai , parantu abhee tum unhen sah naheen sakate .
43016013	parantu jab vah arthata saty ka atma aega , to tumhen sab saty ka marga bataega , kyonaki vah apanee or se n kahega , parantu jo kuchh sunega , vahee kahega , aur anevalee baten tumhen bataega .
43016014	vah meree mahima karega , kyonaki vah meree baton men se lekar tumhen bataega .
43016015	jo kuchh pita ka haai , vah sab mera haai isaaliye maain ne kaha , ki vah meree baton men se lekar tumhen bataega .
43016016	thodee der tum mujhe n dekhoge , aur fir thodee der men mujhe dekhoge .
43016017	tab usake kitane chelon ne apas men kaha , yah kya haai , jo vah ham se kahata haai , ki thodee der men tum mujhe n dekhoge , aur fir thodee der men mujhe dekhoge ? aur yah isaliye ki maain ki maain pita ke mas jata hoon ?
43016018	tab unhon ne kaha , yah thodee der jo vah kahata haai , kya bat haai ? ham naheen janate , ki kya kahata haai .
43016019	yeesha ne yah janakar , ki ve mujh se poochhna chahate haai , un se kaha , kya tum apas men meree is bate ke vishay men poochh pachh karate ho , ki thodee der men tum mujhe n dekhoge , aur fir thodee der men mujhe dekhoge .
43016020	maain tum se sach sach kahata hoon ki tum rooge aur vilap karoge , parantu sansar anand karega : tumhen shaek hoga , parantu tumhara shaek anand ban jaega .
43016021	jab sree janane lagatee haai to us ko shaek hota haai , kyonki us kee du : kh kee ghadee a pahunchee , parantu jab vah balak janm chukee to is anand se ki jagat men aek manushy utpann hua , us sankatt ko fir smaran naheen karatee .
43016022	aur tumhen bhee ab to shaek haai , parantu maain tum se fir miloonga aur tumhare man men anand hoga aur tumhara anand koi tum se chheen n lega .
43016023	us din tum mujh se kuchh n poochhoge : maain tum se sach sach kahata hoo , yadi pita se kuchh mangoge , to vah mere nam se tumhen dega .
43016024	ab tak tum ne mere nam se kuchh naheen manga mango to paoge taaki tumhara anand poora ho jae . .
43016025	maain ne ye baten tum se drashttanton men kahee haai , parantu vah samay ata haai , ki maain tum se drashttanton men aur fir naheen kahoonga parantu kholakar tumhen pita ke vishay men bataunga .
43016026	us din tum mere nam se mangoge , aur maain tum se yah naheen kahata , ki maain tumhare liye pita se binatee karoonga .
43016027	kyonaki pita to ap hee tum se praeeti rakhta haai , isaliye ki tum ne mujh se praeeati rakhee haai , aur yah bhee prateeati kee haai , ki maain pita ki or se nikal aya .
43016028	maain pita se nikalakar jagat men aya hoo , fir jagat ko chhodkar pita ke pas jata hoon .
43016029	usake chelon ne kaha , dek , ab to too kholakar kahata haai , aur koi drashttant naheen kahata .
43016030	ab ham jan gaa , ki too sab kuchh janata haai , aur tujhe prayojan nahee , ki koi tujh se poochhe , is se ham prateeti karate haai , ki too parameshvar se nikala haai .
43016031	yah sun yeesha ne un se kaha , kya tum ab prateeati karate ho ?
43016032	dekho , vah ghadee atee haai varan a pahunchee ki tum sab tittr bittr hokar apana apana marga loge , aur mujhe akela chhod doge , taubhee maain akela naheen kyonki pita mere sath haai .
43016033	maain ne ye baten tum se isaliye kahee haai , ki tumhen mujh men shaaantai mile sansar men tumhen klesh hota haai , parantu ddhaddhs bandhae , maain ne sansar ko jeen liya haai . .
43017001	yeesha ne ye baten kaheen aur apanee ankhe akash kee or uttakar kaha , he pita , vah ghadee a pahunchee , apane putra kee maahima kar , ki putra bhee teree mahima kare .
43017002	kyonaki too ne us ka sab praaanaiyon par aadhaikar diya , ki jinhen too ne us ko diya haai , un sab ko vah anant jeevan de .
43017003	aur anant jeevan yah haai , ki ve tujh advait sachche parameshvar ko aur yeesha maseeh ko , jise too ne bheja haai , jane .
43017004	jo kam too ne mujhe karane ko diya tha , use poora karake maain ne prathvee par teree mahima kee haai .
43017005	aur ab , he pita , too apane sath meree mahima us maahima se kar jo jagat ke hone se paahile , meree tere sath thee .
43017006	maain ne tera nam un manushyon par pragatt kiya jinhen too ne jagat men se mujhe diya : ve tere the aur too ne unhen mujhe diya aur unhon ne tere vachan ko man liya haai .
43017007	ab ve jan gaae haai , ki jo kuchh too ne mujhe diya haai , sab teree or se haai .
43017008	kyonaki jo baten too ne mujhe pahuncha dee , maain ne unhen unako pahuncha diya aur unhon ne un ko grahan kiya : aur sach sach jan liya haai , ki maain teree or se nikala hoo , aur prateeati kar lee haai ki too hee ne mujhe bheja .
43017009	maain un ke liye binatee karata hoo , sansar ke liye binatee naheen karata hoon parantu unheen ke liye jinhen too ne mujhe diya haai , kyonki ve tere haain .
43017010	aur jo kuchh mera haai vah sab tera haai aur jo tera haai vah mera haai vah sab tera haai aur jo tera haai , vah mera haai aur in se meree maahima pragatt hui haai .
43017011	maain age ko jagat men n rahoonga , parantu ye jagat men rahenge , aur maain tere pas ata hoon he paavitra pita , apane us nam se jo too ne mujhe diya haai , un kee raksha kar , ki ve hamaree nai aek hon .
43017012	jab maai . un ke sath tha , to maain ne tere us nam se , jo too ne mujhe diya haai , un kee raksha kee , maain ne un kee chaukasee kee aur vinash ke putra ko chhod un men se kai nash n hua , isaaliye ki pavitra shaasr kee bat pooree ho .
43017013	parantu ab maain tere pas ata hoo , aur ye baten jagat men kahata hoo , ki ve mera anand apane men poora paen .
43017014	maain ne tera vachan unhen pahuncha diya haai , aur sansar ne un se baair kiya , kyonaki jaaisa maain sansar ka nahee , vaaise hee ve bhee sansar ke naheen .
43017015	maain yah binatee naheen karata , ki too unhen jagat se utta le , parantu yah ki too unhen us dushtt se bachae rakh .
43017016	jaaise maain sansar ka nahee , vaaise hee ve bhee sansar ke naheen .
43017017	saty ke dara unhen paavitra kara : tera vachan saty haai .
43017018	jaaise too ne jagat men mujhe bheja , vaaise hee maain ne bhee unhen jagat men bheja .
43017019	aur un ke liye maain apane ap ko pavitra karata hoon taki ve bhee saty ke dara pavitra kiae jaen .
43017020	maain keval inheen ke liye binatee naheen karata , parantu un ke liye bhee jo in ke vachan ke dara mujh par vishvas karenge , ki ve sab aek hon .
43017021	jaaisa too he pita mujh men haai , aur maain tujh men hoo , vaaise hee ve bhee ham men ho , isaaliye ki jagat prateeti kare , ki too hee ne mujhe bheja .
43017022	aur vah maahima jo too ne mujhe dee , maain ne unhen dee haai ki ve vaaise hee aek hon jaaise kee ham aek haain .
43017023	maain un men aur too mujh men ki ve siddh hokar aek ho jae , aur jagat jane ki too hee ne mujhe bheja , aur jaaisa too ne mujh se praem rakha , vaaisa hee un se praem rakha .
43017024	he pita , maai . chahata hoon ki jinhen too ne mujhe diya haai , jahan maain hoo , vahan ve bhee mere sath hon ki ve meree us maahima ko dekhen jo too ne mujhe dee haai , kyonki too ne jagat kee utpaati se pahile mujh se praem rakha .
43017025	he dhaarmik pita , sansar ne mujhe naheen jana , parantu maain ne tujhe jana aur inhon ne bhee jana ki too hee ne mujhe bheja .
43017026	aur maain ne tera nam un ko bataya aur batata rahoonga ki jo praem tujh ko mujh se tha , vah un men rahe aur maain un men rahoon . .
43018001	yeesha ye baten kahakar apane chelon ke sath kidraen ke nale ke par gaya , vahan aek baree thee , jis men vah aur usake chele gaae .
43018002	aur usaka pakadvanevala yahooda bhee vah jagah janata tha , kyonki yeesha apane chelon ke sath vahan jaya karata tha .
43018003	tab yahooda palattn ko aur mahayajakon aur fareeasiyon kee or se pyadon ko lekar deepakon aur mashaalon aur haathaiyaron ko liae hae vahan aya .
43018004	tab yeesha un sab baton ko jo us par anevalee thee , janakar nikala , aur un se kahane laga , kise ddoonddhte ho ?
43018005	unhon ne usako uttr diya , yeesha nasaree ko : yeesha ne un se kaha , maain hee hoon : aur usaka pakadvanevala yahooda bhee un ke sath khda tha .
43018006	usake yah kahate hee , ki maain hoo , ve peechhe hattkar boomi par gir pade .
43018007	tab us ne fir un se poochha , tum kis ko ddoonddhte ho .
43018008	ve bole , yeesha nasaree ko . yeesha ne uttr diya , maain to tum se kah chuka hoon ki maain hee hoo , yadi mujhe ddoonddhte ho to inhen jane do .
43018009	yai isaliye hua , ki vah vachan poora ho , jo us ne kaha tha ki jinhen too ne mujhe diya , un men se maain ne aek ko bhee n khoya .
43018010	shamaun pataras ne talavar , jo usake pas thee , kheenchee aur mahayajak ke das par chalakar , usaka daahina kan uda diya , us das ka nam malakhus tha .
43018011	tab yeesha ne pataras se kaha , apanee talavar kattee men rakh : jo kattora pita ne mujhe diya haai kya maain use n peeun ?
43018012	tab sipaahiyon aur un ke soobedar aur yahoodiyon ke pyadon ne yeesha ko pakadkar bandha liya .
43018013	aur paahile use hanna ke pas le gaae kyonki vah us varsha ke mahayajak kaifaa ka sasur tha .
43018014	yah vahee kaifaa tha , jis ne yahoodiyon ko salah dee thee ki hamare logon ke liye aek puroosh ka marana achchha haai .
43018015	shamaun pataras aur aek aur chela bhee yeesha ke peechhe ho liae : yah chela mahayajak ka jana pahachana tha aur yeesha ke sath mahayajak ke angat men gaya .
43018016	parantu pataras dar par khda raha , tab vah doosara chela jo mahayajak ka jana pahachana tha , bahar nikala , aur darapalin se kahakar , pataras ko bheetar le aya .
43018017	us dasee ne jo darapalin thee , pataras se kaha , kya too bhee is manushy ke chelon men se haai ? us ne kaha , maain naheen hoon .
43018018	das aur pyade jade ke karan koaele dhadhakakar khde tap rahe the aur pataras bhee un ke sath khda tap raha tha . .
43018019	tak mahayajak ne yeesha se usake chelon ke vishay men aur usake upadesh ke vishay men poochha .
43018020	yeesha ne us ko uttr diya , ki maain ne jagat se kholakar baten kee maain ne sabhaon aur aradhanalay men jahan sab yahoodee ikatthe hua karate haain sada upadesh kiya aur gupt men kuchh bhee naheen kaha .
43018021	too mujh se kyon poochhta haai ? sunanevalon se poochh : ki maain ne un se kya kaha ? dekh ve janate haain ki maain ne kya kya kaha ?
43018022	tab us ne yah kaha , to pyadon men se aek ne jo pas khda tha , yeesha ko thppad marakar kaha , kya too mahayajak ko is prakar uttr deta haai .
43018023	yeesha ne use uttr diya , yaadi maain ne bura kaha , to us burai par gavahee de parantu yadi bhla kaha , to mujhe kyon marata haai ?
43018024	hanna ne use bandho hae kaifaa mahayajak ke pas bhej diya . .
43018025	shamaun pataras khda hua tap raha tha . tab unhon ne us se kaha kya too bhee usake chelon men se haai ? us n inkar karake kaha , maain naheen hoon .
43018026	mahayajak ke dason men se aek jo usake kuttumb men se tha , jisaka kan pataras ne katt dala tha , bola , kya maain ne tujhe usake sath baree men n dekha tha ?
43018027	pataras fir inkar kar gaya aur turant murga ne bang dee . .
43018028	aur ve yeesha ko kaifaa ke pas se kile ko le gaae aur bhor ka samay tha , parantu ve ap kile ke bheetar n gaae taaki ashauddh n hon parantu fasah kha saken .
43018029	tab peelatus un ke pas bahar nikal aya aur kaha , tum is manushy par kis bat kee naliya karate ho ?
43018030	unhon ne us ko uttr diya , ki yadi vah kukarmee n hota to ham use tere hath n saunpate .
43018031	peelatus ne un se kaha , tum hee ise le jakar apanee vyavastha ke anusar usaka nyay karo : yahoodayon ne us se kaha , hamen adhaikar naheen ki kisee ka praan len .
43018032	yah isaliye hua , ki yeesha kee vah bat pooree ho jo us ne yah pata dete hae kahee thee , ki usaka marana kaaisa hoga . .
43018033	tab peelatus fir kile ke bheetar gaya aur yeesha ko bulakar , us se poochha , kya too yahoodiyon ka raja haai ?
43018034	yeesha ne uttr diya , kya too yah bat apanee or se kahata haai ya auron ne mere vishay men tujh se kahee ?
43018035	peelatus ne uttr diya , kya maain yahoodee hoon ? teree hee jaati aur mahayajakon ne tujhe mere hath saunpa , too ne kya kiya haai ?
43018036	yeesha ne uttr diya , ki mera rajy is jagat ka nahee , yadi mera rajy is jagat ka hota , to mere sevak ladte , ki maain yahoodiyon ke hath saunpa n jata : parantu ab mera rajy yahan ka naheen .
43018037	peelatus ne us se kaha , ki too kahata haai , kyonaki maain raja hoon maain ne isaliye janm liya , aur isaliye jagat men aya hoon ki saty par gavahee doon jo koi saty ka haai , vah mera shabd sunata haai .
43018038	peelatus ne us se kaha , saty kya haai ? aur yah kahakar vah fir yahoodiyon ke pas nikal gaya aur un se kaha , maain to us men kuchh dosh naheen pata .
43018039	par tumharee yah reeti haai ki maain fasah men tumhare liye aek vyaktai ko chhod doon so kya tum chahate ho , ki maain tumhare liye yahoodiyon ke raja ko chhod doon ?
43018040	tab unhon ne fir chillakar kaha , ise naheen parantu hamare liye baraabba ko chhod de aur baraabba dakoo tha . .
43019001	is par peelatus ne yeesha ko lekar kode lagavae .
43019002	aur sipaahiyon ne kantton ka mukutt goonthkar usake sir par rakha , aur use baainjanee vasr paahinaya .
43019003	aur usake pas a akar kahane lage , he yahoodiyon ke raja , pranama ! aur use thppad mare .
43019004	tak peelatus ne fir bahar nikalakar logon se kaha , dekho , maain use tumhare pas fir bahar lata hoon taki tum jano ki maain kuchh bhee dosh naheen pata .
43019005	tak yeesha kantton ka mukutt aur baainjanee vasr pahine hae bahar nikala aur peelatus ne un se kaha , dekho , yah puroosha .
43019006	jab mahayajakon aur pyadon ne use dekha , to chillakar kaha , ki use kroos par chaddha , kroos par : peelatus ne un se kaha , tum hee use lekar kroos par chaddhao kyonaki maain us men dosh naheen pata .
43019007	yahoodiyon ne us ko uttr diya , ki hamaree bhee vyavastha haai aur us vyavastha ke anusar vah mare jane ke yogy haai kyonaki us ne apane ap ko parameshvar ka putra banaya .
43019008	jab peelatus ne yah bat sunee to aur bhee dr gaya .
