44006011	is par unho ne kai logon ko ubhara jo kahane lage , ki ham ne is moosa aur parameshvar ke virodha men ninda kee baten kahate suna haai .
44006012	aur logon aur praacheenon aur shaastriayon ko bhdkakar chaddh ae aur use pakadkar mahasabha men le ae .
44006013	aur jootte gavah khde kia , jinhon ne kaha ki yah manushy is pavitra sthan aur vyavastha ke virodha men bolana naheen chhodta .
44006014	kyonaki ham ne use yah kahate suna haai , ki yahee yeesha nasaree is jagah ko ddha dega , aur un reeton ko badal dalega jo moosa ne hamen saunpee haain .
44006015	tab sab logon ne jo sabha men baaitte the , us kee or takakar usaka mukhda svargadoot ka sa dekha . .
44007001	tab mahayajak ne kaha , kya ye baten yon hee haai ?
44007002	us ne kaha he bhaiyo , aur pitaro suno , hamara pita ibraaheem haran men basane se paahile jab misuputaamiya men tha to tejomay parameshvar ne use darshan diya .
44007003	aur us se kaha ki too apane desh aur apane kuttumb se nikalakar us desh me chala ja , jise maain tujhe dikhaunga .
44007004	tab vah kasadiyon ke desh se nikalakar haran men ja basa aur usake pita kee mratyu ke bad parameshvar ne usako vahan se is desh men lakar basaya jis men ab tum basate ho .
44007005	aur usako kuchh meeras baran paair rakhne bhr kee bhee us men jagah n dee , parantu praatigyaa kee ki maain yah desha , tere aur tere bad tere vansh ke hath kar doonga yadhypi us samay usake koi putra bhee n tha .
44007006	aur parameshvar ne yon kaha ki teree santan ke log paraye desh men paradeshaee honge , aur ve unhen das banaenge , aur char sau varsha tak dukh denge .
44007007	fir parameshvar ne kaha jis jati ke ve das honge , us ko maain dand doonga aur is ke bad ve nikalakar isee jagah meree seva karenge .
44007008	aur us ne us se khtane kee vacha bandhaee aur isee dasha men isahak us se utpann hua aur attven din usaka khtana kiya gaya aur isahak se yakoob aur yakoob se barah kulapaati utpann hae .
44007009	aur kulapaatiyon ne yoosufa se dah karake use misar desh janevalon ke hath becha parantu parameshvar usake sath tha .
44007010	aur use usake sab kleshaen se chhudakar misar ke raja firaun ke age anugrah aur buddh idee , aur us ne use misar par aur apane sare ghar par hakim ttharaya .
44007011	tab misar aur kanan ke sare desh men akal pada jis se bharee klesh hua , aur hamare bapadadon ko ann naheen milata tha .
44007012	parantu yakoob ne yah sunakar , ki misar men anaj haai , hamare bapadadon ko pahilee bar bheja .
44007013	aur doosaree bar yoosufa apane bhaiyon par pragatt ko gaya , aur yoosuufa kee jaati firaun ko maloom ho gai .
44007014	tab yoosufa ne apane pita yakoob aur apane sare kuttumb ko , jo pachhttr vyaaktai the , bula bheja .
44007015	tab yakoob misar men gaya aur vahan vah aur hamare bapadade mar gaae .
44007016	aur ve shaikim men pahunchae jakar us kabra men rakhe gaa , jise ibraaheem n chandee dekar shaikim men hamor kee santan se mol liya tha .
44007017	parantu jab us pratigyaa ke poore hone ka samay nikatt aya , to parameshvar ne ibraaheem se kee thee , to misar men ve log baddh gaae aur bahut ho gaae .
44007018	jab tak ki misar men doosara raja n hua jo yoosufa ko naheen janata tha .
44007019	us ne hamaree jaati se chaturai karake hamare bapadadon ke sath yahan tak kuvyohar kiya , ki unhen apane balakon ko faenk dena pada ki ve jeevit n rahen .
44007020	us samay moosa utpann hua jo bahut hee sundar tha aur vah teen maheene tak apane pita ke ghar men pala gaya .
44007021	parantu jab faenk diya gaya to firaun kee bettee ne use utta liya , aur apana putra karake pala .
44007022	aur moosa ko misaariyon kee saree vidha paddhai gai , aur vah baton aur kamon men samarthee tha .
44007023	jab vah chalees varsha ka hua , to usake man men aya ki maain apane israaelee bhaiyon se bhentt karoon .
44007024	aur us ne aek vyaktai par anyay hone dekhkar , use bachaya , aur misaree ko marakar satae hae ka palatta liya .
44007025	us ne socha , ki mere bhai samajhenge ki parameshvar mere hathon se un ka uddhar karega , parantu unhon ne n samajha .
44007026	doosare din jab ve apas men lad rahe the , to vah vahan a nikala aur yah kahake unhen mel karane ke liye samajhaya , ki he purooshae , tum to bhai bhai ho , aek doosare par kyon anyay karate ho ?
44007027	parantu jo apane padosee par anyay kar raha tha , us ne use yah kahakar hatta diya , ki tujhe kis ne ham par hakim aur nyayee ttharaya haai ?
44007028	kya jis reeti se too ne kal misaree ko mar dala mujhe bhee mar dalana chahata haai ?
44007029	yah bat sunakar , moosa bhaga aur midhan desh men paradeshaee hokar rahane laga : aur vahan usake do putra utpann hae .
44007030	jab poore chalees varsha beet gaa , to aek svarga doot ne seenaai pahad ke jangal men use jalatee hui jhadee kee jvala men darshan diya .
44007031	moosa ne us darshan ko dekhkar achambha kiya , aur jab dekhne ke liye pas gaya , to prabhu ka yah shabd hua .
44007032	ki maain tere bapadado , ibraaheem , isahak aur yakoob ka parameshvar hoon : tab to moosa kanp utta , yahan tak ki use dekhne ka hiyav n raha .
44007033	tab prabhu ne us se kaha apane pavon se jootee utar le , kyonaki jis jagah too khda haai , vah pavitra boomi haai .
44007034	maain ne sachamuch apane logon kee durdasha ko jo misar men haai , dekhee haai aur un kee ah aur un ka rona sun liya haai isaaliye unhen chhudane ke liye utara hoon . ab a , maain tujhe misar men bhenjoonga .
44007035	jis moosa ko unhon ne yah kahakar nakara tha ki tujhe kis ne ham par hakim aur nyayee ttharaya haai usee ko parameshvar ne haakim aur chhudanevala ttharakar , us svarga doot ke dara jis ne use jhadee men darshan diya tha , bheja .
44007036	yahee vyaaktai misar aur lal samudra aur jangal men chalees varsha tak adabhut kam aur chinh dikha dikhakar unhen nikal laya .
44007037	yah vahee moosa haai , jis ne israaeliyon se kaha ki parameshvar tumhare bhaiyon men se tumhare liye mujh sa aek bhavishyadvkta uttaaega .
44007038	yah vahee haai , jis ne jangal men kaleeasiya ke beech us svargadoot ke sath seenaai pahad par us se baten kee , aur hamare bapadadon ke sath tha : usee ko jeeavit vachan mile , ki ham tak pahunchae .
44007039	parantu hamare bapadadon ne us kee manana n chaha baran use hattakar apane man misar kee or faere .
44007040	aur haroon se kaha hamare liye aeesa devata bana , jo hamare age age chalen kyonaki yah moosa ja hamen misar desh se nikal laya , ham naheen janate use kya hua ?
44007041	un dinon men unhon ne aek bachhda banakar , us kee moorat ke age bali chaddhaya aur apane hathon ke kamon men magan hone lage .
44007042	so parameshvar ne munh modkar unhen chhod diya , ki akashagan poojen jaaisa bhvishyadvktaon kee pustak men likha haai ki he israael ke gharane , kya tum jangal men chalees varsha tak pashaubaali aur annabaali mujh hee ko chaddhate rahe ?
44007043	aur tum molek ke tamboo aur rifaan devata ke tare ko liae firate the arthata un akaron ko jinhen tum ne dandvat karane ke liye banaya tha : so maain tumhen babur ke pare le jakar basaunga .
44007044	sakshaee ka tamboo jangal men hamare bapadadon ke beech men tha jaaisa us ne ttharaya , jis ne moosa se kaha ki jo akar too ne dekha haai , usake anusar ise bana .
44007045	usee tamboo ko hamare bapadade poorvakal se pakar yahoshoo ke sath yahan le ae jis samay ki unhon ne un anyajaatiyon ka aadhaikar paya , jinhen parameshvar ne hamare bapadadon ke samhane se nikal diya aur vah daud ke samay tak raha .
44007046	us par parameshvar ne anugrah kiya , so us ne binatee kee , ki maain yakoob ke parameshvar ke liye nivas stha ttharaun .
44007047	parantu sulaaiman ne usake liye ghar banaya .
44007048	parantu param pradhaan hath ke banae gharon men naheen rahata , jaaisa ki bhvishyadvkta ne kaha .
44007049	ki prabhu kahata haai , svarga mera sihansan aur prathvee mere panvon tale kee peeddhee haai , mere liye tum kis prakar ka ghar banaoge ? aur mere vishraam ka kaun sa sthan hoga ?
44007050	kya ye sab vastaen mere hath kee banai naheen ? he hatteele , aur man aur kan ke khtanarahit logo , tum sada pavitra atma ka samhana karate ho .
44007051	jaaisa tumhare bapadade karate the , vaaise hee tum bhee karate ho .
44007052	bhavishyadvktaon men se kis ko tumhare bapadadon ne naheen sataya , aur unhon ne us dharmee ke agaman ka poorvakal se sandesh denevalon ko mar dala , aur ab tum bhee usake pakadvanevale aur mar dalanevale hae .
44007053	tum ne svargadooton ke dara ttharai hui vyavastha to pai , parantu usaka palan naheen kiya . .
44007054	ye baten sunakar ve jal gaae aur us par dant peesane lage .
44007055	parantu us ne pavitra atma se paaripoorn hokar svarga kee or dekha aur parameshvar kee maahima ko aur yeesha ko parameshvar kee dahinee or khda dekhkara .
44007056	kaha dekho , maain svarga ko khula hua , aur manushy ke putra ko parameshvar ke dahinee or khda hua dekhta hoon .
44007057	tab unhon ne bade shabd se chillakar kan band kar lia , aur aek chitt hokar us par jhpatte .
44007058	aur use nagar ke bahar nikalakar patthravah karane lage , aur gavahon ne apane kapade utar rakhe .
44007059	aur ve staiufanus ko patthravah karate rahe , aur vah yah kahakar praarthna karata raha ki he prabhu yeesha , meree atma ko grahan kara .
44007060	fir ghauttne ttekakar unche shabd se pukara , he prabhu , yah pap un par mat laga , aur yah kahakar so gaya : aur shaaul usake badha meen sahamat tha . .
44008001	usee din yarooshalem kee kaleesiya par bada upadrav hone laga aur praeriton ko chhod sab ke sab yahoodiya aur samariya deshaen men tittr bittr ho gaae .
44008002	aur bhkton ne staifanus ko kabra men rakha aur usake liye bada vilap kiya .
44008003	shaaul kaleesiya ko ujad raha tha aur ghar ghar ghausakar purooshaen aur striayon ko ghaseett ghaseettkar bandeegrah men dalata tha . .
44008004	jo tittr bittr hae the , ve susamachar sunate hae fire .
44008005	aur filippus samaariya nagar men jakar logon men maseeh ka prachar karane laga .
44008006	aur jo baten filippus ne kaheen unhen logon ne sunakar aur jo chinh vah dikhata tha unhen dekh dekhkar , aek chitt hokar man lagaya .
44008007	kyonaki bahuton men se ashauddh atmaen bade shabd se chillatee hui nikal gai , aur bahut se jhole ke mare hae aur langade bhee achchhe kiae gaae .
44008008	aur us nagar men bada anand hua . .
44008009	is se paahile us nagar men shamaun nam aek manushy tha , jo ttona karake samaariya ke logon ko chakit karata aur apane ap ko koi bada puroosh banata than
44008010	aur sab chhotte se bade tak use man kar kahate the , ki yah manushy paramashevar kee vah shaktai haai , jo mahan kahalatee haai .
44008011	us ne bahut dinon se unhen apane ttone ke kamon se chaakit kar rakha tha , isee liye ve us ko bahut manate the .
44008012	parantu jab unhon ne filippus kee prateeati kee jo parameshvar ke rajy aur yeesha ke nam ka susamachar sunata tha to log , kya puroosha , kya sree bapaatisma lene lage .
44008013	tab shamaun ne ap bhee prateeati kee aur bapaatisma lekar filippus ke sath rahane laga aur chinh aur bade bade samarth ke kam hote dekhkar chakit hota tha .
44008014	jab praariton ne jo yarooshalem men the suna ki samaariyon ne parameshvar ka vachan man liya haai to pataras aur yoohanna ko un ke pas bheja .
44008015	aur unhon ne jakar un ke liye praarthna kee ki pavitra atma paen .
44008016	kyonaki vah ab tak un men se kisee par n utara tha , unhon ne to keval prabhu yeesha men nam men bapatisma liya tha .
44008017	tab unhon ne un par hath rakhe aur unhon ne pavitra atma paya .
44008018	jab shamaun ne dekha ki prariton ke hath rakhne se paavitra atma diya jata haai , to un ke pas roopaye lakar kaha .
44008019	ki yah adhaikar mujhe bhee do , ki jis kisee par hath rakoo , vah pavitra atma pae .
44008020	pataras ne us se kaha tere roopaye tere sath nash ho , kyonki too ne parameshvar ka dan roopayon se mol lene ka vichar kiya .
44008021	is bat men n tera hissa haai , n bantta kyonki tera man parameshvar ke age seedha naheen .
44008022	isaliye apanee is burai se man firakar prabhu se praarthna kar , sambhv haai tere man ka vichar kshama kiya jae .
44008023	kyonaki maain dekhta hoo , ki too pitt kee see kadvahatt aur adharma ke bandhan men pada haai .
44008024	shamaun ne uttr diya , ki tum mere liye prabhu se praarthna karo ki jo baten tum ne kahee , un men se koi mujh par n a pade . .
44008025	so ve gavahee dekar aur prabhu ka vachan sunakar , yarooshalem ko lautt gaa , aur samariyon ke bahut gavon men susamachar sunate gaae . .
44008026	fir prabhu ke aek svargadoot ne filippus se kaha uttkar daakkhian kee or us marga par ja , jo yarooshalem se ajjah ko jata haai , aur jangal men haai .
44008027	vah uttkar chal diya , aur dekho , koosh desh ka aek manushy a raha tha jo khoja aur kooshaiyon kee ranee kandake ka mantraee aur khjanchee tha , aur bhjan karane ko yarooshalem aya tha .
44008028	aur vah apane rath par baaitta hua tha , aur yashaayah bhavishyadvkta kee pustak paddhta hua lautta ja raha tha .
44008029	tab atma ne filippus se kaha , nikatt jakar is rath ke sath ho le .
44008030	filippus ne us or daudkar use yashaayah bhavishyadvkta kee pustak paddhte hae suna , aur poochha , ki too jo paddh raha haai kya use samajhta bhee haai ?
44008031	us ne kaha , jab tak koi mujhe n samajhaae to maain kyanekar samajoon ? aur us ne filippus se binatee kee , ki chaddhkar mere pas baaitt .
44008032	paavitra shaasr ka jo adhyay vah paddh raha tha , vah yah tha ki vah bhed kee nain vadha hone ko pahunchaya gaya , aur jaaisa memna apane un kataranevalon ke samhane chupachap rahata haai , vaaise hee us ne bhee apana munh n khola .
44008033	us kee deenata men usaka nyay hone naheen paya , aur usake samay ke logon ka varnn kaun karega , kyonki prathvee se usaka praan uttaya jata haai .
44008034	is par khoje ne filippus se poochha maain tujh se binatee karata hoo , yah bata ki bhvishyadvkta yah kis vishay men kahata haai , apane ya kisee doosare ke vishay men .
44008035	tab filippus ne apana munh khola , aur isee shaasr se arambh karake use yeesha ka susamachar sunaya .
44008036	marga men chalate chalate ve kisee jal kee jagah pahunche , tab khoje ne kaha , dekh yahan jal haai , ab mujhe bapaatisma lene men kya rok haai .
44008037	filippus ne kaha , yaadi too sare man se vishvas karata haai to ho sakata haai : us ne uttr diya maain vishvas karata hoon ki yeesha maseeh parameshvar ka putra haai .
44008038	tab us ne rath khda karane kee agyaa dee , aur filippus aur khoja donon jal men utar pade , aur us ne use bapaatisma diya .
44008039	jab ve jal men se nikalakar upar a , to prabhu ka atma filippus ko utta le gaya , so khoje ne use fir n dekha , aur vah anand karata hua apane marga chala gaya .
44008040	aur filippus ashadod men a nikala , aur jab tak kaaisariya men n pahuncha , tab tak nagar nagar susamachar sunata gaya . .
44009001	aur shaaul jo ab tak prabhu ke chelon ko dhamakane aur ghaat karane kee dhaun men tha , mahayajak ke pas gaya .
44009002	aur us se daamishk kee aradhanalayon ke nam par is abhaipraay kee chitthiyan mangee , ki kya puroosha , kya sre , jinhen vah is panth par pae unhen bandhakar yarooshalem men le ae .
44009003	parantu chalate chalate jab vah damishk ke nikatt pahuncha , to aekaek akash se usake charon or jyoti chamakee .
44009004	aur vah boomi par gir pada , aur yah shabd suna , ki he shaaul , he shaaul , too mujhe kyon satata haai ?
44009005	us ne poochha he prabhu , too kaun haai ? us ne kaha maain yeesha hoon jise too satata haai .
44009006	parantu ab uttkar nagar men ja , aur jo kuchh karana haai , vah tujh se kaha jaega .
44009007	jo manushy usake sath the , ve chupachap rah gaae kyonki shabd to sunate the , parantu kisee ko dakhte n the .
44009008	tab shaaul boomi par se utta , parantu jab ankhe kholeen to use kuchh dikhai n diya aur ve usaka hath pakadke daamishk men le gaae .
44009009	aur vah teen din tak n dekh saka , aur n khaya aur n peeya .
44009010	daamishk men hananyah nam aek chela tha , us se prabhu ne darshan men kaha , he hananyaha ! us ne kaha han prabhu .
44009011	tab prabhu ne us se kaha , uttkar us galee men ja jo seedhaee kahalatee haai , aur yahooda ke ghar men shaaul nam aek tarasee ko poochh le kyonaki dek , vah praarthna kar raha haai .
44009012	aur us ne hananyah nam aek puroosh ko bheetar ate , aur apane upar ate dekha haai taaki fir se drashtti pae .
44009013	hananyah ne uttr diya , ki he prabhu , maain ne is manushy ke vishay men bahuton se suna haai , ki is ne yarooshalem men tere pavitra logon ke sath badee badee buraiyan kee haain .
44009014	aur yahan bhee is ko mahayajakon kee or se adhaikar mila haai , ki jo log tera nam lete haai , un sab ko bandha le .
44009015	parantu prabhu ne us se kaha , ki too chala ja kyonaki yah , to anyajatiyon aur rajao , aur israaeliyon ke samhane mera nam pragatt karane ke liye mera chuna hua patra haai .
44009016	aur maain use bataunga , ki mere nam ke liye use kaaisa kaaisa dukh uttana padega .
44009017	tab hananyah uttkar us ghar men gaya , aur us par apana hath rakhkar kaha , he bhai shaaul , prabhu , arthata yeesha , jo us raste me , jis se too aya tujhe dikhai diya tha , usee ne mujhe bheja haai , ki too fir drashtti pae aur pavitra atma se paaripoorn ho jae .
44009018	aur turant us kee ankhon se chhlaike se gire , aur vah dekhne laga aur uttkar bapaatisma liya fir bhojan karake bal paya . .
44009019	aur vah kai din un chelon ke sath raha jo damishk men the .
44009020	aur vah turant aradhanalayon men yeesha ka prachar karane laga , ki vah parameshvar ka putra haai .
44009021	aur sab sunanevale chaakit hokar kahane lage kya yah vahee vyaaktai naheen haai jo yarooshalem men unhen jo is nam ko lete the nash karata tha , aur yahan bhee isee liye aya tha , ki unhon bandhakar mahayajakon ke pas le ae ?
44009022	parantu shaaul aur bhee samarthee hota gaya , aur is bat ka praman de dekar ki maseeh yahee haai , daamishk ke rahanevale yahoodiyon ka munh band karata raha . .
44009023	jab bahut din beet gaa , to yahoodiyon ne milakar usake mar dalane kee yuktai nikalee .
44009024	parantu un kee yuktai shaaul ko maloom ko gai : ve to usake mar dalane ke liye rat din faattkon par lage rahe the .
44009025	parantu rat ko usake chelon ne use lekar ttokare men baaittaya , aur shaharapanah par aee lattkakar utar diya . .
44009026	yarooshalem men pahunchakar us ne chelon ke sath mil jane ka upay kiya : parantu sab us se drate the , kyonki un ko prateeati n hota tha , ki vah bhee chela haai .
44009027	parantu baranaba use apane sath praeariton ke pas le jakar un se kaha , ki is ne kis reeti se marga men prabhu ko dekha , aur is ne is se baten keen fir damishk men is ne kaaise hiyav se yeesha ke nam ka prachar kiya .
44009028	vah un ke sath yarooshalem men ata jata raha .
44009029	aur nidhadk hokar prabhu ke nam se prachar karata tha : aur yoonanee bhasha bolanevale yahoodiyon ke sath batacheet aur vada-avivad karata tha parant uve usake mar dalane ka yatn karane lage .
44009030	yah janakar bhai use kaaisaariya men le a , aur tarasus ko bhej diya . .
44009031	so sare yahoodiya , aur galeel , aur samariya men kaleesiya ko chaain mila , aur usakee unnaati hotee gai aur vah prabhu ke bhy aur paavitra atma kee shaantai men chalatee aur baddhtee jatee thee . .
44009032	aur aeesa hua ki pataras har jagah firata hua , un paavitra logon ke pas bhee pahuncha , jo lua men rahate the .
44009033	vahan use aeeaniyas nam jhole ka mara hua aek manushy mila , jo att varsha se khatt par pada tha .
44009034	pataras ne us se kaha he aeeniyasa ! yeesha maseeh tujhe changa karata haai ut , apana bichhauna bichha tab vah turant utt khd hua .
44009035	aur lua aur shaaron ke sab rahanevale use dekhkar prabhu kee or fire . .
44009036	yafaa men tabeeta arthata dorakas nam aek vishvasinee rahatee thee , vah bahutere bhle bhle kam aur dan kiya karatee thee .
44009037	unheen dinon men vah beemar hokar mar gai aur unhon ne use nahalakar attaree par rakh diya .
44009038	aur isaliye ki lua yafaa ke nikatt tha , chelon ne yah sunakar ki pataras vahan haai do manushy bhejakar us ne binatee kee ki hamare pas ane men der n kara .
44009039	tab pataras uttkar un ke sath ho liya , aur jab pahunch gaya , to ve use us attaree par le gaae aur sab vidhavaen rotee hui usake pas a khdee hui : aur jo kurate aur kapade dorakas ne un ke sath rahate hae banae the , dikhane lageen .
44009040	tab pataras ne sab ko bahar kar diya , aur ghauttne ttekakar praarthna kee aur loth kee or dekhkar kaha he tabeeta utt : tab us ne apanee ankhe khol dee aur pataras ko dekhkar utt baaittee .
44009041	us ne hath dekar use uttaya aur paavitra logon aur vidhavaon ko bulakar use jeevit aur jagrat dikha diya .
44009042	yah bat sare yafaa me faail gai : aur bahuteron ne prabhu par vishvas kiya .
44009043	aur pataras yafaa men shamaun nam kisee chamade ke dhandha karanevale ke yahan bahut din tak raha . .
44010001	kaaisaariya men kuranealiyus nam aeek manushy tha , jo italiyanee nam palattn ka soobedar tha .
44010002	vah bhkt tha , aur apane sare gharane samet parameshvar se drata tha , aur yahoodee lagon ko bahut dan deta , aur barabar parameshvar se praarthna karata tha .
44010003	us ne din ke teesare pahar ke nikatt darshan men spashtt roop se dekha , ki parameshvar ka aek svargadoot mere pas bheetar akar kahata haai ki he kuraneliyusa .
44010004	us ne use dhyan se dekha aur drakar kaha he prabhu kya haai ? us ne us se kaha , teree praarthnaen aur tere dan smaran ke liye parameshvar ke samhane pahunche haain .
44010005	aur ab yafaa men manushy bhejakar shamaun ko , jo pataras kahalata haai , bulava le .
44010006	vah shamaun chamade ke dhandha karanevale ke yahan pahun haai , jis ka ghar samudra ke kinare haain .
44010007	jab vah svargadoot jis ne us se baten kee theen chala gaya , to us ne do sevak , aur jo usake pas upasthiat raha karate the un men se aek bhkt sipahee ko bulaya .
44010008	aur unhen sab baten batakar yafaa ko bheja . .
44010009	doosare din , jab ve chalate chalate nagar ke pas pahunche , to do pahar ke nikatt pataras kotte par praarthna karane chaddha .
44010010	aur use bookh lagee , aur kuchh khana chahata tha parantu jab ve taaiyar kar rahe the , to vah besudha ho gaya .
44010011	aur us ne dekha , ki akash khul gaya aur aek patra badee chadar ke saman charon konon se lattkata hua , pathvee kee or utar raha haai .
44010012	jis men prathvee ke sab prakar ke chaupae aur renganevale jantu aur akash ke pakshaee the .
44010013	aur use aek aeesa shabd sunai diya , ki he pataras ut , mar ke kha .
44010014	parantu pataras ne kaha , naheen prabhu , kadapi naheen kyonki maain ne kabhee koi apavitra ya ashauddh vastu naheen khai haai .
44010015	fir doosaree bar use shabd sunai diya , ki jo kuchh parameshvar ne shauddh ttharaya haai , use too ashauddh mat kaha .
44010016	teen bar aeesa hee hua tab turant vah patra akash par utta liya gaya . .
44010017	jab pataras apane man men dubadha kar raha tha , ki yah darshan jo maain ne dekha kya haai , to dekho , ve manushy jinhen kuraneliyus ne bheja tha , shamaun ke ghar ka pata lagakar devaddhee par a khde hae .
44010018	aur pukarakar poochhne lage , kya shamaun jo pataras kahalata haai , yaheen pahun haai ?
44010019	pataras jo us darshan par soch hee raha tha , ki atma ne us se kaha , dek , teen manushy teree khoj men haain .
44010020	so uttkar neeche ja , aur bekhttke un ke sath ho le kyonaki maain hee ne unhen bheja haai .
44010021	tab pataras ne utarakar un manushyon se kaha dekho , jisakee khoj tum kar rahe ho , vah maain hee hoon tumhare ane ka kya karan haai ?
44010022	unhon ne kaha kuraneliyus soobedar jo dharmee aur parameshvar se dranevala aur saree yahoodee jaati men sunamee manushy haai , us ne aek paavitra svargadoot se yah chitavanee pai haai , ki tujhe apane ghar bulakar tujh se vachan sune .
44010023	tab us ne unhen bheetar bulakar un kee pahunai kee . . aur doosare din , vah unake sath gaya aur yafaa ke bhaiyon men se kai usake sath ho liae .
44010024	doosare din ve kaaisariya men pahunche , aur kuraneliyus apane kuttumbaiyon aur piry mitraen ko ikatthe karake un kee batt joh raha tha .
44010025	jab pataras bheetar a raha tha , to kuranealiyus ne us se bhentt kee , aur panvon padke pranam kiya .
44010026	parantu pataras ne use uttakar kaha , khda ho , maain bhee to manushy hoon .
44010027	aur usake sath batacheet karata hua bheetar gaya , aur bahut se logon ko ikatthe dekhkara .
44010028	un se kaha , tum janate ho , ki anyajaati kee sangati karata ya usake yahan jana yahoodee ke liye adharma haai , parantu parameshvar ne mujhe bataya haai , ki kisee manushy ko apavitra ya ashauddh n kahoon .
44010029	isee liye maain jab bulaya gaya to bina kuchh kahe chala aya : ab maain poochhta hoon ki mujhe kis kam ke liye bulaya gaya haai ?
44010030	kuranealiyus ne kaha ki is ghadee poore char din ha , ki maain apane ghar men teesare pahar ko praarthna kar raha tha ki dekho , aek puroosh chamakeela vasr pahine ha , mere samhane a khda hua .
44010031	aur kahane laga , he kuraneliyus , teree praarthna sun lee gai , aur tere dan parameshvar ke samhane smaran kiae gaae haain .
44010032	is liye kisee ko yafaa bhejakar shamaun ko jo pataras kahalata haai , bula vah samudra ke kinare shamaun chamade ke dhandha karanevale ke ghar men pahun haai .
44010033	tab maain ne turant tere pas log bheje , aur too ne bhla kiya , jo a gaya : ab ham sab yahan parameshvar ke samhane haai , taki jo kuchh parameshvar ne tujh se kaha haai use sunen .
44010034	tab pataras ne munh kholakar kaha
44010035	ab mujhe nishchay hua , ki parameshvar kisee ka paksha naheen karata , baran har jati men jo us se drata aur dharma ke kam karata haai , vah use bhata haai .
44010036	jo vachan us ne israaeliyon ke pas bheja , jab ki us ne yeesha maseeh ke dara jo sab ka prabhu haai shaantai ka susamachar sunaya .
44010037	vah bat tum janate ho jo yoohanna ke bapatisma ke prachar ke bad galeel se arambh karake sare yahoodiya men faail gai .
44010038	ki parameshvar ne kis reeti se yeesha nasaree ko paavitra atma aur samarth se aabhaishok kiya : vah bhlai karata , aur sab ko jo shautan ke satae hae the , achchha karata fira kyonaki parameshvar usake sath tha .
44010039	aur ham un sab kamon ke gavah haain jo us ne yahoodiya ke desh aur yarooshalem men bhee kia , aur unhon ne use katt par lattkakar mar dala .
44010040	us ko parameshvar ne teesare din jilaya , aur pragatt bhee kar diya haai .
44010041	sab logon ko naheen baran un gavahon ko jinhen parameshvar ne pahile se chun liya tha , arthata hamako jinhon ne usake mare huon men se jee uttne ke bad usake sath khaya peeya .
44010042	aur us ne hamen agyaa dee , ki logon men prachar karo aur gavahee do , ki yah vahee haai jise parameshvar ne jeevaton aur mare huon ka nyayee ttharaya haai .
44010043	us kee sab bhavishyadvkta gavahee dete he , ki jo koi us par vishvas karega , us ko usake nam ke dara papon kee kshama milegee . .
44010044	pataras ye baten kah hee raha tha , ki pavitra atma vachan ke sab sunanevalon par utar aya .
44010045	aur jitane khtana kiae hae vishvasee pataras ke sath ae the , ve sab chakit hae ki anyajaatiyon par bhee paavitra atma ka dan undela gaya haai .
44010046	kyonaki unhon ne unhen bhanati bhanati kee bhasha bolate aur parameshvar kee badai karate suna .
44010047	is par pataras ne kaha kya koi jal kee rok kar sakata haai , ki ye bapaatisma n pae , jinhon ne hamaree nai paavitra atma paya haai ?
44010048	aur us ne agyaa dee ki unhen yeesha maseeh ne nam men bapaatisma diya jae : tab unhon ne us se binatee kee ki kuchh din hamare sath raha . .
44011001	aur praeriton aur bhaiyon ne jo yahoodiya men the suna , ki anyajaatiyon ne bhee parameshvar ka vachan man liya haai .

44011003	ki too ne khtanaraahit logon ke yahan jakar un se sath khaya .
44011004	tab pataras ne unhen arambh se kramanusar kah sunaya
44011005	ki maain yafaa nagar men praarthna kar raha tha , aur besudha hokar aek darshan dekha , ki aek patra , badee chadar ke saman charon konon se lattkaya hua , akash se utarakar mere pas aya .

44011009	is ke uttr men akash se doosaree bar shabd hua , ki jo kuchh parameshvar ne shauddh ttharaya haai , use ashauddh mat kaha .
44011010	teen bar aeesa hee hua tab sab kuchh fir akash par kheench liya gaya .
44011011	aur dekho , turant teen manushy jo kaaisariya se mere pas bheje gaae the , us ghar par jis men ham the , a khde hae .
44011012	tab atma ne mujh se un ke sath bekhttke ho lene ko kaha , aur ye chh : bhai bhee mere sath ho liae aur ham us manushy ke ghar men gaae .
44011013	aur us ne bataya , ki maain ne aek svargadoot ko apane ghar men khda dekha , jis ne mujh se kaha , ki yafaa men manushy bhejakar shamaun ko jo pataras kahalata haai , bulava le .

44011016	tab mujhe prabhu ka vah vachan smaran aya jo us ne kaha ki yoohanna ne to panee se bapatisma diya , parantu tum pavitra atma se bapatisma paoge .
44011017	so jab ki parameshvar ne unhen bhee vahee dan diya , jo hamen prabhu yeesha maseeh par vishvas karane se mila tha to maain kaun tha jo parameshvar ko rok sakata ?
44011018	yah sunakar , ve chup rahe , aur parameshvar kee badai karake kahane lage , tak to parameshvar ne anyajatiyon ko bhee jeevan ke liye man firav ka dan diya haai . .
44011019	so jo log us klesh ke mare jo staifanus ke karan pada tha , tittr bittr ho gaae the , ve firate firate faeeneeke aur kupraus aur antakiya men pahunche parantu yahoodiyon ko chhod kisee aur ko vachan n sunate the .

44011022	tab un kee charcha yarooshalem kee kaleesiya ke sunane men ai , aur unhon ne baranabas ko antaakiya bheja .

44012001	us samay herodes raja ne kaleesiya ke kai aek vyaaktaiyon ko dukh dene ke liye un par hath dale .
44012002	us ne yoohanna ke bhai yakoob ko talavar se marava dala .

44012005	so bandeegrah men pataras kee rakhvalee ho rahee thee parantu kaleesiya usake liye lau lagakar parameshvar se praarthna kar rahee thee .
44012006	aur jab herodes use un ke samhane lane ko tha , to usee rat pataras do janjeeron se bandha hua , do sipaahiyon ke beech men so raha tha : aur paharooae dar par bandeegrah kee rakhvalee kar rahe the .
44012007	to dekho , prabhu ka aek svargadoot a khda hua : aur us kottree men jyoti chamakee : aur us ne pataras kee pasalee par hath mar ke use jagaya , aur kaha ut , fauratee kar , aur usake hath se janjeeren khulakar gir padeen .
44012008	tab svargadoot ne us se kaha kamar bandha , aur apane joote paahin le : us ne vaaisa hee kiya , fir us ne us se kaha apana vasr pahinakar mere peechhe ho le .
44012009	vah nikalakar usake peechhe ho liya parantu yah n janata tha , ki jo kuchh svargadoot kar raha haai , vah sachamuch haai , baran yah samajha , ki maain darshan dekh raha hoon .
44012010	tab ve paahil aur doosare pahare se nikalakar us lohe ke faattk par pahunche , jo nagar kee or haai vah un ke liye ap se ap khul gaya : aur ve nikalakar aek hee galee hokar gaa , itane men srvagadoot use chhodkar chala gaya .
44012011	tab pataras ne sachet hokar kaha ab maain ne sach jan liya ki prabhu ne apana svargadoot bhejakar mujhe herodes ke hath se chhuda liya , aur yahoodiyon kee saree asha tod dee .
44012012	aur yah sochakar , vah us yoohanna kee mata maariyam ke ghar aya , jo marakus kahalata haai vahan bahut log ikatthe hokar praarthna kar rahe the .

44012017	tab us ne unhen hath se saain kiya , ki chup rahen aur un ko bataya , ki prabhu kis reeti se mujhe bandeegrah se nikal laya haai : fir kaha , ki yakoob aur bhaiyon ko yah bat kah dena tab nikalakar doosaree jagah chala gaya .
44012018	bhor ko sipaahiyon men badee halachal hone lagee , ki pataras kya hua .
44012019	jab herodes ne us kee khoj kee , aur n paya to paharooon kee janch karake agyaa dee ki ve mar dale jaen aur vah yahoodiya ko chhodkar kaaisaariya men ja raha .
44012020	aur vah soor aur saaida ke logon se bahut aprasann tha so ve aek chitt hokar usake pas ae aur balastus ko , jo raja ka aek karmacharee tha , manakar mel karata chaha kyonki raja ke desh se un ke desh ka palan poshan hota tha .
44012021	aur ttharae hae din herodes rajavasr paahinakar sinhasan par baaitta aur un ko vyakhyan dene laga .

44013001	antaakiya kee kaleesiya men kitane bhvishyadvkta aur upadeshak the arthata baranabas aur shamaun jo neegar kahalata haai aur lookiyus kurenee , aur desh kee chauthai ke raja herodes ka doodhabhai manahem aur shaaula .
44013002	jab ve upavas saahit prabhu kee upasana kar rahe tha , to paavitra atma ne kaha mere nimitt baranabas aur shaaul ko us kam ke liye alag karo jis ke liye maain ne unhen bulaya haai .
44013003	tab unhon ne upavas aur praarthna karake aur un par hath rakhkar unhen vida kiya . .

44013010	he sare kapatt aur sab chaturai se bhre hae shautan kee santan , sakal dharma ke baairee , kya too prabhu ke seedho magorn ko tteddha karana n chhodega ?
44013011	ab dek , prabhu ka hath tujh par laga haai aur too kuchh samay tak andha rahega aur soorya ko n dekhega : tab turant dhaundhalai aur andhora us par chha gaya , aur vah idhar udhar ttttolane laga , taki koi usaka hath pakadke le chale .

44013018	aur vah koi chalees varsha tak jangal men un kee sahata raha .

44013025	aur jab yoohanna apana daur poora karane par tha , to us ne kaha , tum mujhe kya samajhte ho ? maain vah naheen ! baran dekho , mere bad aek anevala haai , jis ke panvon kee jootee maain kholane ke yogy naheen .
44013026	he bhaiyo , tum jo ibraaheem kee santan ho aur tum jo parameshvar se drate ho , tumhare pas is uddhar ka vachan bheja gaya haai .
44013027	kyonaki yarooshalem ke rahanevalon aur unake saradaron ne , n use pahachana , aur n bhvishyadvktaon kee baten samajhee jo har sabt ke din paddhee jatee haai , isaaliye use doshaee ttharakar un ko poora kiya .
44013028	unhon ne mar dalane ke yogy koi dosh us men ne paya , taubhee peelatus se binatee kee , ki vah mar dala jae .

44013033	ki parameshvar ne yeesha ko jilakar , vahee pratigyaa hamaree santan ke liye pooree kee , jaaisa doosare bhjan men bhee likha haai , ki too mera putra haai aj maain hee ne tujhe janmaya haai .
44013034	aur usake is reeati se mare huon men se jilane ke vishay men bhee , ki vah kabhee n sade , us ne yon kaha haai ki maain daud par kee pavitra aur achal krapa tum par karoonga .
44013035	isaliye us ne aek aur bhjan men bhee kaha haai ki too apane pavitra jan ko sadne n dega .
44013036	kyonaki daud to parameshvar kee ichchha ke anusar apane samay men seva karake so gaya aur apane bapadadon men ja mila aur sad bhee gaya .
44013037	parantu jis ko parameshvar ne jilaya , vah sadne naheen paya .
44013038	isaliye , he bhaiyo tum jan lo ki isee ke dara papon kee kshama ka samachar tumhen diya jata haai .
44013039	aur jin baton se tum moosa kee vyavastha ke dara nirdosh naheen tthar sakate the , unheen sab se har aek vishvas karanevala usake dara nirdosh ttharata haai .
44013040	isaliye chaukas raho , aeesa n ho , ki jo bhvishyadvktaon kee pustak men aya haai ,

44021023	isaliye jo ham tujh se kahate haai , vah kara : hamare yahan char manushy haai , jinhon ne mannat manee haai .
44021024	unhen lekar us ke sath apane ap ko shauddh kara aur un ke liye khrcha de , ki ve sir mudaaen : tab sab jan lege , ki jo baten unhen tere vishay men sikhai gai , un kee kuchh jad naheen haai parantu too ap bhee vyavastha ko manakar usake anusar chalata haai .
44021025	parantu un anyajaatiyon ke vishay men jinhon ne vishvas kiya haai , ham ne yah nirny karake likh bheja haai ki ve maraton ke samhane baali kiae hae mans se , aur lohoo se , aur gala ghaentte huon ke mans se , aur vyaabhaichar se , bache rahen .
44021026	tab paulus un manushyon ko lekar , aur doosare din un ke sath shauddh hokar mandair men gaya , aur bata diya , ki shauddh hone ke din , arthata un men se har aek ke liye chaddhava chaddhaae jane tak ke din kab poore honge . .
44021027	jab ve sat din poore hone par the , to aasiya ke yahoodiyon ne paulus ko mandair men dekhkar sab logon ko usakaya , aur yon chillaakar us ko pakad liya .
44021028	ki he israaeliyo , sahayata karo yah vahee manushy haai , jo logon ke , aur vyavastha ke , aur is sthan ke virodha men har jagah sab logon ko sikhata haai , yahan tak ki yunaaniyon ko bhee maandair men lakar us ne is paavitra sthan ko apaavitra kiya haai .
44021029	unhon ne to is se paahile traufimus iafisee ko usake sath nagar men dekha tha , aur samajhte the , ki paulus use mandair men le aya haai .
44021030	tab sare nagar men kolahal mach gaya , aur log daudkar ikatthe ha , aur paulus ko pakadkar maandair ke bahar ghaseett la , aur turant dar band kiae gaae .
44021031	jab ve usake mar dalata chahate the , to palattn ke saradar ko sandesh pahuncha ki sare yarooshalem men kolahal mach raha haai .
44021032	tab vah turant sipaahiyon aur soobedaron ko lekar un ke pas neeche daud aya aur unhon ne palattn ke saradar ko aur sipaahiyon ko dekh kar paaailus ko marane peettne se hath uttaya .
44021033	tab palattn ke saradar ne pas akar use pakad liya aur do janjeeron se bandhane kee agyaa dekar poochhne laga , yah kaun haai , aur is ne kya kiya haai ?
44021034	parantu bheed men se koi kuchh aur koi kuchh chillate rahe aur jab hullad ke mare tteek sachchai n jan saka , to use gaddh men le jane kee agyaa dee .
44021035	jab vah seeddhee par pahuncha , to aeesa hua , ki bheed ke dabav ke mare sipaahiyen ko use uttakar le jana pada .
44021036	kyonaki logon kee bheed yah chillatee hui usake peechhe padee , ki usaka ant kar do . .
44021037	jab ve paulus ko gaddh men le jane par the , to us ne palattn ke saradar se kaha kya mujhe agyaa haai ki maain tujh se kuchh kahoon ? us ne kaha kya too yoonanee janata haai ?
44021038	kya too vah misaree nahee , jo in dinon se paahile balavai banakar char hajar kattaraband logon ko jangal men le gaya ?
44021039	paulus ne kaha , maain to tarasus ka yahoodee manushy hoon ! kilikiya ke praasiddh nagar ka nivasee hoon : aur maain tujh se binatee karata hoo , ki mujhe logon se baten karane de .
44021040	jab us ne agyaa dee , to paulus ne seeddhee par khde hokar logon ko hath se saain kiya : jab ve chup ho gaa , to vah ibraanee bhasha men bolane laga , ki ,
44022001	he bhaiyo , aur pitaro , mera pratyuttr suno , jo maain ab tumhare samhane kahata hoon . .
44022002	ve yah sunakar ki vah ham se ibraanee bhasha men bolata haai , aur bhee chup rahe . tab us ne kaha
44022003	maain to yahoodee manushy hoo , jo kilikiya ke tarasus men janma parantu is nagar men gamalael ke panvon ke pas baaittkar paddhaya gaya , aur bapadadon kee vyavastha kee tteek reeti par sikhaya gaya aur parameshvar ke liye aeesee dhaun lagae tha , jaaise tum sab aj lagae ho .
44022004	aur maain ne puroosh aur sree donon ko bandha bandhakar , aur bandeegrah men dal dalakar , is panth ko yahan tak sataya , ki unhen marava bhee dala .
44022005	is bat ke liye mahayajak aur sab puraaniye gavah haain ki un men se maain bhaiyon ke nam par chitthiyan lekar damishk ko chala ja raha tha , ki jo vahan hon unhen bhee dand dilane ke liye bandhakar yarooshalem men laun .
44022006	jab maain chalate chalate damishk ke nikatt pahuncha , to aeesa hua ki do pahar ke lagabhg aekaek aek badee jyoti akash se mere charon or chamakee .
44022007	aur maain boomi par gir pada : aur yah shabd suna , ki he shaaul , he shaaul , too mujhe kyon satata haai ? maain ne uttr diya , ki he prabhu , too kaun haai ?
44022008	us ne mujh se kaha maain yeesha nasaree hoo , jis too satata haai ?
44022009	aur mere sathaiyon ne jyoti to dekhee , parantu jo mujh se bolata tha usaka shabd n suna .
44022010	tab maai . ne kaha he prabhu maain kya karoon ? prabhu ne mujh se kaha uttkar damishk men ja , aur jo kud tere karane ke liye ttharaya gaya haai vahan tujh se sab kah diya jaega .
44022011	jab us jyoti ke tej ke mare mujhe kuchh dikhai n diya , to maain apane sathaiyon ke hath pakade hae damishk men aya .
44022012	aur hananyah nam ka vyavastha ke anusar aek bhkt manushy , jo vahan ke rahanevale sab yahoodiyon men sunam tha , mere pas aya .
44022013	aur khda hokar mujh se kaha he bhai shaaul fir dekhne laga : usee ghadee mere netra khul gaae aur maain ne use dekha .
44022014	tab us ne kaha hamare bapadadon ke parameshvar ne tujhe isaaliye ttharaya haai , ki too us kee ichchha ko jane , aur us dharmee ko dekhe , aur usake munh se baten sune .
44022015	kyonaki too us kee or se sab manushyon ke samhane un baton ka gavah hoga , jo too ne dekhee aur sunee haain .
44022016	ab kyon der karata haai ? ut , bapaatisma le , aur usaka nam lekar apane papon ko dhae dala .
44022017	jab maain fir yarooshalem men akar mandair men praarthna kar raha tha , to besudha ho gaya .
44022018	aur us ne dekha ki mujh se kahata haai jaldee karake yarooshalem se jhtt nikal ja : kyonaki ve mere vishay men teree gavahee n manenge .
44022019	maain ne kaha he prabhu ve to ap janate haai , ki maain tujh par vishvas karanevalon ko bandeegrah men dalata aur jagah jagah aradhanalay men pittvata tha .
44022020	aur jab tere gavah staifanus ka lohoo bahaya ja raha tha tab maain bhee vahan khda tha , aur is bat men sahamat tha , aur usake ghaatakon ke kapadon kee rakhvalee karata tha .
44022021	aur us ne mujh se kaha , chala ja : kyonaki maain tujhe anyajaatiyon ke pas door door bhejoonga . .
44022022	ve is bat tak us kee sunate rahe tab unche shabd se chilla , ki aeese manushy ka ant karo usaka jeeavit rahata uchit naheen .
44022023	jab ve chillate aur kapade faenkate aur akash men dhool udate the
44022024	to palattn ke soobedar ne kaha ki ise gaddh men le jao aur kode marakar jancho , ki maain janoon ki log kis karan usake virodha men aeesa chilla rahe haain .
44022025	jab unhon ne use tasamon se bandha to paulus ne us soobedar se jo pas khda tha kaha , kya yah uchit haai , ki tum aek romee manushy ko , aur vah bhee bina doshaee ttharae hae kode maro ?
44022026	soobedar ne yah sunakar palattn ke saradar ke pas jakar kaha too yah kya karata haai ? yah to ramee haai .
44022027	tab palattn ke saradar ne usake pas akar kaha mujhe bata , kya too romee haai ? us ne kaha , han .
44022028	yah sunakar palattn ke saradar ne kaha ki maain ne romee hone ka pad bahut roopaye dekar paya haai : paulus ne kaha , maain to janm se romee hoon .
44022029	tab jo log use janchane par the , ve turant usake pas se hatt gaae aur palattn ka saradar bhee yah janakar ki yah romee haai , aur maain ne use bandha haai , dr gaya . .
44022030	doosare din vah tteek tteek janane kee ichchha se ki yahoodee us par kyon dosh lagate haai , usake bandhan khol diae aur mahayajakon aur saree mahasabha ko ikatthe hone kee agyaa dee , aur paulus ko neeche le jakar un ke samhane khda kar diya . .
44023001	paulus ne mahasabha kee or ttkattkee lagakar dekha , aur kaha , he bhaiyo , maain ne aj tak parameshvar ke liye bilakul sachche vivek se jeevan bitaya .
44023002	hananyah mahayajak ne , un kee jo usake pas khde the , usake moonh par thppad marane kee agyaa dee .
44023003	tab paulus ne us se kaha he choona firee hui bheet , parameshvar tujhe marega : too vyavastha ke anusar mera nyay karane ko baaitta haai , aur fir kya vyavastha ke virooddh mujhe marane kee agyaa deta haai ?
44023004	jo pas khde the , unhon ne kaha , kya too parameshvar ke mahayajak ko bura kahata haai ?
44023005	paulus ne kaha he bhaiyo , maain naheen janata tha , ki yah mahayajak haai kyonki likha haai , ki apane logon ke pradhaan ko bura n kaha .
44023006	tab paulus ne yah janakar , ki kitane sadookee aur kitane fareesee haai , sabha men pukarakar kaha , he bhaiyo , maain fareesee aur fareesiyon ke vansh ka hoo , mare huon hee asha aur punarootthan ke vishay men mera mukama ho raha haai .
44023007	jab us ne yah bat kahee to fareeasiyon aur sadookiyon men jhgada hone laga aur sabha men foott pad gai .
44023008	kyonaki sadookee to yah kahate haai , ki n punarootthan haai , n svargadoot aur n atma haai parantu fareesee donon ko manate haain .
44023009	tab bada halla macha aur kitane shaasree jo fareeasiyon ke dal ke the , uttkar yon kahakar jhgadne lage , ki ham is manushy men kuchh burai naheen pate aur yadi koi atma ya svargadoot us se bola haai to fir kya ?
44023010	jab bahut jhgada hua , to palattn ke saradar ne is dr se ki ve paulus ke ttukade ttukade n kar dalen palattn ko agyaa dee , ki utarakar us ko un ke beech men se barabas nikalo , aur gaddh men le ao .
44023011	usee rat prabhu ne usake pas a khde hokar kaha he paulus , ddhaddhs bandha kyonki jaaisee too ne yarooshalem men meree gavahee dee , vaaisee hee tujhe rom men bhee gavahee denee hogee . .
44023012	jab din hua , to yahoodiyon ne aeka kiya , aur shapath khai ki jab tak ham paulus ko man n dale , tab tak khanae ya paen to ham par dhaikkara .
44023013	jinhon ne apas men yah shapath khai thee , ve chalees janon ke upar the .
44023014	unhon ne mahayajakon aur puraniyon ke pas akar kaha , ham ne yah ttana haai ki jab tak ham paulus ko mar n dale , tab tak yadi kuchh chakhen bhee , to ham par dhaikkar par dhaikkar haai .
44023015	isaliye ab mahasabha samet palattn ke saradar ko samajhao , ki use tumhare pas le a , mano ki tum usake vishay men aur bhee tteek janch karana chahate ho , aur ham usake pahunchane se pahile hee use mar dalane ke liye taaiyar rahenge .
44023016	aur paulus ke bhanje n suna , ki ve us kee ghaat men haai , to gaddh men jakar paulus ko sandesh diya .
44023017	paulus ne soobedaron men se aek ko apane pas bulakar kaha is javan ko palattn ke saradar ke pas le jao , yah us se kuchh kahana chahata haai .
44023018	so us ne usako palattn ke saradar ke pas le jakar kaha paulus bandhauae ne mujhe bulakar binatee kee , ki yah javan palattn ke saradar se kuchh kahana chahata haai use usake pas le ja .
44023019	palattn ke saradar ne usaka hath pakadkar , aur alag le jakar poochha mujh se kya kahana chahata haai ?
44023020	us ne kaha yahoodiyon ne aekasa kiya haai , ki tujh se binatee kare , ki kal paulus ko mahasabha men la , mano too aur tteek se us kee janch karana chahata haai .
44023021	parantu un kee mat manana , kyonki un men se chalees ke upar manushy us kee ghaat men haai , jinhon ne yah ttan liya haai , ki jab tak ham paulus ko man n dale , tab tak khaae , pae , to ham par dhaikkara aur abhee ve taaiyar haain aur tere vachan kee as dekh rahe haain .
44023022	tab palattn ke saradar ne javan ko yah agyaa dekar vida kiya , ki kisee se n kahana ki too ne mujh ko ye baten batai haain .
44023023	aur do soobedaron ko bulakar kaha do sau sipahee , sattr savar , aur do sau bhalaait , pahar rat beete kaaisariya ko jane ke liye taaiyar kar rakho .
44023024	aur paulus kee savaree ke liye ghaede taaiyar rakho ki use faeliks haakim ke pas kushal se pahuncha den .
44023025	us ne is prakar kee chitthee bhee likhee
44023026	mahapratapee faeliks haakim ko klauadiyus loosiyas ko namaskara
44023027	is manushy ke yahoodiyon ne pakadkar mar dalata chaha , parantu jab maain ne jana ki romee haai , to palattn lekar chhuda laya .
44023028	aur maain janana chahata tha , ki ve us par kis karan dosh lagate haai , isaaliye use un kee mahasabha men le gaya .
44023029	tab maain ne jan liya , ki ve apanee vyavastha ke vivadon ke vishay men us par dosh lagate haai , parantu mar dale jane ya bandho jane ke yogy us men koi dosh naheen .
44023030	aur jab mujhe bataya gaya , ki ve is manushy kee ghaat men lage haain to maain ne turant us ko tere pas bhej diya aur muiyon ko bhee agyaa dee , ki tere samhane us par nalish karen . .
44023031	so jaaise sipaahiyon ko agyaa dee gai thee vaaise hee paulus ko lekar raton-rat aantaipaatrais men lae .
44023032	doosare din ve savaron ko usake sath jane ke liye chhodkar ap gaddh ko lautte .
44023033	unhon ne kaaisaariya men pahunchakar haakim ko chitthee dee : aur paulus ko bhee usake samhane khda kiya .
44023034	us ne paddhkar poochha yah kis desh ka haai ?
44023035	aur jab jan liya ki kilaakiya ka haai to us se kaha jab tere mui bhee aege , to maain tera mukama karoonga : aur us ne use herodes ke kile me , pahare men rakhne kee agyaa dee . .
44024001	panch din ke bad hananyah mahayajak kai puraniyon aur tiratullus nam kisee vakeel ko sath lekar aya unhon ne hakim ke samhane paulus par nalish kee .
44024002	jab vah bulaya gaya to tiratullus un par dosh lagakar kahane laga , ki , he mahapratapee faeliks , tere dara hamen jo bada kushal hota haai aur tere prabandha se is jati ke liye kitanee buraiyan sudharatee jatee haain .
44024003	is ko ham har jagah aur har prakar se dhanyavad ke sath manate haain .
44024004	parantu isaaliye ki tujhe aur dukh naheen dena chahata , maain tujh se binatee karata hoo , ki krapa karake hamaree do aek baten sun le .
44024005	kyonaki ham ne is manushy ko upadravee aur jagat ke sare yahoodiyon men balava karanevala , aur nasariyon ke kupanth ka muakhaiya paya haai .
44024006	us ne maandair ko ashauddh karana chaha , aur ham ne use pakada .
44024007	in sab baton ko jin ke vishay men ham us par dosh lagate haai , too apahee us ko janch karake jan lega .
44024008	yahoodiyon ne bhee usaka sath dekar kaha , ye baten isee prakar kee haain . .
44024009	jab haakim ne paulus ko bolane ke liye saain kiya to us ne uttr diya , maain yah janakar ki too bahut vasharen se is jaati ka nyay karata haai , anand se apana pratyuttr deta hoon .
44024010	too ap jan sakata haai , ki jab se maain yarooshalem men bhjan karane ko aya , mujhe barah din se upar naheen hae .
44024011	aur unhon ne mujhe n maandair men n sabha ke gharon me , n nagar men kisee se vivad karate ya bheed lagate paya .
44024012	aur n to ve un baton ko , jin ka ve ab mujh par dosh lagate haai , tere samhane sach tthara sakate haain .
44024013	parantu yah maain tere samhane sach tthara sakate haain .
44024014	parantu yah maain tere samhane man leta hoo , ki jis panth ko ve kupanth kahate haai , usee kee reeati par maain apane bapadadon ke parameshvar kee seva karata hoon : aur jo baten vyavastha aur bhvishyadvktaon kee pustakon men likhee haai , un sab kee prateeati karata hoon .
44024015	aur parameshvar se asha rakhta hoon jo ve ap bhee rakhte haai , ki dharmee aur adharmee donon ka jee uttna hoga .
44024016	is se maain ap bhee yatan karata hoo , ki parameshvar kee , aur manushyon kee or mera vivek sada nirdosh rahe .
44024017	bahut vasharen ke bad maain apane logon ko dan pahunchane , aur bhentt chaddhane aya tha .
44024018	unhon ne mujhe mandair me , shauddh dasha men bina bheed ke sat , aur bina danga karate hae is kam men paya - han aasiya ke kai yahoodee the - un ko uchit tha ,
44024019	ki yadi mere virodha men un kee koi bat ho to yahan tere samhane akar mujh par dosh lagate .
44024020	ya ye ap hee kahe , ki jab maain mahasabha ke samhane khda tha , to unhon ne mujh se kaun sa aparadha paya ?
44024021	is aek bat ko chhod jo maain ne un ke beech men khde hokar pukarakar kaha tha , ki mare huon ke jee uttne ke vishay men aj mera tumhare samhane mukama ho raha haai . .
44024022	faeliks ne jo is panth kee baten tteek tteek janata tha , unhen yah kahakar ttal diya , ki jab palattn ka saradar loosiyas aega , to tumharee bat ka nirny karoonga .
44024023	aur soobedar ko agyaa dee , ki paulus ko sukh se rakhkar rakhvalee karana , aur usake mitraen men se kisee ko bhee us kee seva karane se n rokana . .
44024024	kitane dinon ke bad faeliks apanee patnee drausilla ko , jo yahoodinee thee , sath lekar aya aur paulus ko bulavakar us vishvas ke vishay men je maseeh yeesha par haai , us se suna .
44024025	aur jab vah dharma aur sanyam aur anevale nyay kee charcha karata tha , to faeliks ne bhyaman hokar uttr diya , ki abhee to ja : avasar pakar maain tujhe fir bulaunga .
44024026	use paulus se kuchh roopaye milane kee bhee as thee isaaliye aur bhee bula bulakar us se baten kiya karata tha .
44024027	parantu jab do varsha beet gaa , to puraakiyus faestus faeliks kee jagah par aya , aur faeliks yahoodiyon ko khush karane kee ichchha se paulus ko bandhaua chhod gaya . .
44025001	faestus un praant men pahunchakar teen din ke bar kaaisariya se yarooshalem ko gaya .
44025002	tab mahayajakon ne , aur yahoodiyon ke bade logon ne , usake samhane paulus kee nalish kee .
44025003	aur use se binatee karake usake virodha men yah bar chaha , ki vah use yarooshalem men bulava , kyonaki ve use raste hee men mar dalane kee ghaat lagae hae the .
44025004	faestus ne uttr diya , ki paulus kaaisaariya men pahare men haai , aur maain ap jald vahan aunga .
44025005	fir kaha , tum se jo aadhaikar rakhte haai , ve sath chale , aur yadi is manushy ne kuchh anuachit kam kiya haai , to us par dosh lagaen . .
44025006	aur un ke beech koi att das din rahakar vah kaaisariya gaya : aur doosare din nyay asan par baaittkar paulus ke lane kee agyaa dee .
44025007	jab vah aya , to jo yahoodee yarooshalem se ae the , unhon ne as pas khde hokar us par bahutere bharee dosh laga , jin ka praman ve naheen de sakate the .
44025008	parantu paulus ne uttr diya , ki maain ne n to yahoodiyon kee vyavastha ka aur n mandair ka , aur n kaaisar ka kuchh aparadha kiya haai .
44025009	tab faestus ne yahoodiyon ko khush karane kee ichchha se paulus ko uttr diya , kya too chahata haai ki yarooshalem ko jae aur vahan mere samhane tera yah mukama tay kiya jae ?
44025010	paulus ne kaha maain kaaisar ke nyay asan ke samhane khda hoon : mere mukamen ka yaheen faaisala hona chahiae : jaaisa too achchhee tarah janata haai , yahoodiyon ka maain ne kuchh aparadha naheen kiya .
44025011	yaadi aparadhaee hoon aur mar dale jane yogy koi kam kiya haai to marane se naheen mukarata parantu jin baton ka ye mujh par dosh lagate haai , yadi un men se koi bat sach n tthare , to koi mujhe un ke hath naheen saunp sakata : maain kaaisar kee dohai deta hoon .
44025012	tab faestus ne maantriayon kee sabha ke sath baten karake uttr diya , too ne kaaisar kee dohai dee haai , too kaaisar ke pas jaega . .
44025013	aur kuchh din beetane ke bad agirppa raja aur biraneeke ne kaaisaariya men akar faestus se bhentt kee .
44025014	aur un ke bahut din vahan rahane ke bad faestus ne paulus kee katha raja ko batai ki aek manushy haai , jise faeliks bandhaua chhod gaya haai .
44025015	jab maain yarooshalem men tha , to mahayajak aur yahoodiyon ke puraniyon ne us kee naalish kee aur chaha , ki us par dand kee agyaa dee jae .
44025016	parantu maain ne un ko uttr diya , ki romiyon kee yah reeati nahee , ki kisee manushy ko dand ke liye saunp de , jab tak muaalaaih ko apane muiyon ke amane samane khde hokar dosh ke uttr dene ka avasar n mile .
44025017	so jab ve yahan ikatthe ha , to maain ne kuchh der n kee , parantu doosare hee din nyay asan par baaittkar , us manushy ko lane kee agyaa dee .
44025018	jab usake mui khde ha , to unhon ne aeesee buree baton ka dosh naheen lagaya , jaaisa maain samajhta tha .
44025019	parantu apane mat ke , aur yeesha nam kisee manushy ke vishay men jo mar gaya tha , aur paulus us ko jeeavit batata tha , vivad karate the .
44025020	aur maain ulajhn men tha , ki in baton ka pata kaaise lagaun ? isaliye maain ne us se poochha , kya too yarooshalem jaega , ki vahan in baton ka faaisala ho ?
44025021	parantu jab paulus ne dohai dee , ki mere mukamen ka faaisala maharajaadhairaj ke yahan ho to maain ne agyaa dee , ki jab tak use kaaisar ke pas n bhejoo , us kee rakhvalee kee jae .
44025022	tab aagirppa ne faestus se kaha , maain bhee us manushy kee sunana chahata hoon : us ne kaha , too kal sun lega . .
44025023	so doosare din , jab aagirppa aur biraneeke badee dhoomadhaam se akar palattn ke saradaron aur nagar ke bade logon ke sath darabar men pahunche , to faestus ne agyaa dee , ki ve paulus ko le aen .
44025024	faestus ne kaha he maharaja aagirppa , aur he sab manushyon jo yahan hamare sath ho , tum is manushy ko dekhte ho , jis ke vishay men sare yahoodiyon ne yarooshalem men aur yahan bhee chilla chillakar mujh se binatee kee , ki is ka jeevit rahana uchit naheen .
44025025	parantu maain ne jan liya , ki us ne aeesa kuchh naheen kiya ki mar dala jae aur jab ki us ne ap hee maharajaadhairaj kee dohai dee , to maain ne use bhejane ka upay nikala .
44025026	parantu maain ne usake vishay men koi tteek bat naheen pai ki apane svamee ke pas likoo , isaaliye maain use tumhare samhane aur vishosh karake he maharaja agirppa tere samhane laya hoo , ki janchane ke bad mujhe kuchh likhne ko mile .
44025027	kyonaki bandhauae ko bhejana aur jo dosh us par lagae gaa , unhen n batana , mujhe vyarth samajh padta haai . .
44026001	aagirppa ne paulus se kaha tujhe apane vishay men bolane kee agyaa haai : tab paulus hath baddhakar uttr dene laga , ki ,
44026002	he raja agirppa , jitanee baton ka yahoodee mujh par dosh lagate haai , aj tere samhane un ka uttr dene men maain apane ko dhany samajhta hoon .
44026003	vishosh karake isaliye ki too yahoodiyon ke sab vyavaharon aur vivadon ko janata haai , so maain binatee karata hoo , dhaeeraj se meree sun le .
44026004	jaaisa mera chal chalan arambh se apanee jaati ke beech aur yarooshalem men tha , yah sab yahoodee janate haain .
44026005	ve yaadi gavahee dena chahate haai , to arambh se mujhe paahichanate haai , ki maain fareesee hokar apane dharma ke sab se khre panth ke anusar chala .
44026006	aur ab us praatigyaa kee asha ke karan jo parameshvar ne hamare bapadadon se kee thee , mujh par mukama chal raha haai .
44026007	usee pratigyaa ke poore hone kee asha lagae ha , hamare barahon gotra apane sare man se rat din parameshvar kee seva karate ae haain : he raja , isee asha ke vishay men yahoodee mujh par dosh lagate haain .
44026008	jab ki parameshvar mare huon ko jilata haai , to tumhare yahan yah bat kyon vishvas ke yogy naheen samajhee jatee ?
44026009	maain ne bhee samajha tha ki yeesha nasaree ke nam ke virodha men mujhe bahut kuchh karana chahiae .
44026010	aur maain ne yarooshalem men aeesa hee kiya aur mahayajakon se aadhaikar pakar bahut se paavitra logon ko bandeegrah men dal , aur jab ve mar dale jate the , to maain bhee un ke virodha men apanee sampati deta tha .
44026011	aur har aradhanalay men maain unhen tadna dila dilakar yeesha kee ninda karavata tha , yahan tak ki krodha ke mare aeesa pagal ho gaya , ki bahar ke nagaron men bhee jakar unhen satata tha .
44026012	isee dhaun men jab maain mahayajakon se adhaikar aur paravana lekar daamishk ko ja raha tha .
44026013	to he raja , marga men dopahar ke samay maain ne akash se soorya ke tej se bhee baddhkar aek jyoti apane aur apane sath chalanevalon ke charon or chamakatee hui dekhee .
44026014	aur jab ham sab boomi par gir pade , to maain ne ibraanee bhasha me , mujh se yah kahate hae yah shabd suna , ki he shaaul , he shaaul , too mujhe kyon satata haai ? paaine par lat marana tere liye kaattnai haai .
44026015	maain ne kaha , he prabhu too kaun haai ? prabhu ne kaha , maain yeesha hoon : jise too satata haai .
44026016	parantu too ut , apane panvon par khda ho kyonaki maain ne tujhe isaaliye darshan diya haai , ki tujhe un baton par bhee sevak aur gavah ttharau , jo too ne dekhee haai , aur un ka bhee jin ke liye maain tujhe darshan doonga .
44026017	aur maain tujhe tere logon se aur anyajatiyon se bachata rahoonga , jin ke pas maain ab tujhe isaaliye bhejata hoon .
44026018	ki too un kee ankhe khole , ki ve andhakar se jyoti kee or , aur shautan ke adhaikar se parameshvar kee or firen ki papon kee kshama , aur un logon ke sath jo mujh par vishvas karane se pavitra kiae gaae haai , meeras paen .
44026019	so he raja agirppa , maain ne us svargeey darshan kee bat n ttalee .
44026020	parantu pahile daamishk ke , fir yarooshalem ke rahanevalon ko , tab yahoodiya ke sare desh men aur anyajaatiyon ko samajhata raha , ki man firao aur parameshvar kee or fir kar man firav ke yogy kam karo .
44026021	in baton ke karan yahoodee mujhe maandair men pakadke mar dalane ka yatan karate the .
44026022	so parameshvar kee sahayata se maain aj tak bana hoon aur chhotte bade sabhee ke samhane gavahee deta hoon aur un baton ko chhod kuchh naheen kahata , jo bhavishyadvktaon aur moosa ne bhee kaha ki honevalee haain .
44026023	ki maseeh ko dukh uttana hoga , aur vahee sab se paahile mare huon men se jee uttkar , hamare logon men aur anyajatiyon men jyoti ka prachar karega . .
44026024	jab vah is reeati se uttr de raha tha , to faestus ne unche shabd se kaha he paulus , too pagal haai : bahut vidha ne tujhe pagal kar diya haai .
44026025	parantu us ne kaha he mahapratapee faestus , maain pagal nahee , parantu sachchai aur buddh ikee baten kahata hoon .
44026026	raja bhee jis ke samhane maain nidr hokar bol raha hoo , ye baten janata haai , aur mujhe prateeti haai , ki in baton men se koi us se chhpaiee nahee , kyonki us ghattna to kone men naheen hui .
44026027	he raja agirppa , kya too bhvishyadvktaon kee prateeati karata haai ? ha , maain janata hoo , ki too prateeati karata haai .
44026028	ab aagirppa ne paulus se kaha too thode hee samajhane se mujhe maseehee banana chahata haai ?
44026029	paulus ne kaha , parameshvar se meree praarthna yah haai ki kya thode me , kya bahut me , keval too hee nahee , parantu jitane log aj meree sunate haai , in bandhanon ko chhod ve mere saman ho jaen . .
44026030	tab raja aur hakim aur biraneeke aur un ke sath baaittnevale utt khde hae .
44026031	aur alag jakar apas men kahane lage , yah manushy aeesa to kuchh naheen karata , jo mratyu ya bandhan ke yogy ho .
44026032	aagirppa ne faestus se kaha yadi yah manushy kaaisar kee dohai n deta , to doott sakata tha . .
44027001	jab yah ttharaya gaya , ki ham jahaj par italiya ko jae , to unhon ne paulus aur kitane aur bandhauon ko bhee yooliyus nam augustus kee palattn ke aek soobedar ke hath saunp diya .
44027002	aur adramuatiayum ke aek jahaj par jo aasiya ke kinare kee jagahon men jane par tha , chaddhkar ham ne use khol diya , aur aaristarkhus nam thaissaluneeke ka aek maakidoonee hamare sath tha .
44027003	doosare din ham ne saaida men langar dala aur yooliyus ne paulus par krapa karake use mitraen ke yahan jane diya ki usaka satkar kiya jae .
44027004	vahan se jahaj kholakar hava virooddh hone ke karan ham kupraus kee ad men hokar chale .
44027005	aur kilikiya aur panfooliya ke nikatt ke samudra men hokar loosiya ke moora men utare .
44027006	vahan soobedar ko sikandaariya ka aek jahaj itaaliya jata hua mila , aur us ne hamen us par chaddha diya .
44027007	aur jab ham bahut dinon tak dhaeere dhaeere chalakar kaattnaita se kaanidus ke samhane pahunche , to isaliye ki hava hamen age baddhne n detee thee , salamone ke samhane se hokar krete kee ad men chale .
44027008	aur usake kinare kinare kattnaita se chalakar shaubh langarabaree nam aek jagah pahunche , jahan se lasaya nagar nikatt tha . .
44027009	jab bahut din beet gaa , aur jal yatra men jakhaim isaaliye hotee thee ki upavas ke din ab beet chuke the , to paulus ne unhen yah kahakar samajhaya .
44027010	ki he sajjano mujhe aeesa jan padta haai , ki is yatra men bipaati aur bahut haani n keval mal aur jahaj kee baran hamare praanon kee bhee honevalee haai .
44027011	parantu soobedar ne paulus kee baton se manjhee aur jahaj ke svamee kee baddhkar manee .
44027012	aur vah bandar sthan jada kattne ke liye achchha n tha isaaliye bahuton ka vichar hua , ki vahan se jahaj kholakar yadi kisee reeati se ho sake , to faeeaniks men pahunchakar jada katten : yah to krete ka aek bandar sthan haai jo daakkhiana-pachchhim aur uttra-pachchhim kee or khulata haai .
44027013	jab kuchh kuchh daakkhianee hava bahane lagee , to yah samajhkar ki hamara matalab poora ho gaya , langar uttaya aur kinara dhare hae krete ke pas se jane lage .
44027014	parantu thodee der men vahan se aek badee andhaee uttee , jo yoorakuleen kahalatee haai .
44027015	jab yah jahaj par lagee , tab vah hava ke samhane tthar n saka , so ham ne use bahane diya , aur isee tarah bahate hae chale gaae .
44027016	tab kauda nam aek chhotte se ttapoo kee ad men bahate bahate ham kaattnaita se dongee ko vash me kar sake .
44027017	mallahon ne use uttakar , anek upay karake jahaj ko neeche se bandha , aur suraatis ke chorabaloo par ttkai jane ke bhy se pal aur saman utar kar , bahate hae chale gaae .
44027018	aur jab ham ne andhaee se bahut hichakole aur dhakke khaa , to doosare din ve jahaj ka mal faenkane lage . aur teesare din unhon ne apane hathon se jahaj ka saman faenk diya .
44027019	aur teesare din unhon ne apane hathon se jahaj ka saman faenk diya .
44027020	aur jab bahut dien tak n soorya n tare dikhai dia , aur badee andhaee chal rahee thee , to ant men hamare bachane kee saree asha jatee rahee .
44027021	jab ve bahut upavas kar chuke , to paulus ne un ke beech men khda hokar kaha he logo , chaahiae tha ki tum meree bat manakar , krete se n jahaj kholate aur n yah bipat aur haati uttate .
44027022	parantu ab maain tumhen samajhata hoo , ki ddhaddhs bandhae kyonaki tum men se kisee ke praan kee hani n hogee , keval jahaj kee .
44027023	kyonaki parameshvar jis ka maain hoo , aur jis kee seva karata hoo , usake svargadoot ne aj rat mere pas akar kaha .
44027024	he paulus , mat dra tujhe kaaisar ke samhane khda hona avashy haai : aur dek , parameshvar ne sab ko jo tere sath yatra karate haai , tujhe diya haai .
44027025	isaliye , he sajjanon ddhaddhs bandhaen kyonki maain parameshvar kee prateeti karata hoo , ki jaaisa mujh se kaha gaya haai , vaaisa hee hoga .
44027026	parantu hamen kisee ttapoo par ja ttkaina hoga . .
44027027	jab chaudahaveen rat hui , aur ham aadirya samudra men ttkarate firate the , to adhaee rat ke nikatt mallahon ne attkal se jana , ki ham kisee desh ke nikatt pahunch rahe haain .
44027028	aur thah lekar unhon ne bees purasa gahara paya aur thoda age baddhkar fir thah lee , to pandrah purasa paya .
44027029	tab patthreelee jagahon par padne ke dr se unhon ne jahaj kee pichhadee char langar dale , aur bhor ka hona manate rahe .
44027030	parantu jab mallah jahaj par se bhagana chahate the , aur galahee se langar dalane ke bahane dongee samudra men utar dee .
44027031	to paulus ne soobedar aur sipaahiyon se kaha yadi ye jahaj par n rahe , to tum naheen bach sakate .
44027032	tab sipaahiyon ne rasse kattkar dongee gira do .
44027033	jab bhor hone par tha , to paulus ne yah kahake , sab ko bhojan karane ko samajhaya , ki aj chaudah din hae ki tum as dekhte dekhte bookhe rahe , aur kuchh bhojan n kiya .
44027034	isaliye tumhen samajhata hoon ki kuchh kha lo , jis se tumhara bachav ho kyonki tum men se kisee ke sir par aek bal bhee n girega .
44027035	aur yah kahakar us ne rottee lekar sab ke samhane parameshvar ka dhanyavad kiya aur todkar khane laga .
44027036	tab ve sab bhee ddhaddhs bandhakar bhojan karane lage .
44027037	ham sab milakar jahaj par do sau chhhaittr jan the .
44027038	jab ve bhojan karake trapt ha , to genhoo ko samudra men faenk kar jahaj halka karane lage .
44027039	jab bihan hua , to unhon ne us desh ko naheen paahichana , parantu aek khadee dekhee jis ka chauras kinara tha , aur vichar kiya , ki yadi ho sake , to isee par jahaj ko ttkaiaaen .
44027040	tab unhon ne langaron ko kholakar samudra men chhod diya aur usee samay patavaron ke bandhan khol dia , aur hava ke samhane agala pal chaddhakar kinare kee or chale .
44027041	parantu do samudra ke sangam kee jagah padkar unhon ne jahaj ko ttkaiaya , aur galahee to dhakka khakar gad gai , aur ttl n sakee parantu pichhadee laharon ke bal se toottne lagee .
44027042	tab sipaahiyon ko vichar hua , ki bandhauon ko mar dalen aeesa n ho , ki koi taairake nikal bhage .
44027043	parantu soobedar ne paulus ko bachane ko ichchha se unhen is vichar se roka , aur yah kaha , ki jo taair sakate haai , pahile koodakar kinare par nikal jaen .
44027044	aur bakee koi pattron par , aur koi jahaj kee aur vastuon ke sahare nikal ja , aur is reeti se sab koi boomi par bach nikale . .
44028001	jab ham bach nikale , to jana ki yah ttapoo milite kahalata haai .
44028002	aur un jangalee logon ne ham par anokhee krapa kee kyonki menh ke karan jo baras raha tha aur jade ke karan unhon ne ag sulagakar ham sab ko ttharaya .
44028003	jab paulus ne lakaadiyon ka gattha battorakar ag par rakha , to aek sanp anch pakar nikala aur usake hath se lipatt gaya .
44028004	jab un jangaaliyon ne sanp ko usake hath men lattke hae dekha , to apas men kaha sachamuch yah manushy hatyara haai , ki yadhyapi samudra se bach gaya , taubhee nyay ne jeeavit rahane n diya .
44028005	tab us ne sanp ko ag men jhttk diya , aur use kuchh hani n pahunchee .
44028006	parantu ve batt johate the , ki vah sooj jaega , ya aekaek girake mar jaega , parantu jab ve bahut der tak dekhte rahe , aur dekha , ki usaka kuchh bhee naheen bigada , to aur hee vichar kar kaha yah to koi devata haai . .
44028007	us jagah ke asapas pubaaliyus nam us ttapoo ke pradhaan kee boomi thee : us ne hamen apane ghar le jakar teen din mitrabhav se pahunai kee .
44028008	pubaliyus ka pita jvar aur anv lohoo se rogee pada tha : so paulus ne usake pas ghar men jakar praarthna kee , aur us par hath rakhkar use changa kiya .
44028009	jab aeesa hua , to us ttapoo ke bakee beemar a , aur change kiae gaae .
44028010	aur unhon ne hamara bahut adar kiya , aur jab ham chalane lage , to jo kuchh hamen avashy tha , jahaj par rakh diya . .
44028011	teen maheene ke bad ham sikandaariya ke aek jahaj par chal nikale , jo us ttapoo men jade bhr raha tha aur jis ka chinh diyusakooree tha .
44028012	surakoosa men langar dal karake ham teen din ttkai rahe .
44028013	vahan se ham ghoomakar regiyum men ae : aur aek din putiyulee men ae .
44028014	vahan ham ko bhai mile , aur un ke kahane se ham un ke yahan sat din tak rahe aur is reeati se rom ko chale .
44028015	vahan se bhai hamara samachar sunakar aappaiyus ke chauk aur teena-sarae tak hamaree bhentt karane ko nikal ae jinhen dekhkar paulus ne parameshvar ka dhanyavad kiya , aur ddhaddhs bandhaa . .
44028016	jab ham rom men pahunche , to paulus ko aek sipahee ke sath jo us kee rakhvalee karata tha , akele rahane kee agyaa hui . .
44028017	teen din ke bad us ne yahoodiyon ke bade logon ko bulaya , aur jab ve ikatthe hae to un se kaha he bhaiyo , maain ne apane logon ke ya bapadadon ke vyavaharon ke virodha men kuchh bhee naheen kiya , taubhee bandhaua hokar yarooshalem se romiyon ke hath saunpa gaya .
44028018	unhon ne mujhe janch kar chhod dena chaha , kyonki mujh men mratyu ke yogy koi dosh n tha .
44028019	parantu jab yahoodee is ke virodha men bolane lage , to mujhe kaaisar kee dohai denee padee : n yah ki mujhe apane lagon par koi dosh lagana tha .
44028020	isaliye maain ne tum ko bulaya haai , ki tum se miloon aur batacheet karoon kyonki israael kee asha ke liye maain is janjeer se jakada hua hoon .
44028021	unhon ne us se kaha n ham ne tere vishay men yahoodiyon se chitthiyan pai , aur n bhaiyon men se kisee ne akar tere vishay men kuchh bataya , aur n bura kaha .
44028022	parantu tera vichar kya haai ? vahee ham tujh se sunana chahate haai , kyonki ham janate haai , ki har jagah is mat ke virodha men log baten kahate haain . .
44028023	tab unhon ne usake liye aek din ttharaya , aur bahut log usake yahan ikatthe ha , aur vah parameshvar ke rajy kee gavahee deta hua , aur moosa kee vyavastha aur bhaavishyadvktaon kee pustakon se yeesha ke vishay men samajha samajhakar bhor se sanjh tak varnn karata raha .
44028024	tab kitanon ne un baton ko man liya , aur kitanon ne prateeati n kee .
44028025	jab apas men aek mat n ha , to paulus ke is aek bat ke kahane par chale gaa , ki pavitra atma ne yashaayah bhvishyadvkta ke dara tumhare bapadadon se achchha kaha , ki jakar in logon se kaha .
44028026	ki sunate to rahoge , parantu n samajhoge , aur dekhte to rahoge , parantu n bujhoge .
44028027	kyonaki in logon ka man motta , aur un ke kan bharee ho gaa , aur unhon ne apanee ankhen band kee haai , aeesa n ho ki ve kabhee ankhon se dekhe , aur kanon se sune , aur man se samajhen aur fire , aur maain unhen changa karoon .
44028028	so tum jano , ki parameshvar ke is uddhar kee katha anyajaatiyon ke pas bhejee gai haai , aur ve sunenge .
44028029	jab us ne yah kaha to yahoodee apas men bahut vivad karane lage aur vahan se chale gaae . .
44028030	aur vah poore do varsha apane bhade ke ghar men raha .
44028031	aur jo usake pas ate the , un sab se milata raha aur bina rok ttok bahut nidr hokar parameshvar ke rajy ka prachar karata aur prabhu yeesha maseeh kee baten sikhata raha . .
45001001	paulus kee or se jo yeesha maseeh ka das haai , aur perrit hone ke liye bulaya gaya , aur parameshvar ke us susamachar ke liye alag kiya gaya haai .
45001002	jis kee us ne pahile hee se apane bhavishyadvktaon ke dara paavitra shaasr men .
45001003	apane putra hamare prabhu yeesha maseeh ke vishay men praatigyaa kee thee , jo shareer ke bhav se to daud ke vansh se utpann hua .
45001004	aur paavitrata kee atma ke bhav se mare huon men se jee uttne ke karan samarth ke sath parameshvar ka putra tthara haai .
45001005	jis ke dara hamen anugrah aur praearitai milee ki usake nam ke karan sab jaatiyon ke log vishvas karake us kee manen .
45001006	jin men se tum bhee yeesha maseeh ke hone ke liye bulae gaae ho .
45001007	un sab ke nam jo rom men parameshvar ke pyare haain aur pavitra hone ke liye bulae gaae haain . . hamare pita parameshvar aur prabhu yeesha maseeh kee or se tumhen anugrah aur shaaantai milatee rahe . .
45001008	paahile maain tum sab ke liye yeesha maseeh ke dara apane parameshvar ka dhanyavad karata hoo , ki tumhare vishvas kee charcha sare jagat men ho rahee haai .
45001009	parameshvar jis kee seva maain apanee atma se usake putra ke susamachar ke vishay men karata hoo , vahee mera gavah haai ki maain tumhen kis prakar lagatar smaran karata rahata hoon .
45001010	aur nity apanee praarthnaon men binatee karata hoo , ki kisee reeati se ab bhee tumhare pas ane ko meree yatra parameshvar kee ichchha se sufal ho .
45001011	kyonaki maai . tum se milane kee lalasa karata hoo , ki maain tumhen koi atmaik baradan doon jis se tum sthiar ho jao .
45001012	arthata yah , ki maain tumhare beech men hokar tumhare sath us vishvas ke dara jo mujh me , aur tum men haai , shaantai paun .
45001013	aur he bhaiyo , maain naheen chahata , ki tum is se anajan raho , ki maain ne bar bar tumhare pas ana chaha , ki jaaisa mujhe aur anyajatiyon men fal mila , vaaisa hee tum men bhee mile , parantu ab tak rooka raha .
45001014	maain yoonaniyon aur anyabhashaiyon ka aur buaddhmaianon aur nirbuaddhyaien ka karjadan hoon .
45001015	so maain tumhen bhee jo rom men rahate ho , susamachar sunane ko bhrasak taaiyar hoon .
45001016	kyonaki maain susamachar se naheen lajata , isaliye ki vah har aek vishvas karanevale ke liye , paahile to yahoodee , fir yoonanee ke liye uddhar ke nimitt parameshvar kee samarth haai .
45001017	kyonaki us men parameshvar kee dhaaarmikata vishvas se aur vishvas ke liye pragatt hotee haai jaaisa likha haai , ki vishvas se dharmee jan jeeavit rahega . .
45001018	parameshvar ka krodha to un logon kee sab abhktai aur adharma par svarga se pragatt hota haai , jo saty ko adharma se dabae rakhte haain .
45001019	isaliye ki paramashevar ke vishay men gyaan un ke manon men pragatt haai , kyonki parameshvar ne un par pragatt kiya haai .
45001020	kyonaki usake anadekhe gu , arthata us kee sanatan samarth , aur parameshvaratv jagat kee sraashtti ke samay se usake kamon ke dara dekhne men ate haai , yahan tak ki ve niroottr haain .
45001021	is karan ki parameshvar ko janane par bhee unhon ne parameshvar ke yogy badai aur dhanyavad n kiya , parantu vyarth vichar karane lage , yahan tak ki un ka nirbuaddh iman andhora ho gaya .
45001022	ve apane ap ko buaddhmaian jatakar moorkh ban gaae .
45001023	aur aavinashaee parameshvar kee mahima ko nashaman manushy , aur pakshiayo , aur chaupayo , aur renganevale jantuon kee moorat kee samanata men badal dala . .
45001024	is karan parameshvar ne unhen un ke man ke abhailashaen ke unasar ashauddhta ke liye chhod diya , ki ve apas men apane shareeron ka anadar karen .
45001025	kyonaki unhon ne parameshvar kee sachchai ko badalakar joott bana dala , aur sraashtti kee upasana aur seva kee , n ki us srajanahar kee jo sada dhany haai . ameena . .
45001026	isaliye paramashevar ne unhen neech kamanaon ke vash men chhod diya yahan tak ki un kee striayon ne bhee svabhavik vyavahar ko , us se jo svabhav ke virooddh haai , badal dala .
45001027	vaaise hee puroosh bhee striayon ke sath svaabhaavik vyavahar chhodkar apas men kamatur hokar jalane lage , aur purooshaen ne purooshaen ke sath nirlajj kam karake apane bhram ka tteek fal paya . .
45001028	aur jab unhon ne parameshvar ko paahichanana n chaha , isaliye parameshvar ne bhee unhen un ke nikamme man par chhod diya ki ve anuachit kam karen .
45001029	so ve sab prakar ke adharma , aur dushttta , aur lob , aur baairabhav , se bhr gaae aur dah , aur hatya , aur jhgade , aur chhl , aur ishara se bhrapoor ho gaa , aur chugalakhora .
45001030	badanam karanevale , parameshvar ke dekhne men gharanait , auron ka anadar karanevale , abhaimanee , deengamar , buree buree baton ke bananevale , mata pita kee agyaa n mananevale .
45001031	nirbuaddh , i vishvasaghaatee , mayarahit aur nirday ho gaae .
45001032	ve to parameshvar kee yah vidhai janate haai , ki aeese aeese kam karanevale mutyu ke dand ke yogy haai , taubhee n keval ap hee aeese kam karate haai , baran karanevalon se prasann bhee hote haain . .
45002001	so he dosh laganevale , too koi kyon n ho too niroottr haai ! kyonaki jis bat men too doosare par dosh lagata haai , usee bat men apane ap ko bhee doshaee ttharata haai , isaaliye ki too jo dosh lagata haai , ap hee vahee kam karata haai .
45002002	aur ham jatane haai , ki aeese aeese kam karanevalon par parameshvar kee or se tteek tteek dand kee agyaa hotee haai .
45002003	aur he manushy , too jo aeese aeese kam karanevalon par dosh lagata haai , aur ap ve hee kam karata haai kya yah samajhta haai , ki too parameshvar kee dand kee agyaa se bach jaega ?
45002004	kya too us kee krapa , aur sahanashaeelata , aur dhaeerajaroopee dhan ko tuchchh janata haai ? aur kaya yah naheen samajhta , ki parameshvar kee krapa tujhe man firav ko sikhatee haai ?
45002005	par apanee kattorata aur hatteele man ke anusar usake krodha ke din ke liye , jis men parameshvar ka sachcha nyay pragatt hoga , apane nimitt krodha kama raha haai .
45002006	vah har aek ko usake kamon ke anusar badala dega .
45002007	jo sukarma men sthiar rahakar maahima , aur adar , aur amarata kee khoj men haai , unhen anant jeevan dega .
45002008	par jo vivadee haai , aur saty ko naheen manate , baran adharma ko manate haai , un par krodha aur kop padega .
45002009	aur klesh aur sankatt har aek manushy ke praan par jo bura karata haai , paahile yahoodee par fir yoonanee para .
45002010	par maahima aur adar or kalyan har aek ko milega , jo bhla karata haai , pahile yahoodee ko fir yoonanee ko .
45002011	kyonaki parameshvar kisee ka paksha naheen karata .
45002012	isaliye ki jinhon ne bina vyavastha pae pap kiya , ve bina vyavastha ke nash bhee honge , aur jinhon ne vyavastha pakar pap kiya , un ka dand vyavastha ke anusar hoga .
45002013	kyonaki parameshvar ke yahan vyavastha ke sunanevale dharmee nahee , par vyavastha par chalanevale dharmee ttharae jaenge .
45002014	fir jab anyajaati log jin ke pas vyavastha nahee , svabhav hee se vyavastha kee baton par chalate haai , to vyavastha un ke pas n hone par bhee ve apane liye ap hee vyavastha haain .
45002015	ve vyavastha kee baten apane dayon men likhee hui dikhne haain aur un ke vivek bhee gavahee dete haai , aur un kee chintaen paraspar dosh lagatee , ya unhen nirdosh ttharatee haai .
45002016	jis din parameshvar mere susamachar ke anusar yeesha maseeh ke dara manushyon kee gupt baton ka nyay karega . .
45002017	yaadi too yahoodee kahalata haai , aur vyavastha par bhrosa rakhta haai , aur parameshvar ke vishay men ghamand karata haai .
45002018	aur us kee ichchha janata aur vyavastha kee shaiksha pakar uttm uttm baton ko piry janata haai .
45002019	aur apane par bhrosa rakhta haai , ki maain andhaen ka aguva , aur andhakar men pade huon kee jyoti .
45002020	aur buaddhhaieenon ka sikhanevala , aur balakon ka upadeshak hoo , aur gyaan , aur saty ka namoona , jo vyavastha men haai , mujhe mila haai .
45002021	so kya too jo auron ko sikhata haai , apane ap ko naheen sikhata ? kya too choree n karane ka upadesh deta haai , ap hee choree karata haai ?
45002022	too jo kahata haai , vyaabhaichar n karana , kya ap hee vyabhaichar karata haai ? too jo mooraton se gharana karata haai , kya ap hee maandairon ko loottta haai .
45002023	too jo vyavastha ke vishay men ghamand karata haai , kya vyavastha n manakar , parameshvar ka anadar karata haai ?
45002024	kyonaki tumhare karan anyajaatiyon men parameshvar ke nam kee ninda kee jatee haai jaaisa likha bhee haai .
