45002025	yaadi too vyavastha par chale , to khtane se laabh to haai , parantu yadi too vyavastha ko n mane , to tera khtana bin khtana kee dasha tthara .
45002026	so yaadi khtanaraahit manushy vyavastha kee vidhaiyon ko mana kare , to kya us kee bin khtana kee dasha khtane ke barabar n ginee jaegee ?
45002027	aur jo manushy jaati ke karan bin khtana raha yaadi vah vyavastha ko poora kare , to kya tujhe jo lekh pane aur khtana kiae jane par bhee vyavastha ko mana naheen karata haai , doshaee n ttharaega ?
45002028	kyonaki vah yahoodee nahee , par pragatt men haai , aur deh men haai .
45002029	par yahoodee vahee haai , jo man men haai aur khtana vahee haai , jo day ka aur atma men haai n ki lekh ka : aeese kee prashansa manushyon kee or se nahee , parantu parameshvar kee or se hotee haai . .
45003001	so yahoodee kee kya badai , ya khtane ka kya labh ?
45003002	har prakar se bahut kuchh . pahile to yah ki paramashevar ke vachan un ko saunpe gaae .
45003003	yaadi kitane vishvasaghaatee nikale bhee to kya hua . kya unake vishvasaghaatee hone se parameshvar kee sachchai vyarth ttharegee ?
45003004	kadapi nahee , baran parameshvar sachcha aur har aek manushy jootta tthare , jaaisa likha haai , ki jis se too apanee baton men dharmee tthare aur nyay karate samay too jay pae .
45003005	so yaadi hamara adharma parameshvar kee dhaaarmikata tthara deta haai , to ham kya kahen ? kya yah ki parameshvar jo krodha karata haai anyayee haai ? yah to maain manushy kee reeti par kahata hoon .
45003006	kadapi nahee , naheen to parameshvar kyonkar jagat ka nyay karega ?
45003007	yaadi mere joott ke karan parameshvar kee sachchai us ko mahima ke liye aadhaik karake pragatt hui , to fir kyon papee kee nai maain dand ke yogy ttharaya jata hoon ?
45003008	aur ham kyon burai n kare , ki bhlai nikale ? jab ham par yahee dosh lagaya bhee jata haai , aur kitane kahate haain ? ki in ka yahee kahana haai : parantu aeeson ka doshaee ttharana tteek haai . .
45003009	to fir kya hua ? kya ham un se achchhe haain ? kabhee nahanee kyonki ham yahoodiyon aur yoonaaniyon donon par yah dosh laga chuke haain ki ve sab ke sab pap ke vash men haain .
45003010	jaaisa likha haai , ki koi dharmee nahee , aek bhee naheen .
45003011	koi samajhdar nahee , koi parameshvar ka khojanevala naheen .
45003012	sab bhttk gaae haai , sab ke sab nikamme ban gaa , koi bhlai karanevala nahee , aek bhee naheen .
45003013	un ka gala khulee hui kabra haai : unheen ne apanee jeebhon se chhl kiya haai : un ke hotton men sapon ka vish haai .
45003014	aur un ka munh shraap aur kadvahatt se bhra haai .
45003015	un ke panv lohoo bahane ko faurteele haain .
45003016	un ke magorn men nash aur klesh haai .
45003017	unhon ne kushal ka marga naheen jana .
45003018	un kee ankhon ke samhane parameshvar ka bhy naheen .
45003019	ham janate haai , ki vyavastha jo kuchh kahatee haai unheen se kahatee haai , jo vyavastha ke adhaeen haain : isaliye ki har aek munh band kiya ja , aur sara sansar parameshvar ke dand ke yogy tthare .
45003020	kyeanki vyavastha ke kamon se koi praanee usake samhane dharmee naheen ttharega , isaaliye ki vyavastha ke dara pap kee paahichan hotee haai .
45003021	par ab bina vyavastha parameshvar kee dhaarmikata pragatt hui haai , jis kee gavahee vyavastha aur bhvishyadvkta dete haain .
45003022	arthata parameshvar kee vah dhaarmikata , jo yeesha maseeh par vishvas karane se sab vishvas karanevalon ke liye haai kyonki kuchh bhed naheen .
45003023	isaliye ki sab ne pap kiya haai aur parameshvar kee maahima se raahit haai .
45003024	parantu usake anugrah se us chhuttkare ke dara jo maseeh yeesha men haai , sent ment dharmee ttharae jate haain .
45003025	use parameshvar ne usake lohoo ke karan aek aeesa praayaashchaitt ttharaya , jo vishvas karane se karyakaree hota haai , ki jo pap pahile kiae gaa , aur jin kee parameshvar ne apanee sahanashaeelata se anakanee kee un ke vishay men vah apanee dhaarmikata pragatt kare .
45003026	baran isee samay us kee dhaaarmikata pragatt ho ki jis se vah ap hee dharmee tthare , aur jo yeesha par vishvas kare , usaka bhee dharmee ttharanevala ho .
45003027	to ghamand karana kahan raha ? us kee to jagah hee naheen : kaun see vyavastha ke karan se ? kya karmon kee vyavastha se ? nahee , baran vishvas kee vyavastha ke karan .
45003028	isaliye ham is paarinam par pahunchate haai , ki manushy vyavastha ke kamon ke bina vishvas ke dara dharmee ttharata haai .
45003029	kya parameshvar keval yahoodiyon heen ka haai ? kya anyajatiyon ka naheen ? ha , anyajaatiyon ka bhee haai .
45003030	kyonaki aek hee parameshvar haai , jo khtanavalon ko vishvas se aur khtanaraahiton ko bhee vishvas ke dara dharmee ttharaega .
45003031	te kya ham vyavastha ko vishvas ke dara vyarth ttharate haain ? kadaapi naheen baran vyavastha ko sthiar karate haain . .
45004001	so ham kya kahe , ki hamare shaareerik pita ibraaheem ko kya praapt hua ?
45004002	kyonaki yadi ibraaheem kamon se dharmee ttharaya jata , to use ghamand karane kee jagah hotee , parantu parameshvar ke nikatt naheen .
45004003	paavitra shaasr kya kahata haai ? yah ki ibraaheem ne parameshvar par vishvas kiya , aur yah usake liye dhaarmikata gina gaya .
45004004	kam karanevale kee majadooree dena dan nahee , parantu hakk samajha jata haai .
45004005	parantu jo kam naheen karata baran bhktaiheen ke dharmee ttharanevale par vishvas karata haai , usaka vishvas usake liye dhaarmikata gina jata haai .
45004006	jise parameshvar bina kamon ke dharmee ttharata haai , use daud bhee dhany kahata haai .
45004007	ki dhany ve haai , jin ke adharma kshama ha , aur jin ke pap ddhape gaae .
45004008	dhany haai vah manushy jise parameshvar papee n ttharae .
45004009	te yah dhany kahana , kya khtanavalon hee ke liye haai , ya khtanaraahiton ke liye bhee ? ham yah kahate haai , ki ibraaheem ke liye usaka vishvas dhaaarmikata gina gaya .
45004010	to vah kyonkar gina gaya ? khtane kee dasha men ya bina khtane kee dasha men ? khtane kee dasha men naheen parantu bina khtane kee dasha men .
45004011	aur us ne khtane ka chinh paya , ki us vishvas kee dhaaarmikata par chhap ho ja , jo us ne bina khtane kee dasha men rakha tha : jis se vah un sab ka pita tthare , jo bina khtane kee dasha men vishvas karate haai , aur ki ve bhee dharmee ttharen .
45004012	aur un khtana kiae huon ka pita ho , jo n keval khtana kiae hae haai , parantu hamare pita ibraaheem ke us vishvas kee leek par bhee chalate haai , jo us ne bin khtane kee dasha men kiya tha .
45004013	kyonaki yah pratigyaa ki vah jagat ka vaaris hoga , n ibraaheem ko , n usake vansh ko vyavastha ke dara dee gai thee , parantu vishvas kee dhaaarmikata ke dara milee .
45004014	kyonaki yadi vyavasthavale varis haai , to vishvas vyarth aur pratigyaa nishfal ttharee .
45004015	vyavastha to krodha upajatee haai aur jahan vyavastha naheen vahan usaka ttalana bhee naheen .
45004016	isee karan vah vishvas ke dara milatee haai , ki anugrah kee reeti par ho , ki pratigyaa sab vansh ke liye draddh ho , n ki keval usak liye jo vyavasthavala haai , baran un ke liye bhee jo ibraaheem ke saman vishvasavale haain : vahee to ham sab ka pita haai .
45004017	jaaisa likha haai , ki maain ne tujhe bahut see jaatiyon ka pita ttharaya haai us paramashevar ke samhane jis par us ne vishvas kiya aur jo mare huon ko jilata haai , aur jo baten haain hee nahee , un ka nam aeesa leta haai , ki mano ve haain .
45004018	us ne nirasha men bhee asha rakhkar vishvas kiya , isaliye ki us vachan ke anusar ki tera vansh aeesa hoga vah bahut see jaatiyon ka pita ho .
45004019	aur vah jo aek sau varsha ka tha , apane mare hae se shareer aur sara ke garbh kee maree hui kee see dasha janakar bhee vishvas men nirbal n hua .
45004020	aur n avishvasee hokar parameshvar kee pratigyaa par sandeh kiya , par vishvas men draddh hokar parameshvar kee mahima kee .
45004021	aur nishchay jana , ki jis bat kee us ne pratigyaa kee haai , vah use pooree karane ko bhee samarthee haai .
45004022	is kara , yah usake liye dhaarmikata gina gaya .
45004023	aur yah vachan , ki vishvas usake liye dhaarmikata giya gaya , n keval usee ke liye likha gaya .
45004024	baran hamare liye bhee jin ke liye vishvas dhaaarmikata gina jaega , arthata hamare liye jo us par vishvas karate haai , jis ne hamare prabhu yeesha ko mare huon men se jilaya .
45004025	vah hamare aparadhaen ke liye pakadvaya gaya , aur hamare dharmee ttharane ke liye jilaya bhee gaya . .
45005001	se jab ham vishvas se dharmee tthare , to apane prabhu yeesha maseeh ke dara parameshvar ke sath mel rakhen .
45005002	jis ke dara vishvas ke karan us anugrah tak , jis men ham bane haai , hamaree pahunch bhee hui , aur parameshvar kee maahima kee asha par ghamand karen .
45005003	keval yahee nahee , baran ham kleshaen men bhee ghamand kare , yahee janakar ki klesh se dhaeeraja .
45005004	or dhaeeraj se khra nikalana , aur khre nikalane se asha utpann hotee haai .
45005005	aur asha se lajja naheen hotee , kyonki pavitra atma jo hamen diya gaya haai usake dara parameshvar ka praem hamare man men dala gaya haai .
45005006	kyonaki jab ham nirbal hee the , to maseeh tteek samay par bhaktaiheenon ke liye mara .
45005007	kisee dharmee jan ke liye koi mare , yah to durlabh haai , parantu kya jane kisee bhle manushy ke liye koi marane ka bhee hiyav kare .
45005008	parantu parameshvar ham par apane praem kee bhlai is reeati se pragatt karata haai , ki jab ham papee hee the tabhee maseeh hamare liye mara .
45005009	so jab ki ham , ab usake lohoon ke karan dharmee tthare , to usake dara krodha se kyon n bachenge ?
45005010	kyonaki baairee hone kee dasha men to usake putra kee mratyu ke dara hamara mel parameshvar ke sath hua fir mel ho jane par usake jeevan ke karan ham uddhar kyon n paenge ?
45005011	aur keval yahee nahee , parantu ham apane prabhu yeesha maseeh ke dara jis ke dara hamara mel hua haai , parameshvar ke vishay men ghamand bhee karate haain . .
45005012	isaliye jaaisa aek manushy ke dara pap jagat men aya , aur pap ke dara mratyu ai , aur is reeti se mratyu sab manushyon men faail gai , isaliye ki sab ne pap kiya .
45005013	kyonaki vyavastha ke diae jane tak pap jagat men to tha , parantu jahan vyavastha nahee , vahan pap gina naheen jata .
45005014	taubhee adam se lekar moosa tak mratyu ne un logon par bhee rajy kiya , jinhon ne us adam ke aparadha kee nain jo us anevale ka chinh haai , pap n kiya .
45005015	par jaaisa aparadha kee dasha haai , vaaisee anugrah ke baradan kee nahee , kyonki jab aek manushy ke aparadha se bahut log mare , to parameshvar ka anugrah aur usaka jo dan aek manushy ke , arthata yeesha maseeh ke anugrah se hua bahutere lagon par avashy hee adhaikai se hua .
45005016	aur jaaisa aek manushy ke pap karane ka fal hua , vaaisa hee dan kee dasha nahee , kyonki aek hee ke karan dand kee agyaa ka faaisala hu , parantu bahutere aparadhaen se aeesa baradan utpann hua , ki log dharmee tthare .
45005017	kyonaki jab aek manushy ke aparadha ke karan mratyu ne us aek hee ke dara rajy kiya , to jo log anugrah aur dharmaroomee baradan bahutayat se pate haain ve aek manushy ke , arthata yeesha maseeh ke dara avashy hee anant jeevan men rajy karenge .
45005018	isaliye jaaisa aek aparadha sab manushyon ke liye dand kee agyaa ka karan hua , vesa hee aek dharma ka kam bhee sab manushyon ke liye jeevan ke nimitt dharmee ttharae jane ka karan hua .
45005019	kyonaki jaaisa aek manushy ke agyaa n manane se bahut log papee tthare , vaaise hee aek manushy ke agyaa manane se bahut log dharmee ttharenge .
45005020	aur vyavastha beech men a gai , ki aparadha bahut ho , parantu jahan pap bahut hua , vahan anugrah us se bhee kaheen adhaik hua .
45005021	ki jaaisa pap ne mratyu faailate hae rajy kiya , vaaisa hee hamare prabhu yeesha maseeh ke dara anugrah bhee anant jeevan ke liye dharmee ttharate hae rajy kare . .
45006001	so ham kya kahen ? kya ham pap karate rahe , ki anugrah bahut ho ?
45006002	kadapi nahee , ham jab pap ke liye mar gaae to fir age ko us men kyonkar jeevan binaen ?
45006003	kya tum naheen janate , ki ham jitanon ne maseeh yeesha ka bapaatisma liya to us kee mratyu ka bapatisma liya ?
45006004	so us mratyu ka bapatisma pane se ham usake sath gade gaa , taki jaaise maseeh pita kee maahima ke dara mare huon men se jilaya gaya , vaaise hee ham bhee naae jeevan kee see chal chalen .
45006005	kyonaki yadi ham us kee mratyu kee samanata men usake sath jutt gaae haai , to nishchay usake jee uttne kee samanata men bhee jutt jaenge .
45006006	kyonaki ham janate haain ki hamara purana manushyatv usake sath kroos par chaddhaya gaya , taaki pap ka shareer vyarth ho ja , taki ham age ko pap ke dasatv men n rahen .
45006007	kyonaki jo mar gaya , vah pap se choottkar dharmee tthara .
45006008	so yaadi ham maseeh ke sath mar gaa , to hamara vishvas yah haai , ki usake sath jaenge bhee .
45006009	kyonaki yah janate haai , ki maseeh mare huon men se jee uttkar fir marane ka nahee , us par fir mratyu kee prabhuta naheen hone kee .
45006010	kyonaki vah jo mar gaya to pap ke liye aek hee bar mar gaya parantu jo jeeavit haai , to parameshvar ke liye jeeavit haai .
45006011	aeese hee tum bhee apane ap ko pap ke liye to mara , parantu parameshvar ke liye maseeh yeesha men jeeavit samajho .
45006012	isaliye pap tumhare maranahar shareer men rajy n kare , ki tum us kee lalasaon ke adhaeen raho .
45006013	aur n apane ango ko adharma ke hathaiyar hone ke liye pap ko saunpo , par apane ap ko mare huon men se jee utta hua janakar paramashevar ko saunpo , aur apane ango ko dharma ke hathaiyar hone ke liye parameshvar ko saunpo .
45006014	aur tum par pap kee prabhuta n hogee , kyonaki tum vyavastha ke adhaeen naheen baran anugrah ke adhaeen ho . .
45006015	to kya hua ? kya ham isaaliye pap kare , ki ham vyavastha ke adhaeen naheen baran anugrah ke adhaeen haain ? kadaapi naheen .
45006016	kya tum naheen janate , ki jis kee agyaa manane ke liye tum apane ap ko dason kee nain saunp dete ho , usee ke das ho : aur jis kee manate ho , chahe pap ke , jis ka ant mratyu haai , chahe agyaa manane ke , jis ka ant dhaarmikata haai ?
45006017	parantu paramashevar ka dhanyavad ho , ki tum jo pap ke das the taubhee man se us upadesh ke mananevale ho gaa , jis ke sanche men ddhale gaae the .
45006018	aur pap se chhudaae jakar dharma ke das ho gaae .
45006019	maain tumharee shaareearik durbalata ke karan manushyon kee reeati par kahata hoo , jaaise tum ne apane ango ko kukarma ke liye ashauddhta aur kukarma ke das karake saunpa tha , vaaise hee ab apane angon ko paavitrata ke liye dharma ke das karake saunp do .
45006020	jab tum pap ke das the , to dharma kee or se svatantra the .
45006021	so jin baton se ab tum laajjait hote ho , un se us samay tum kya fal pate the ?
45006022	kyonaki un ka ant to mratyu haai parantu ab pap se svatantra hokar aur parameshvar ke das banakar tum ko fal mila jis se pavitrata praapt hotee haai , aur usaka ant anant jeevan haai .
45006023	kyonaki pap kee majadooree to mratyu haai , parantu parameshvar ka baradan hamare prabhu yeesha maseeh men anant jeevan haai . .
45007001	he bhaiyo , kya tum naheen jatane maain vyavastha ke jananevalon se kahata hoon , ki jab tak manushy jeevit rahata haai , tak tak us par vyavastha kee praboota rahatee haai ?
45007002	kyonaki vivaahita sree vyavastha ke anusar apane paati ke jeete jee us se bandhaee haai , parantu yaadi pati mar ja , to vah paati kee vyavastha se choott gai .
45007003	so yaadi pati ke jeete jee vah kisee doosare puroosh kee ho ja , to vyaabhaichaarinee kahalaegee , parantu yadi pati mar ja , to vah us vyavastha se choott gai , yahan tak ki yadi kisee doosare puroosh kee ho ja , taubhee vyabhaichaarinee n ttharegee .
45007004	so he mere bhaiyo , tum bhee maseeh kee deh ke dara vyavastha ke liye mare hae ban gaa , ki us doosare ke ho jao , jo mare huon men se jee utta : taaki ham parameshvar ke liye fal laen .
45007005	kyonaki jab ham shaareerik the , to papon kee aabhailashaayen jo vyavastha ke dara thee , mratyu ka fal utpann karane ke liye hamare angon men kam karatee theen .
45007006	parantu jis ke bandhan men ham the usake liye mar kar , ab vyavastha se aeese choott gaa , ki lekh kee puranee reeti par nahee , baran atma kee nai reeti par seva karate haain . .
45007007	to ham kya kahen ? kya vyavastha pap haai ? kadaapi naheen ! baran bina vyavastha ke maain pap ko naheen paahichanata : vyavastha yaadi n kahatee , ki lalach mat kar to maain lalach ko n janata .
45007008	parantu pap ne avasar pakar agyaa ke dara mujh men sab prakar ka lalach utpann kiya , kyonaki bina vyavastha ke pap murda haai .
45007009	maain to vyavastha bina paahile jeeavit tha , parantu jab agyaa ai , to pap jee gaya , aur maain mar gaya .
45007010	aur vahee agyaa jo jeevan ke liye thee mere liye mratyu ka karan ttharee .
45007011	kyonaki pap ne avasar pakar agyaa ke dara mujhai bahakaya , aur usee ke dara mujhe mar bhee dala .
45007012	isaliye vyavastha paavitra haai , aur agyaa bhee tteek aur achchhee haai .
45007013	to kya vah jo achchhee thee , mere liye mratyu ttharee ? kadapi naheen ! parantu pap us achchhee vastu ke dara mere liye mratyu ka utpann karanevala hua ki usaka pap hona pragatt ho , aur agyaa ke dara pap bahut hee papamay tthare .
45007014	kyonaki ham janate haain ki vyavastha to atmaik haai , parantu maain shareerik aur pap ke hath bika hua hoon .
45007015	aur jo maain karata hoo , us ko naheen janata , kyonaki jo maain chahata hoo , vah naheen kiya karata , parantu jis se mujhe gharana atee haai , vahee karata hoon .
45007016	aur yaadi , jo maain naheen chahata vahee karata hoo , to maain man leta hoo , ki vyavastha bhlee haai .
45007017	to aeesee dasha men usaka karanevala maain nahee , baran pap haai , jo mujh men basa hua haai .
45007018	kyonaki maain janata hoo , ki mujh men arthata mere shareer men koi achchhee vastu vas naheen karatee , ichchha to mujh men haai , parantu bhle kam mujh se ban naheen padte .
45007019	kyonaki jis achchhe kam kee maain ichchha karata hoo , vah to naheen karata , parantu jis burai kee ichchha naheen karata vahee kiya karata hoon .
45007020	parantu yadi maain vahee karata hoo , jis kee ichchha naheen karata , to usaka karanevala maain n raha , parantu pap jo mujh men basa hua haai .
45007021	so maain yah vyavastha pata hoo , ki jab bhlai karane kee ichchha karata hoo , to burai mere pas atee haai .
45007022	kyonaki maain bheetaree manushyatv se to parameshvar kee vyavastha se bahut prasann rahata hoon .
45007023	parantu mujhe apane ango men doosare prakar kee vyavastha dikhai padtee haai , jo meree buaddh ikee vyavastha se ladtee haai , aur mujhe pap kee vyavastha ke bandhan men dalatee haai jo mere angon men haai .
45007024	maain kaaisa abhaga manushy hoon ! mujhe is mratyu kee deh se kaun chhudaaega ?
45007025	maain apane prabhu yeesha maseeh ke dara parameshvar ka dhanyavad karata hoon : nidan maain ap buddh ise to parameshvar kee vyavastha ka , parantu shareer se pap kee vyavastha ka sevan karata hoon . .
45008001	so ab jo maseeh yeesha men haai , un par dand kee agyaa naheen : kyonki ve shareer ke anusar naheen baran atma ke anusar chalate haain .
45008002	kyonaki jeevan kee atma kee vyavastha ne maseeh yeesha men mujhe pap kee , aur mratyu kee vyavastha se svatantra kar diya .
45008003	kyonaki jo kam vyavastha shareer ke karan durbal hokar n kar sakee , us ko parameshvar ne kiya , arthata apane hee putra ko papamay shareer kee samanata me , aur pap ke balidan hone ke liye bhejakar , shareer men pap par dand kee agyaa dee .
45008004	isaliye ki vyavastha kee vidhai ham men jo shareer ke anusar naheen baran atma ke anusar chalate haai , pooree kee jae .
45008005	kyonaki shareearik vyaaktai shareer kee baton par man lagate haain parantu adhyaatmaik atma kee baton par man lagate haain .
45008006	shareer par man lagana to mratyu haai , parantu atma par man lagana jeevan aur shaantai haai .
45008007	kyonaki shareer par man lagana to parameshvar se baair rakhna haai , kyonaki n to parameshvar kee vyavastha ke adhaeen haai , aur n ho sakata haai .
45008008	aur jo shaareearik dasha men haai , ve parameshvar ko prasann naheen kar sakate .
45008009	parantu jab ki parameshvar ka atma tum men basata haai , to tum shaareearik dasha men nahee , parantu aatmaik dasha men ho . yaadi kisee men maseeh ka atma naheen to vah usaka jan naheen .
45008010	aur yaadi maseeh tum men haai , to deh pap ke karan maree hui haai parantu atma dharma ke karan jeeavit haai .
45008011	aur yaadi usee ka atma jis ne yeesha ko mare huon men se jilaya tum men basa hua haai to jis ne maseeh ko mare huon men se jilaya , vah tumharee maranahar dehon ko bhee apane atma ke dara jo tum men basa hua haai jilaega .
45008012	so he bhaiyo , ham shareer ke karjadan nahee , taki shareer ke anusar din katten .
45008013	kyonaki yadi tum shareer ke anusar din kattoge , to maroge , yadi atma se deh kee kriyaon ko maroge , to jeevit rahoge .
45008014	isaliye ki jitane log parameshvar ke atma ke chalae chalate haai , ve hee parameshvar ke putra haain .
45008015	kyonaki tum ko dasatv kee atma naheen milee , ki fir bhyabheet ho parantu lepalakapan kee atma milee haai , jis se ham he abba , he pita kahakar pukarate haain .
45008016	atma ap hee hamaree atma ke sath gavahee deta haai , ki ham parameshvar kee santan haain .
45008017	aur yaadi santan haai , to varis bhee , baran parameshvar ke vaaris aur maseeh ke sangee vaaris haai , jab ki ham usake sath dukh uttaaen ki usake sath mahima bhee paen . .
45008018	kyonaki maain samajhta hoo , ki is samay ke du : kh aur klesh us maahima ke samhane , jo ham par pragatt honevalee haai , kuchh bhee naheen haain .
45008019	aikyonki srashtti badee ashaabhree drashtti se parameshvar ke putraen ke pragatt hone kee batt joh rahee haai .
45008020	kyonaki srashtti apanee ichchha se naheen par adhaeen karanevale kee or se vyarthta ke adhaeen is asha se kee gai .
45008021	ki srashtti bhee ap hee vinash ke dasatv se chhuttkara pakar , parameshvar kee santanon kee maahima kee svatantrata praapt karegee .
45008022	kyonaki ham janate haai , ki saree sraashtti ab tak milakar kaharatee aur peedaon men padee tadpatee haai .
45008023	aur keval vahee naheen par ham bhee jin ke pas atma ka pahila fal haai , ap hee apane men kaharate haain aur lepalak hone kee , arthata apanee deh ke chhuttkare kee batt johate haain .
45008024	asha ke dara to hamara uddhar hua haai parantu jis vastu kee asha kee jatee haai jab vah dekhne men a , to fir asha kahan rahee ? kyoki jis vastu ko koi dekh raha haai us kee asha kya karega ?
45008025	parantu jis vastu ko ham naheen dekhte , yaadi us kee asha rakhte haai , to dhaeeraj se us kee batt jahate bhee haain . .
45008026	isee reeti se atma bhee hamaree durbalata men sahayata karata haai , kyonaki ham naheen janate , ki praarthna kis reeti se karana chahiae parantu atma ap hee aeesee ahen bhr bhrakar jo bayan se bahar haai , hamare liye binatee karata haai .
45008027	aur manon ka janchanevala janata haai , ki atma kee manasa kya haai ? kyonki vah pavitra logon ke liye parameshvar kee ichchha ke anusar binatee karata haai .
45008028	aur ham janate haai , ki jo log parameshvar se praem rakhte haai , un ke liye sab baten milakar bhlai hee ko utpann karatee haai arthata unheen ke liye jo us kee ichchha ke anusar bulae hae haain .
45008029	kyonaki jinhen us ne pahile se jan liya haai unhen paahile se ttharaya bhee haai ki usake putra ke svaroop men hon taaki vah bahut bhaiyon men paahilautta tthare .
45008030	fir jinhen un se pahile se ttharaya , unhen bulaya bhee , aur jinhen bulaya , unhen dharmee bhee ttharaya haai , aur jinhen dharmee ttharaya , unhen mahima bhee dee haai . .
45008031	so ham in baton ke vishay men kya kahen ? yadi parameshvar hamaree or haai , to hamara virodhaee kaun ho sakata haai ?
45008032	jis ne apane nij putra ko bhee n rakh chhoda , parantu use ham sab ke liye de diya : vah usake sath hamen aur sab kuchh kyonkar n dega ?
45008033	parameshvar ke chune huon par dosh kaun lagaega ? parameshvar vah haai jo unako dharmee ttharanevala haai .
45008034	fir kaun haai jo dand kee agyaa dega ? maseeh vah haai jo mar gaya baran murdon men se jee bhee utta , aur parameshvar kee daahitee or haai , aur hamare liye nivedan bhee karata haai .
45008035	kaun ham ko maseeh ke praem se alag karega ? kya klesha , ya sankat , ya upadrav , ya akal , ya nangai , ya jokhaim , ya talavara ?
45008036	jaaisa likha haai , ki tere liye ham din bhr ghaat kiae jate haain ham vadha honevalee bhendon kee nai gine gaae haain .
45008037	parantu in sab baton men ham usake dara jis ne ham se praem kiya haai , jayavant se bhee baddhkar haain .
45008038	kyonaki maain nishchay janata hoo , ki n mratyu , n jeevan , n svargadoot , n pradhaanatae , n vartaman , n bhavishy , n samarth , n unchai ,
45008039	n gahirai aur n koi aur srashtti , hamen parameshvar ke praem se , jo hamare prabhu maseeh yeesha men haai , alag kar sakegee . .
45009001	maain maseeh men sach kahata hoo , joott naheen bolata aur mera vivek bhee paavitra atma men gavahee deta haai .
45009002	ki mujhe bada shaek haai , aur mera man sada dukhta rahata haai .
45009003	kyonaki maain yahan tak chahata tha , ki apane bhaiyo , ke liye jo shareer ke bhav se mere kuttumbee haai , ap hee maseeh se shaapit ho jata .
45009004	ve israaelee haain aur lepalakapan ka hakk aur mahima aur vachaen aur vyavastha aur upasana aur pratigyaaaen unheen kee haain .
45009005	purakhe bhee unheen ke haai , aur maseeh bhee shareer ke bhav se unheen men se hua , jo sab ke upar param parameshvar yuganuyug dhany haai . ameena .
45009006	parantu yah nahee , ki parameshvar ka vachan ttl gaya , isaaliye ki jo israael ke vansh haai , ve sab israaelee naheen .
45009007	aur n ibraaheem ke vansh hone ke karan sab us kee santan tthare , parantu likha haai ki isahak hee se tera vansh kahalaega .
45009008	arthata shareer kee santan parameshvar kee santan nahee , parantu praatigyaa ke santan vansh gine jate haain .
45009009	kyonaki pratigyaa ka vachan yah haai , ki maain is samay ke anusar aunga , aur sara ke putra hoga .
45009010	aur keval yahee nahee , parantu jab ribaka bhee aek se arthata hamare pita isahak se garbhvatee thee .
45009011	aur abhee tak n to balak janme the , aur n unhon ne kuchh bhla ya bura kiya tha ki us ne kaha , ki jetta chhuttke ka das hoga .
45009012	isaliye ki parameshvar kee manasa jo usake chun lene ke anusar haai , karmon ke karan nahee , parantu bulanevale par banee rahe .
45009013	jaaisa likha haai , ki maain ne yakoob se praem kiya , parantu aesau ko aapiry jana . .
45009014	so ham kya kahen ? kya parameshvar ke yahan anyay haai ? kadapi naheen !
45009015	kyonaki vah moosa se kahata haai , maain jis kisee par daya karana chahoo , us par daya karoonga , aur jis kisee par krapa karana chahoon usee par krapa karoonga .
45009016	so yah n to chahanevale kee , n daudnevale kee parantu daya karanevale parameshvar kee bat haai .
45009017	kyeanki pavitra shaasr men firaun se kaha gaya , ki maain ne tujhe isee liye khda kiya haai , ki tujh men apanee samarth dikhau , aur mere nam ka prachar saree prathvee par ho .
45009018	so vah jis par chahata haai , us par daya karata haai aur jise chahata haai , use kattor kar deta haai .
45009019	so too mujh se kahega , vah fir kyon dosh lagata haai ? kaun us kee ichchha ka samhana karata haain ?
45009020	he manushy , bhla too kaun haai , jo parameshvar ka samhana karata haai ? kya gaddhee hui vastu gaddhnevale se kah sakatee haai ki too ne mujhe aeesa kyon banaya haai ?
45009021	kya kumhar ko mittee par aadhaikar nahee , ki aek hee launde me se , aek baratan adar ke liye , aur doosare ko anadar ke liye banae ? to is men kaun see achambhe kee bat haai ?
45009022	ki parameshvar ne apana krodha dikhane aur apanee samarth pragatt karane kee ichchha se krodha ke baratanon kee , jo vinash ke liye taaiyar kiae gaae the bade dhaeeraj se sahee .
45009023	aur daya ke baratanon par jinhen us ne mahima ke liye paahile se taaiyar kiya , apane maahima ke dhan ko pragatt karane kee ichchha kee ?
45009024	arthata ham par jinhen us ne n keval yahoodiyon men se baran anyajaatiyon men se bhee bulaya .
45009025	jaaisa vah hosho kee pustak men bhee kahata haai , ki jo meree praja n thee , unhen maain apanee praja kahoonga , aur jo pirya n thee , use pirya kahoonga .
45009026	aur aeesa hoga ki jis jagah men un se yah kaha gaya tha , ki tum meree praja naheen ho , usee jagah ve jeevate parameshvar kee santan kahalaenge .
45009027	aur yashaayah israael ke vishay men pukarakar kahata haai , ki chahe israael kee santanon kee ginatee samudra ke baloo ke barabar ho , taubhee un men se thode hee bachenge .
45009028	kyonaki prabhu apana vachan prathvee par poora karake , dhaaarmikata se shaeegha use siddh karega .
45009029	jaaisa yashaayah ne pahile bhee kaha tha , ki yadi senaon ka prabhu hamare liye kuchh vansh n chhodta , to ham sadom kee nain ho jate , aur amora ke sareekhe ttharate . .
45009030	so ham kya kahen ? yah ki anyajaatiyon ne jo dhaarmikata kee khoj naheen karate the , dhaarmikata praapt kee arthata us dhaaarmikata ko jo vishvas se haai .
45009031	parantu israaelee jo dharma kee vyavastha kee khoj karate hae us vyavastha tak naheen pahunche .
45009032	kis liye ? isaliye ki ve vishvas se nahee , parantu manon karmon se us kee khoj karate the : unhon ne us ttokar ke patthr par ttokar khai .
45009033	jaaisa likha haai dekho maain siyyon men aek ttes lagane ka patthr , aur ttokar khane kee chattan rakhta hoon aur jo us par vishvas karega , vah lajjait n hoga . .
45010001	he bhaiyo , mere man kee abhailasha aur un ke liye parameshvar se meree praarthna haai , ki ve uddhar paen .
45010002	kyonaki maain un kee gavahee deta hoo , ki un ko parameshvar ke liye dhaun rahatee haai , parantu buddhmaianee ke sath naheen .
45010003	kyonkai ve parameshvar kee dhaaarmikata se anajan hokar , aur apanee dhaaarmikata sthapan karane ka yatn karake , parameshvar kee dhaarmikata ke adhaeen n hae .
45010004	kyonaki har aek vishvas karanevale ke liye dhaarmikata ke nimitt maseeh vyavastha ka ant haai .
45010005	kyonaki moosa ne yah likha haai , ki jo manushy us dhaaarmikata par jo vyavastha se haai , chalata haai , vah isee karan jeevit rahega .
45010006	parantu jo dhaaarmikata vishvas se haai , vah yon kahatee haai , ki too apane man men yah n kahana ki svarga par kaun chaddhega ? arthata maseeh ko utar lane ke liye !
45010007	ya gaahirav men kaun utarega ? arthata maseeh ko mare huon men se jilakar upar lane ke liye !
45010008	parantu kya kahatee haai ? yah , ki vachan tere nikatt haai , tere munh men aur tere man men haai yah vahee vishvas ka vachan haai , jo ham prachar karate haain .
45010009	ki yadi too apane munh se yeesha ko prabhu janakar angeekar kare aur apane man se vishvas kare , ki parameshvar ne use mare huon men se jilaya , to too nishchay uddhar paega .
45010010	kyonaki dhaaarmikata ke liye man se vishvas kiya jata haai , aur uddhar ke liye munh se angeekar kiya jata haai .
45010011	kyonaki pavitra shaasr yah kahata haai ki jo koi us par vishvas karega , vah lajjait n hoga .
45010012	yahoodiyon aur yoonaaniyon men kuchh bhed nahee , isaaliye ki vah sab ka prabhu haai aur apane sab nam lenevalon ke liye udar haai .
45010013	kyonaki jo koi prabhu ka nam lega , vah uddhar paega .
45010014	fir jis par unhon ne vishvas naheen kiya , ve usaka nam kyonkar len ? aur jis kee naheen sunee us par kyonkar vishvas karen ?
45010015	aur pracharak bina kyonkar sunen ? aur yadi bheje n jae , to kyonkar prachar karen ? jaaisa likha haai , ki un ke panv kya hee sohavane haai , jo achchhee baton ka susamachar sunate haain .
45010016	parantu sab ne us susamachar par kan n lagaya : yashaayah kahata haai , ki he prabhu , kis ne hamare samachar kee prateeati kee haai ?
45010017	so vishvas sunane se , aur sunana maseeh ke vachan se hota haai .
45010018	parantu maain kahata hoo , kya unhon ne naheen suna ? suna to sahee kyonaki likha haai ki un ke svar saree prathvee par , aur un ke vachan jagat kee chhor tak pahunch gaae haain .
45010019	fir maain kahata hoon . kya israaelee naheen janate the ? paahile to moosa kahata haai , ki maain un ke dara jo jati nahee , tumhare man men jalan upajaunga , maain aek mooddh jati ke dara tumhen ris dilaunga .
45010020	fir yashaayah bade hiyav ke sath kahata haai , ki jo mujhe naheen ddoonddhte the , unhon ne mujhe pa liya : aur jo mujhe poochhte bhee n the , un par maain pragatt ho gaya .
45010021	parantu israael ke vishay men vah yah kahata haai ki maain sare din apane hath aek agyaa n mananevalee aur vivad karanevalee praja kee or pasare raha . .
45011001	isaliye maain kahata hoo , kya parameshvar ne apanee praja ko tyag diya ? kadapi naheen maain bhee to israaelee hoon : ibraaheem ke vansh aur binyameen ke gotra men se hoon .
45011002	parameshvar ne apanee us praja ko naheen tyaga , jise us ne paahile hee se jana : kya tum naheen janate , ki pavitra shaasr aeliyah kee katha men kya kahata haai ki vah israael ke virodha men parameshvar se binatee karata haai .
45011003	ki he prabhu , unhon ne tere bhvishyadvktaon ko ghaat kiya , aur teree vediyon ko ddha diya haai aur maain hee akela bach raha hoo , aur ve mere praan ke bhee khojee haain .
45011004	parantu parameshvar se use kya uttr mila ki maain ne apane liye sat hajar purooshaen ko rakh chhoda haai jinhon ne baal ke ag ghauttne naheen tteke haain .
45011005	so isee reeti se is samay bhee , anugrah se chune hae kitane log bakee haain .
45011006	yaadi yah anugrah se hua haai , to fir karmon se nahee , naheen to anugrah fir anugrah naheen raha .
45011007	so paarinam kya hua ? yah ki israaelee jis kee khoj men haai , vah un ko naheen mila parantu chune huon ko mila aur shosh log kattor kiae gaae haain .
45011008	jaaisa likha haai , ki parameshvar ne unhen aj ke din tak bharee neend men dal rakha haai aur aeesee ankhen dee jo n dekhen aur aeese kan jo n sunen .
45011009	aur daud kahata haai un ka bhojan un ke liye jal , aur fanda , aur ttokar , aur dand ka karan ho jae .
45011010	un kee ankhon par andhora chha jae taki n dekhe , aur too sada un kee peett ko jhukae rakh .
45011011	so maain kahata hoon kya unhon ne isaaliye ttokar khai , ki gir paden ? kadapi naheen : parantu un ke girane ke karan anyajaniyon ko uddhar mila , ki unhen jalan ho .
45011012	so yaadi un ka girana jagat ke liye dhan aur un kee ghattee anyajaatiyon ke liye sampaati ka karan hua , to un kee bhrapooree se kitana n hoga . .
45011013	maain tum anyajaatiyon se yah baten kahata hoon : jab ki maain anyajatiyon ke liye praerit hoo , to maain apanee seva kee badai karata hoon .
45011014	taaki kisee reeati se maain apane kuttumbaiyon se jalan karavakar un men se kai aek ka uddhar karaun .
45011015	kyonaki jab ki un ka tyag diya jana jagat ke milap ka karan hua , to kya un ka grahan kiya jana mare huon men se jee uttne ke barabar n hoga ?
45011016	jab bhentt ka pahila peda paavitra tthara , to poora gundha hua atta bhee paavitra haai : aur jab jad paavitra ttharee , to daaliyan bhee aeesee hee haain .
45011017	aur yaadi kai aek dalee tod dee gai , aur too jangalee jalapai hokar un men satta gaya , aur jalapai kee jad kee chikanai ka bhagee hua haai .
45011018	to daaliyon par ghamand n karana : aur yadi too ghamand kare , to jan rak , ki too jad ko nahee , parantu jad tujhe sambhalatee haai .
45011019	fir too kahega daliyan isaliye todee gai , ki maain satta jaun .
45011020	bhla , ve to avishvas ke karan todee gai , parantu too vishvas se bana rahata haai isaliye aabhaimanee n ho , parantu bhy kara .
45011021	kyonaki jab parameshvar ne svabhavik daliyan n chhodee , to tujhe bhee n chhodega .

46001010	he bhaiyo , maain tum se yeesha maseeh jo hamara prabhu haai usake nam ke dara binatee karata hoo , ki tum sab aek hee bat kaho aur tum men foott n ho , parantu aek hee man aur aek hee mat hokar mile raho .
46001011	kyonaki he mere bhaiyo , khloae ke gharane ke logon ne mujhe tumhare vishay men bataya haai , ki tum men jhgade ho rahe haain .
46001012	mera kahana yah haai , ki tum men se koi to apane ap ko paulus ka , koi apullos ka , koi kaaifaa ka , koi maseeh ka kahata haai .
46001013	kya maseeh batt gaya ? kya paulus tumhare liye kroos par chaddhaya gaya ? ya tumhen paulus ke nam par bapatisma mila ?
46001014	maain parameshvar ka dhanyavad karata hoo , ki krispus aur gayus ko chhod , maain ne tum men se kisee ko bhee bapatisma naheen diya .
46001015	kaheen aeesa nah ho , ki koi kahe , ki tumhen mere nam par bapatisma mila .

46001018	kyonaki kroos kee katha nash honevalon ke nikatt moorkhta haai , parantu ham uddhar panevalon ke nikatt parameshvar kee samarth haai .
46001019	kyoki likha haai , ki maain gyaanavanon ke gyaan ko nash karoonga , aur samajhdaron kee samajh ko tuchchh kar doonga .
46001020	kahan raha gyaanavana ? kahan raha shaasree ? kahan is sansar ka vivadee ? kya parameshvar ne sansar ke gyaan ko moorkhta naheen ttharaya ?
46001021	kyonaki jab parameshvar ke gyaan ke anusar sansar ne gyaan se parameshvar ko n jana to parameshvar ko yah achchha laga , ki is prakar kee moorkhta ke dara vishvas karanevalon ko uddhar de .
46001022	yahoodee to chinh chahate haai , aur yoonanee gyaan kee khoj men haain .
46001023	parantu ham to us kroos par chaddhaae hae maseeh ka prachar karate haain jo yahoodiyon ke nikatt ttokar ka kara , aur anyajaatiyon ke nikatt moorkhta haai .
46001024	parantu jo bulae hae haain kya yahoodee , kya yoonanee , un ke nikatt maseeh parameshvar kee samarth , aur parameshvar ka gyaan haai .
46001025	kyonaki parameshvar kee moorkhta manushyon ke gyaan se gyaanavan haai aur parameshvar kee nirbalata manushyon ke bal se bahut balavan haai . .
46001026	he bhaiyo , apane bulae jane ko to socho , ki n shareer ke anusar bahut gyaanavan , aur n bahut samarthee , aur n bahut kuleen bulae gaae .
46001027	parantu parameshvar ne jagat ke moorkhon ko chun liya haai , ki gyaanavalon ko laajjait kare aur parameshvar ne jagat ke nirbalon ko chun liya haai , ki balavanon ko laajjait kare .
46001028	aur parameshvar ne jagat ke neechon aur tuchchhon ko , baran jo haain bhee naheen un ko bhee chun liya , ki unhen jo haai , vyarth ttharae .
46001029	taaki koi praanee parameshvar ke samhane ghamand n karane pae .
46001030	parantu usee kee or se tum maseeh yeesha men ho , jo parameshvar kee or se hamare liye gyaan tthara arthata dharma , aur pavitrata , aur chhuttkara .
46001031	taaki jaaisa likha haai , vaaisa hee ho , ki jo ghamand kare vah prabhu men ghamand kare . .
46002001	aur he bhaiyo , jab maain parameshvar ka bhed sunata hua tumhare pas aya , to vachan ya gyaan kee uttmata ke sath naheen aya .
46002002	kyonaki maain ne yah ttan liya tha , ki tumhare beech yeesha maseeh , baran kroos par chaddhaae hae maseeh ko chhod aur kisee bat ko n janoon .

46002004	or mere vachan , aur mere prachar men gyaan kee lubhanevalee baten naheen parantu atma aur samarth ka praman tha .

46002010	parantu parameshvar ne un ko apane atma ke dara ham par pragatt kiya kyonaki atma ke dara ham par pragatt kiya kyonaki atma sab bate , baran parameshvar kee gooddh baten bhee janchata haai .
46002011	manushyon men se kaun kisee manushy kee baten janata , keval manushy kee baten bhee koi naheen janata , keval paramevar ka atma .
46002012	parantu ham ne sansar kee atma nahee , parantu vah atma paya haai , jo parameshvar kee or se haai , ki ham un baton ko jane , jo parameshvar ne hamen dee haain .
46002013	jin ko ham manushyon ke gyaan kee sikhai hui baton men nahee , parantu atma kee sikhai hui baton me , atmaik baten aatmaik baton se mila milakar sunate haain .
46002014	paranatu shaareerik manushy parameshvar ke atma kee baten grahan naheen karata , kyonaki ve us kee drashtti men moorkhta kee baten haai , aur n vah unhen jan sakata haai kyonaki un kee janch aatmaik reeti se hotee haai .
46002015	aatmaik jan sab kuchh janchata haai , parantu vah ap kisee se jancha naheen jata .
46002016	kyonaki prabhu ka man kis ne jana haai , ki use sikhlae ? parantu ham men maseeh ka man haai . .
46003001	he bhaiyo , maain tum se is reeati se baten n kar saka , jaaise aatmaik logon se parantu jaaise shaareerik logon se , aur un se jo maseeh men balak haain .
46003002	men ne tumhen doodha pilaya , ann n khailaya kyonki tum us ko n kha sakate the baran ab tak bhee naheen kha sakate ho .
46003003	kyonaki ab tak shaareerik ho , isaaliye , ki jab tum men dah aur jhgada haai , to kya tum shaareearik naheen ? aur manushy kee reeti par naheen chalate ?
46003004	isaliye ki jab aek kahata haai , ki maain paulus ka hoo , aur doosara ki maain apullos ka hoo , to kya tum manushy naheen ?
46003005	apullos kya haai ? aur paulus kya ? keval sevak , jin ke dara tum ne vishvas kiya , jaaisa har aek ko prabhu ne diya .
46003006	maain ne lagaya , apullos ne seencha , parantu parameshvar ne baddhaya .
46003007	isaliye n to laganevala kuchh haai , aur n seenchanevala , parantu parameshvar jo baddhanevala haai .

46003009	kyonaki ham parameshvar ke sahakarmee haain tum parameshvar kee khetee aur parameshvar kee rachana ho .

46003011	kyonaki us nev ko chhod jo padee haai , aur vah yeesha maseeh haai koi doosaree nev naheen dal sakata .

46003014	jis ka kam us par bana hua sthiar rahega , vah majadooree paega .

46003016	kya tum naheen janate , ki tum parameshvar ka mandair ho , aur parameshvar ka atma tum men vas karata haai ?

46004001	manushy hamen maseeh ke sevak aur parameshvar ke bhedon ke bhndaree samajhe .
46004002	fir yahan bhndaree men yah bat dekhee jatee haai , ki vishvas yogy nikale .
46004003	parantu meree draashtti men yah bahut chhottee bat haai , ki tum ya manushyon ka koi nyayee mujhe parakhe , baran maain ap hee apane ap ko naheen parakhta .
46004004	kyonaki mera man mujhe kisee bat men doshaee naheen ttharata , parantu is se maain nirdosh naheen ttharata , kyonki mera parakhne vala prabhu haai .

46004006	he bhaiyo , maain ne in baton men tumhare liye apanee aur apullos kee charcha , drashttant kee reeti par kee haai , isaliye ki tum hamare dara yah seekho , ki likhe hae se age n baddhna , aur aek ke paksha men aur doosare ke virodha men garva n karana .
46004007	kyonaki tujh men aur doosare men kaun bhed karata haai ? aur tere pas kya haai jo too ne doosare se naheen paya : aur jab ki tu ne doosare se paya haai , to aeesa ghamand kyon karata haai , ki manon nahee paya ?
46004008	tum to trapt ho chuke tum dhanee ho chuke , tum ne hamare bina rajy kiya parantu bhla hota ki tum rajy karate ki ham bhee tumhare sath rajy karate .

46004010	ham maseeh ke liye moorkh haai parantu tum maseeh men buddhmaian ho : ham nirbal haain parantu tum balavan ho : tum adar pate ho , parantu ham niradar hote haain .

46004015	kyeanki yadi maseeh men tumhare sikhanevale das hajar bhee hote , taubhee tumhare pita bahut se nahee , isaaliye ki maseeh yeesha men susamachar ke dara maain tumhara pita hua .
46004016	so maain tum se binatee karata hoo , ki meree see chal chalo .

46004018	kitane to use fool gaae haai , manon maain tumhare pas ane hee ka naheen .

46005001	yahan tak sunane men ata haai , ki tum men vyaabhaichar hota haai , baran aeesa vyabhaichar jo anyajatiyon men bhee naheen hota , ki aek manushy apane pita kee patnee ko rakhta haai .
46005002	aur tum shaek to naheen karate , jis se aeesa kam karanevala tumhare beech men se nikala jata , parantu ghamand karate ho .

46005004	ki jab tum , aur meree atma , hamare prabhu yeesha kee samarth ke sath ikatthe ho , to aeesa manushy , hamare prabhu yeesha ke nam se .

46005008	so ao ham utsav men anand manave , n to purane khmeer se aur n burai aur dushttta ke khmeer se , parantu seedhaai aur sachchai kee akhmeeree rottee se . .

46005010	yah nahee , ki tum bilakul is jagat ke vyabhaichaariyo , ya lobhaiyo , ya andhor karanevalo , ya mootiapoojakon kee sangaati n karo kyonki is dasha men to tumhen jagat men se nikal jana hee padta .
46005011	mera kahana yah haai ki yadi koi bhai kahalakar , vyaabhaicharee , ya lobhee , ya mootiapoojak , ya galee denevala , ya piyakkad , ya andhor karanevala ho , to us kee sangati mat karana baran aeese manushy ke sath khana bhee n khana .

46006003	kya tum naheen janate , ki ham svargadooton ka nyay karenge ? to kya sansarik baton ka nirny karana ho , to kya unheen ko baaittaoge jo kaleeasiya men kuchh naheen samajhe jate haain ?

46006005	maain tumhen lajjait karane ke liye yah kahata hoon : kya sachamuch tum men se aek bhee buddhmaian naheen milata , jo apane bhaiyon ka nirny kar sake ?
46006006	baran bhai bhai men mukama hota haai , aur vah bhee aavishvasiyon ke samhane .
46006007	parantu sachamuch tum men bada dosh to yah haai , ki apas men mukama karate ho : baran anyay kyon naheen sahate ? apanee hani kyon naheen sahate ?
46006008	baran anyay karate aur hani pahunchate ho , aur vah bhee bhaiyon ko .
46006009	kya tum naheen janate , ki anyayee log parameshvar ke rajy ke varis n honge ? dhaekha n khao , n veshyagamee , n mootiapoojak , n parasreegamee , n luchche , n purooshagamee .
46006010	n chor , n lobhee , n piyakkad , n galee denevale , n andhor karanevale parameshvar ke rajy ke vaaris honge .
46006011	aur tum men se kitane aeese hee the , parantu tum prabhu yeesha maseeh ke nam se aur hamare parameshvar ke atma se dhaae gaa , aur paavitra hae aur dharmee tthare . .
46006012	sab vastaen mere liye uchit to haai , parantu sab vastaen labh kee nahee , sab vastaen mere liye uchit haai , parantu maain kisee bat ke adhaeen n hoonga .
46006013	bhojan pett ke liye , aur pett bhojan ke liye haai , parantu parameshvar is ko aur us ko donon ko nash karega , parantu deh vyabhaichar ke liye nahee , baran prabhu ke liye aur prabhu deh ke liye haai .
46006014	aur parameshvar ne apanee samarth se prabhu ko jilaya , aur hamen bhee jilaega .
46006015	kya tum naheen janate , ki tumharee deh maseeh ke ang haain ? so kya maain maseeh ke ang lekar unhen veshya ke ang banaun ? kadaapi naheen .

46006018	vyabhaichar se bache raho : jitane aur pap manushy karata haai , ve deh ke bahar haai , parantu vyabhaichar karanevala apanee hee deh ke virooddh pap karata haai .
46006019	kya tum naheen janate , ki tumharee deh paavitraatma ka mandair haai jo tum men basa hua haai aur tumhen parameshvar kee or se mila haai , aur tum apane naheen ho ?

46007001	un baton ke vishay men jo tum ne likhee , yah achchha haai , ki puroosh sree ko n chhuae .

46007005	tum aek doosare se alag n raho parantu keval kuchh samay tak apas kee sammaati se ki praarthna ke liye avakash mile , aur fir aek sath raho , aeesa n ho , ki tumhare asanyam ke karan shautan tumhen parakhe .
46007006	parantu maain jo yah kahata hoon vah anumati haai n ki agyaa .

46007012	doosaren se prabhu nahee , parantu maain hee kahata hoo , yadi kisee bhai kee patnee vishvas n rakhtee ho , aur usake sath rahate se prasann ho , to vah use n chhode .
46007013	aur jis sree ka pati vishvas n rakhta ho , aur usake sath rahane se prasann ho vah paati ko n chhode .
46007014	kyonaki aeesa paati jo vishvas n rakhta ho , vah patnee ke karan pavitra ttharata haai , aur aeesee patnee jo vishvas naheen rakhtee , paati ke karan paavitra ttharatee haai naheen to tumhare ladkebalen ashauddh hote , parantu ab to paavitra haain .
46007015	parantu jo puroosh vishvas naheen rakhta , yaadi vah alag ho , to alag hone do , aeesee dasha men koi bhai ya baahin bandhan men naheen parantu parameshvar ne to hamen mel milap ke liye bulaya haai .
46007016	kyonaki he sre , too kya janatee haai , ki tum apane pati ka uddhar kara le ? aur he puroosha , too kya janata haai ki too apanee patnee ka uddhar kara le ?
46007017	par jausa prabhu ne har aek ko bantta haai , aur parameshvar ne har aek ko bulaya haai vaaisa hee vah chale : aur maain sab kaleesiyaon men aeesa hee ttharatah hoon .
46007018	jo khtana kiya hu bulaya gaya ho , vah khtanaraahit n bane : jo khtanaraahit bulaya gaya ho , vah khtana n karae .
46007019	n khtana kuchh haai , aur n khtanaraahit parantu parameshvar kee agyaaon ko manana hee sab kuchh haai .
46007020	har aek jan jis dasha men bulaya gaya ho , usee men rahe .
46007021	yaadi too das kee dasha men bulaya gaya ho to chinta n kara parantu yaadi too svatantra ho sake , to aeesa hee kam kara .
46007022	kyonaki jo das kee dasha men prabhu men bulaya gaya haai , vah prabhu ka svatantra kiya hua haai : aur vaaise hee jo svatantrata kee dasha men bulaya gaya haai , vah maseeh ka das haai .
46007023	tum dam dekar mol liye gaae ho , manushyon ke das n bano .
46007024	he bhaiyo , jo koi jis dasha men bulaya gaya ho , vah usee men parameshvar ke sath rahe . .
46007025	kunvaariyon ke vishay men prabhu kee koi agyaa mujhe naheen milee , parantu vishvasayogy hone ke liye jaaisee daya prabhu ne mujh par kee haai , usee ke anusar sammaati deta hoon .
46007026	so meree samajh men yah achchha haai , ki ajakal klesh ke karan manushy jaaisa haai , vaaisa hee rahe .
46007027	yaadi tere patnee haai , to us se alag hone ka yatn n kara : aur yaadi tere patnee nahee , to patnee kee khoj n kara :
46007028	parantu yadi too byah bhee kare , to pap naheen aur yadi kunvaree byahee jae to koi pap naheen parantu aeeson ko shaareerik dukh hoga , aur maain bachana chahata hoon .
46007029	he bhaiyo , maain yah kahata hoo , ki samay kam kiya gaya haai , isaliye chaahiae ki jin ke patnee ho , ve aeese hon mano un ke patnee naheen .
46007030	aur ronevale aeese ho , mano rote naheen aur anand karanevale aeese ho , mano anand naheen karate aur mol lenevale aese ho , ki mano un ke pas kuchh haai naheen .
46007031	aur is sansar ke baratanevale aeese ho , ki sansar hee ke n ho len kyonki is sansar kee reeti aur vyavahar badalate jate haain .
46007032	so maain yah chahata hoo , ki tumhen chinta n ho : aavivaahit puroosh prabhu kee baton kee chinta men rahata haai , ki prabhu ko kyonkar prasann rakhe .
46007033	parantu vivaahit manushy sansar kee baton kee chinta men rahata haai , ki apanee patnee ko kis reeti se prasann rakhe .
46007034	vivaahita aur aavivaahita men bhee bhed haai : avivaahita prabhu kee chinta men rahatee haai , ki vah deh aur atma donon men paavitra ho , parantu vivaahita sansar kee chinta men rahatee haai , ki apane pati ko prasann rakhe .
46007035	yah bat tumhare hee labh ke liye kahata hoo , n ki tumhen fansane ke liye , baran isaaliye ki jaaisa sohata haai , vaaisa hee kiya jae ki tum aek chitt hokar prabhu kee seva men lage raho .
46007036	aur yaadi koi yah samajhe , ki maain apanee us kunvaree ka hakk man raha hoo , jis kee javanee ddhl chalee haai , aur prayojan bhee hoa , to jaaisa chahe , vaaisa kare , is men pap nahee , vah usaka byah hone de .
46007037	parantu jo man men draddh rahata haai , aur us ko prayojan n ho , baran apanee ichchha pooree karane men adhaikar rakhta ho , aur apane man men yah bat ttan lee ho , ki maain apanee kunvaree ladkee ko bin byahee rakoonga , vah achchha karata haai .
46007038	so jo apanee kunvaree ka byah kar deta haai , vah achchha karata haai aur jo byah naheen kar deta , vah aur bhee achchha karata haai .
46007039	jab tak kisee sree ka paati jeevit rahata haai , tab tak vah us se bandhaee hui haai , parantu jab usaka pati mar ja , to jis se chahe vivah kar sakatee haai , parantu keval prabhu men .
46007040	paranatu jesee haai yaadi vaaisee hee rahe , to mere vichar men aur bhee dhany haai , aur maain samajhta hoo , ki parameshvar ka atma mujh men bhee haai . .
46008001	ab mooraton ke samhane baali kee hui vastuon ke vishay men ham janate haai , ki ham sab ko gyaan haai : gyaan ghamand utpann karata haai , parantu praem se unnaati hotee haai .
46008002	yaadi koi samajhe , ki maain kuchh janata hoo , to jaaisa janana chahiae vaaisa ab tak naheen janata .
46008003	parantu yadi koi parameshvar se praem rakhta haai , to use parameshvar pahichanata haai .
46008004	so mooraton ke samhane baali kee hui vastuon ke khane ke vishay men ham janate haai , ki moorat jagat men koi vastu nahee , aur aek ko chhod aur koi parameshvar naheen .
46008005	yadhypi akash men aur prathvee par bahut se ishvar kahalate haai , jaaisa ki bahut se ishvar or bahut se prabhu haain .
46008006	taubhee hamare nikatt to aek hee parameshvar haai : arthata pita jis kee or se sab vastaen haai , aur ham usee ke liye haai , aur aek hee prabhu haai , arthata yeesha maseeh jis ke dara sab vastaen hui , aur ham bhee usee ke dara haain .
46008007	parantu sab ko yah gyaan nahee parantu kitane to ab tak moorat ko kuchh samajhne ke karan mooraton ke samhane bali kee hui ko kuchh vastu samajhkar khate haai , aur un ka vivek nirbal hokar ashauddh hota haai .
46008008	bhejan hamen parameshvar ke nikatt naheen pahunchata , yadi ham n khana , to hamaree kuchh haani nahee , aur yadi khaae , to kuchh labh naheen .
46008009	parantu chaukas raho , aeesa n ho , ki tumharee yah svatantrata kaheen nirbalon ke liye ttokar ka karan ho jae .
46008010	kyeanki yadi koi tujh gyaanee ko moorat ke mandair men bhojan karate dekhe , aur vah nirbal jan ho , to kya usake vivek men moorat ke samhane bali kee hui vastu ke khane ka hiyav n ho jaega .
46008011	is reeati se tere gyaan ke karan vah nirbal bhai jis ke liye maseeh mara nash ho jaega .
46008012	so bhaiyon ka aparadha karane se or un ke nirbal vivek ko chott dene se tum maseeh ka aparadha karate ho .
46008013	is karan yadi bhojan mere bhai ko ttokar khaila , to maain kabhee kisee reeati se mans n khaunga , n ho ki maain apane bhai ke ttokar ka karan banoon .
46009001	kya maain svatantra naheen ? kya maain praarit naheen ? kya maain ne yeesha ko jo hamara prabhu haai , naheen dekha , kya tum prabhu men mere banae hae naheen ?
46009002	yaadi maain auron ke liye praerit nahee , taubhee tumhare liye to hoon kyonaki tum prabhu men meree praearitai par chhap ho .
46009003	jo mujhe janchate haai , un ke liye yeeh mera uttr haai .
46009004	kya hamen khane-peene ka aadhaikar naheen ?
46009005	kya hamen yah aadhaikar nahee , ki kisee maseehee baahin ko byah kar ke liae fire , jaaisa aur praearit aur prabhu ke bhai aur kaaifaa karate haain ?
46009006	ya keval mujhe aur baranabas ko adhaikar naheen ki kamai karana chhoden .
46009007	kaun kabhee apanee girah se khakar sipahee ka kam karata haai : kaun dakh kee baree lagakar usaka fal naheen khata ? kaun bhedon kee rakhvalee karake un ka doodha naheen peeta ?
46009008	kya maain ye baten manushy hee kee reeti par bolata hoon ?
46009009	kya vyavastha bhee yahee naheen kahatee ? kyonki moosa kee vyavastha men likha haai ki danae men chalate hae baail ka munh n bandhana : kya parameshvar baailon hee kee chinta karata haai ? ya vishosh karake hamare liye kahata haai .
46009010	ha , hamare liye hee likha gaya , kyonki uchit haai , ki jatanevala asha se jote , aur davanevala bhagee hone kee asha se davanee kare .
46009011	so jab ki ham ne tumhare liye aatmaik vastaen boi , to kya yah koi badee bat haai , ki tumharee shaareearik vastuon kee fasal katten .
46009012	jab auron ka tum par yah adhaikar haai , to kya hamara is se aadhaik n hoga ? parantu ham yah aadhaikar kam men naheen lae parantu sab kuchh sahate haai , ki hamare dara maseeh ke susamachar kee kuchh rok n ho .
46009013	kya tum naheen janate ki jo pavitra vastuon kee seva karate haai , ve mandair men se khate haain aur jo vedee kee seva karate haain ve vedee ke sath bhagee hote haain ?
46009014	isee reeti se prabhu ne bhee ttharaya , ki jo log susamachar sunate haai , un kee jeevika susamachar se ho .
46009015	parantu maain in men se koi bhee bat kam men n laya , aur maain ne to ye baten isaaliye naheen likhee , ki mere liye aeesa kiya ja , kyonki is se to mera marana hee bhla haai ki koi mera ghamand vyarth ttharae .
46009016	aur yaadi maain susamachar sunau , to mera kuchh ghamand naheen kyonaki yah to mere liye avashy haai aur yadi maain susamachar n sunau , to mujh par haya .
46009017	kyonaki yadi apanee ichchha se yah karata hoo , to majadooree mujhe milatee haai , aur yaadi apanee ichchha se naheen karata , taubhee bhndareepan mujhe saunpa gaya haai .
46009018	so meree kaun see majadooree haai ? yah ki susamachar sunane men maain maseeh ka susamachar sent ment kar doon yahan tak ki susamachar men jo mera adhaikar haai , us ko maain pooree reeati se kam men laun .
46009019	kyonaki sab se svatantra hone par bhee maain ne apane ap ko sab ka das bana diya haai ki adhaik logon ko kheench laun .
46009020	maain yahoodiyon ke liye yahoodee bana ki yahoodiyon ko kheench lau , jo log vyavastha ke adhaeen haain un ke liye maain vyavastha ke adhaeen n hone par bhee vyavastha ke adhaeen bana , ki unhen jo vyavastha ke adhaeen haai , kheench laun .
46009021	vyavasthaheenon ke liye maain jo parameshvar kee vyavastha se heen nahee , parantu maseeh kee vyavastha ke adhaeen hoon vyavasthaheen sa bana , ki vyavasthaheenon ko kheench laun .
46009022	maain nirbalon ke liye nirbal sa bana , ki nirbalon ko kheench lau , maain sab manushyon ke liye sab kuchh bana hoo , ki kisee n kisee reeati se kai aek ka uddhar karaun .
46009023	aur maain sab kuchh susamachar ke liye karata hoo , ki auron ke sath usaka bhagee ho jaun .
46009024	kya tum naheen janate , ki daud men to chhaudte sab hee haai , parantu inam aek hee le jata haai ? tum vaaise hee daudo , ki jeeto .
46009025	aur har aek pahalavan sab prakar ka sanyam karata haai , ve to aek murajhanevale mukutt ko pane ke liye yah sab karate haai , parantu ham to us mukutt ke liye karate haai , jo murajhane ka naheen .
46009026	isaliye maain to isee reeati se daudta hoo , parantu beattkaiane nahee , maain bhee isee reeti se mukkon se ladta hoo , parantu us kee nain naheen jo hava peettta hua ladta haai .
46009027	paranatu maain apanee deh ko marata koottta , aur vash men lata hoon aeesa n ho ki auron ko prachar karake , maain ap hee kisee reeati se nikamma ttharoon . .
46010001	he bhaiyo , maain naheen chahata , ki tum is bat se agyaat raho , ki hamare sab bapadade badal ke neeche the , aur sab ke sab samudra ke beech se par ho gaae .
46010002	aur sab ne badal me , aur samudra me , moosa ka bapitisma liya .
46010003	aur sab ne aek hee aatmaik bhojan kiya .
46010004	aur sab ne aek hee aatmaik jal peeya , kyonaki ve us atmaik chattan se peete the , jo un ke sath-sath chalatee thee aur vah chattan maseeh tha .
46010005	parantu parameshvar un men ke bahuteron se prasann n hua , isaliye ve jangal men ddher ho gaae .
46010006	ye baten hamare liye drashttant ttharee , ki jaaise unhon ne lalach kiya , vaaise ham buree vastuon ka lalach n karen .
46010007	aur n tum moorat poojanevale banon jaaise ki un men se kitane ban gaae the , jaaisa likha haai , ki log khane-peene baaitte , aur khelane-koodane utte .
46010008	aur n ham vyaabhaichar karen jaaisa un men se kitanon ne kiya : aek din men teis hajar mar gaye .
46010009	aur n ham prabhu ko parakhen jaaisa un men se kitanon ne kiya , aur sanpon ke dara nash kiae gaae .
46010010	aur natum kudkudaa , jis reeti se un men se kitane kudkudaa , aur nash karanevale ke dara nash kiae gaae .
46010011	parantu ye sab bate , jo un par padee , drashttant kee reeati par bhee : aur ve hamaree chitavanee ke liye jo jagat ke antaim samay men rahate haain likhee gain haain .
46010012	isaliye jo samajhta haai , ki maain sthiar hoo , vah chaukas rahe ki kaheen gir n paden .
46010013	tum kisee aeesee pareeksha men naheen pade , jo manushy ke sahane se bahar haai : aur parameshvar sachcha haai : vah tumhen samarth se bahar pareeksha men n padne dega , baran pareeksha ke sath nikas bhee karega ki tum sah sako . .
46010014	is kara , he mere pyaron mootira pooja se bache raho .
46010015	maain buddhmaian janakar , tum se kahata hoon : jo maain kahata hoo , use tum parakho .
46010016	vah dhanyavad ka kattora , jis par ham dhanyavad karate haai , kya maseeh ke lohoo kee sahabhaagita naheen ? vah rottee jise ham todte haai , kya maseeh kee deh kee sahabhagita naheen ?
46010017	isaliye , ki aek hee rottee haai so ham bhee jo bahut haai , aek deh haain : kyonki ham sab usee aek rottee men bhagee hote haain .
46010018	jo shareer ke bhav se israelee haai , un ko dekho : kya balidanon ke khanevale vedee ke sahabhagee naheen ?
46010019	fir maain kya kahata hoon ? kya yah ki moorat ka balidan kuchh haai , ya moorat kuchh haai ?
46010020	nahee , baran yah , ki anyajaati jo balidan karate haai , ve parameshvar ke liye nahee , parantu dushttatmaon ke liye baalidan karate haain : aur maain naheen chahata , ki tum dushttatmaon ke sahabhagee ho .
46010021	tum prabhu ke kattore , aur dushttatmaon ke kattore danon men se naheen pee sakate ! tum prabhu kee mej aur dushttatmaon kee mej danon ke sajhee naheen ho sakate .
46010022	kya ham prabhu ko ris dilate haain ? kya ham us se shaaktaiman haain ?
46010023	sab vastaen mere liye uchit to haai , parantu sab labh kee naheen : sab vastaen mere liye uchit to haai , parantu sab vastuon se unnait naheen .
46010024	koi apanee hee bhlai ko n ddoonddhe , baran auron kee .
46010025	jo kuchh kassaiyon ke yahan bikata haai , vah khao aur vivek ke karan kuchh n poochho .
46010026	kyoki prathvee aur usakee bhrapooree prabhu kee haai .
46010027	aur yaadi avishvayien men se koi tumhen nevata de , aur tum jana chaho , to jo kuchh tumhare samhane rakha jae vahee khao : aur vivek ke karan kuchh n poochho .
46010028	parantu yadi koi tum se kahe , yah to moorat ko bali kee hui vastu haai , to usee batanevale ke kara , aur vivek ke karan n khao .
46010029	mera matalab , tera vivek nahee , parantu us doosare ka . bhla , meree svatantrata doosare ke vichar se kyon parakhee jae :
46010030	yaadi maain dhanyavad karake sajhee hota hoo , to jis par maain dhanyavad karata hoo , usake karan meree badanameen kyon hotee haai ?
46010031	so tum chahe khao , chahe peeo , chahe jo kuchh karo , sab kuchh parameshvar kee maheema ke liye karo .
46010032	tum n yahoodiyo , n yoonaaniyo , aur n parameshvar kee kaleesiya ke liye ttokar ka karan bano .
46010033	jaaisa maain bhee sab baton men sab ko prasann rakhta hoo , aur apana nahee , parantu bahuton ka labh ddoonddhta hoo , ki ve uddhar paen .
46011001	tum meree see chal chalo jaaisa maain maseeh kee see chal chalata hoon . .
46011002	he bhaiyo , maain tumhen sarahata hoo , ki sab baton men tum mujhe smaran karate ho : aur jo vyavahar maain ne tumhen saunp diae haai , unhen dhaaran karate ho .
46011003	so maain chahata hoo , ki tum yah jan lo , ki har aek puroosh ka sir maseeh haai : aur sree ka sir puroosh haai : aur maseeh ka sir parameshvar haai .
46011004	jo puroosh sir ddhanke hae praarthna ya bhavishyadanee karata haai , vah apane sir ka apaman karata haai .
46011005	parantu jo sree ughaade sir praarthna ya bhavishyadvvanee karatee haai , vah apane sir ka apaman karatee haai , kyonaki vah mundee hone ke barabar haai .
46011006	yaadi sree addhnee n oddhe , to bal bhee katta le yaadi sree ke liye bal kattana ya mundana lajja kee bat haai , to oddhnee oddhe .
46011007	han puroosh ko apana sir ddhankana uchit hanee , kyonki vah parameshvar ka svaroop aur mahima haai parantu sree puroosh kee mahima !
46011008	kyonaki puroosh sree se naheen hua , parantu sree se hui haai .
46011009	aur puroosh sree ke liye naheen siraja gaya , parantu sree puroosh ke liye sirajee gai haai .
46011010	iseeliye svargadooton ke karan sree ko uchit haai , ki adhaikar apane sir par rakhe .
46011011	taubhee prabhu men n to sree bina puroosh aur n puroosh bina sree ke haai .
46011012	kyonaki jaaise sree puroosh se haai , vaaise hee puroosh sree ke dara haai parantu sab vastaen parameshvar ke dara haain .
46011013	tum ap hee vichar karo , kya sree ko ughaade sir parameshvar se praarthna karana sohana haai ?
46011014	kya svaabhaivik reeti se bhee tum naheen janate , ki yadi puroosh lambe bal rakhe , to usake liye apaman haai .
46011015	parantu yadi sree lambe bal rakhe to usake liye shaebha haai kyonaki bal us ko oddhnee ke liye diae gaae haain .
46011016	paranatu yadi koi vivad karana chahe , to yah jane ki n hamaree aur n parameshvar kee kaleeasiyon kee aeesee reeti haai . .
46011017	paranatu yah agyaa dete ha , maain tumhen naheen sarahata , isaaliye ki tumhare ikatthe hone se bhlai nahee , parantu haani hotee haai .
46011018	kyonaki pahile to maain yah sunata hoo , ki jab tum kaleeasiya men ikatthe hate ho , to tum men foott hotee haai aur maain kuchh kuchh prateeti bhee karata hoon .
46011019	kyanaki vidharma bhee tum men avashy honge , isaaliye ki jo lage tum men khre nikale haai , ve pragatt ho janae .
46011020	so tum jo aek jagah men ikatthe hote ho to yah prabhu bhoj khane ke liye naheen .
46011021	kyonaki khane ke samay aek doosare se paahile apana bhoj kha leta haai , so koi to bookha rahata haai , aur koi matavala ho jata haai .
46011022	kya khane peene ke liye tumhare ghar naheen ? ya parameshvar kee kaleeasiya ko tuchchh janate ho , aur jin ke pas naheen haai unhen laajjait karate ho ? maain tum se kya kahoon ? kya is bat men tumharee prashansa karoon ? maain prashansa naheen karata .
46011023	kyonaki yah bat mujhe prabhu se pahunchee , aur maain ne tumhen bhee pahuncha dee ki prabhu yeesha ne jis rat pakadvaya gaya rottee lee .
46011024	aur dhanyavad karake use todee , aur kaha ki yah meree deh haai , jo tumhare liye haai : mere smaran ke liye yahee kiya karo .
46011025	isee reeti se us ne biyaree ke peechhe kattora bhee liya , aur kaha yah kattora mere lohoo men nai vacha haai : jab kabhee peeo , to mere smaran ke liye yahee kiya karo .
46011026	kyonaki jab kabhee tum yah rottee khate , aur is kattore men se peete ho , to prabhu kee mratyu ko jab tak vah n a , prachar karate ho .
46011027	isaliye jo koi anuachit reeti se prabhu kee rottee khaa , ya usake kattore men se pa , vah prabhu kee deh aur lohoo ka aparadhaee ttharega .
46011028	isaliye manushy apane ap ko janch le aur isee reeati se is rottee men se khaa , aur is kattore men se pae .
46011029	kyeanki jo khate-peete samay prabhu kee deh ko n paahichane , vah is khane aur peene se apane upar dand lata haai .
46011030	isee karan tum men se bahut se nirbal aur rogee haai , aur bahut se so bhee gaae .
46011031	yaadi ham apane ap men janchate , to dand n pate .
46011032	parantu prabhu hamen dand dekar hamaree tadna karata haai isaliye ki ham sansar ke sath doshaee n ttharen .
46011033	isaliye , he mere bhaiyo , jab tum khane ke liye ikatthe hote ho , to aek doosare ke liye tthara karo .
46011034	yaadi koi bookha ho , to apane ghar men kha le jis se tumhar ikattha hona dand ka karan n ho : aur shosh baton ko maain akar tteek kar doonga . .
46012001	he bhaiyo , maain naheen chahata ki tum atmaik baradanon ke vishay men agyaat raho .
46012002	tum janate ho , ki jab tum anyajaati the , to goongee mooraton ke peechhe jese chalae jate the vaaise chalate the .
46012003	isaliye maain tumhen chitaunee deta hoon ki jo koi parameshvar kee atma kee aguai se bolata haai , vah naheen kahata ki yeesha srapit haai aur n koi paavitra atma ke bina kah sakata haai ki yeesha prabhu haai . .
46012004	baradan to kai prakar ke haai , parantu atma aek hee haai .
46012005	aur seva bhee kai prakar kee haai , parantu prabhu aek hee haai .
46012006	aur prabhavashaalee kayrya kai prakar ke haai , parantu paramashevar aek hee haai , jo sab men har prakar ka prabhav utpann karata haai .
46012007	kintu sab ke labh pahunchane ke liye har aek ko atma ka prakash diya jata haai .
46012008	kyonaki aek ko atma ke dara buadi kee baten dee jatee haain aur doosare ko usee atma ke anusar gyaan kee baten .
46012009	aur kisee ko usee atma se vishvasa aur kisee ko usee aek atma se changa karane ka baradan diya jata haai .
46012010	fir kisee ko samarth ke kam karane kee shaaktai aur kisee ko bhavishyadanee kee aur kisee ko anek prakar kee bhashaa aur kisee ko bhashaaon ka arth batana .
46012011	parantu ye sab prabhavashaalee kayrya vahee aek atma karavata haai , aur jise jo chahata haai vah bantt deta haai . .
46012012	kyonaki jis prakar deh to aek haai aur usake ang bahut se haai , aur us aek deh ke sab ang , bahut hone par bhee sab milakar aek hee deh haai , usee prakar maseeh bhee haai .
46012013	kyonaki ham sab ne kya yahoodee ho , kya yunanee , kya das , kya svatantra aek hee atma ke dara aek deh hone ke liye bapatisma liya , aur ham aek ko aek hee atma pilaya gaya .
46012014	isaliye ki deh men aek hee ang nahee , parantu bahut se haain .
46012015	yaadi panv kahe : ki maain hath nahee , isaaliye deh ka nahee , to kya vah is karan deh ka naheen ?
46012016	aur yaadi kan kahe ki maain ankh ka nahee , isaaliye deh ka nahee , to kya vah is karan deh ka naheen .
46012017	yaadi saree deh ankh kee hotee to sunana kahan se hota ? yaadi saree deh kan hee hotee to soonghana kahan hota ?
46012018	parantu sachamuch parameshvar ne ango ko apanee ichchha ke anusar aek aek karake deh men rakha haai .
46012019	yaadi ve sab aek hee ang hote , to deh kahan hotee ?
46012020	parantu ab ang to bahut se haai , parantu deh aek hee haai .
