47001002	hamare pita parameshvar aur prabhu yeesha maseeh kee or se anugrah aur shaaantai milatee rahe . .
47001003	hamare prabhu yeesha maseeh ke parameshvar , aur pita ka dhanyavad ho , jo daya ka pita , aur sab prakar kee shaaantai ka parameshvar haai .
47001004	vah hamare sab kleshaen men shaaantai deta haai taki ham us shaaantai ke karan jo parameshvar hamen deta haai , unhen bhee shaaantai de sake , jo kisee prakar ke klesh men hon .
47001005	kyonaki jaaise maseeh ke dukh ham ko aadhaik hote haai , vaaise hee hamaree shaaantai bhee maseeh ke dara adhaik hatee haai .
47001006	yaadi ham klesh pate haai , to yah tumharee shaantai aur uddhar ke liye haai aur yaadi shaaantai pate haai , to yah tumharee shaantai ke liye haai jis ke prabhav se tum dhaeeraj ke sath un kleshaen ko sah lete ho , jinhen ham bhee sahate haain .
47001007	aur hamaree asha tumhare vishay men draddh haai kyonaki ham janate haai , ki tum jaaise dukhon ke vaaise hee shaantai ke bhee sahabhagee ho .
47001008	he bhaiyo , ham naheen chahate ki tum hamare us klesh se anajan raho , jo asiya men ham par pada , ki aeese bharee bojh se dab gaae the , jo hamaree samarth se bahar tha , yahan tak ki ham jeevan se bhee hath dhae baaitte the .
47001009	baran ham ne apane man men samajh liya tha , ki ham par mratyu kee agyaa ho chukee haai ki ham apana bhrosa n rakhe , baran parameshvar ka jo mare huon ko jilata haai .
47001010	usee ne hamen aeesee badee mratyu se bachaya , aur bachaega aur us se hamaree yah asha haai , ki vah age ko bhee bachata rahega .
47001011	aur tum bhee milakar praarthna ke dara hamaree sahayata karoge , ki jo baradan bahuton ke dara hamen mila , usake karan bahut log hamaree or se dhanyavad karen . .
47001012	kyonaki ham apane vivek kee is gavahee par ghamand karate haai , ki jagat men aur vishosh karake tumhare beech hamara charitra parameshvar ke yogy aeesee paavitrata aur sachchai saahit tha , jo shaareerik gyaan se nahee , parantu parameshvar ke anugrah ke sath tha .
47001013	ham tumhen aur kuchh naheen likhte , keval vah jo tum paddhte ya manate bhee ho , aur mujhe asha haai , ki ant tak bhee manate rahoge .
47001014	jaaisa tum men se kitanon ne man liya haai , ki ham tumhare ghamand ka karan haai vaaise tum bhee prabhu yeesha ke din hamare liye ghamand ka karan ttharoge . .
47001015	aur is bhrose se maain chahata tha ki pahile tumhare pas aun ki tumhen aek aur dan mile .
47001016	aur tumhare pas se hokar maakiduaniya ko jau , aur tum muchhe yahoodiya kee or kud door tak pahunchao .
47001017	isaliye maain ne jo yah ichchha kee thee to kya maain ne chanchalata dikhai ? ya jo karana chahata hoon kya shareer ke anusar karana chahata hoo , ki maain bat men ha , han bhee karoon
47001018	aur naheen naheen bhee karoon ? parameshvar sachcha gavah haai , ki hamare us vachan men jo tum se kaha han aur naheen danon pai naheen jateen .
47001019	kyonaki parameshvar ka putra yeesha maseeh jisaka hamare dara arthata mere aur silavanus aur teemuthaiyus ke dara tumhare beech meen prachar hua us men han aur naheen donon n thee parantu , us men han hee han hui .
47001020	kyanaki parameshvar kee jitanee pratigyaaaen haai , ve sab usee men han ke sath haain : isaliye usake dara ameen bhee hui , ki hamare dara parameshvar kee maahima ho .
47001021	aur jo hamen tumhare sath maseeh men draddh karata haai , aur jis ne hamen aabhaishok kiya vahee parameshvar haai .
47001022	jis ne ham par chhap bhee kar dee haai aur bayan men atma ko hamare manon men diya . .
47001023	maain parameshvar ko gavah karata hoo , ki maai ab tak kurinthus men isaaliye naheen aya , ki mujhe tum par taras ata tha .
47001024	yah nahee , ki ham vishvas ke vishay men tum par prabhuta jatana chahate haain parantu tumhare anand men sahayak haain kyonki tum vishvas hee se sthiar rahate ho .
47002001	maainne apane man men yahee ttan liya tha ki fir tumhare pas udas hokar n aun .
47002002	kyonaki yadi maain tumhen udas karoo , to mujhe anand denevala kaun hoga , keval vahee jis ko maain ne udas kiya ?
47002003	aur maain ne yahee bat tumhen isaliye likhee , ki kaheen aeesa n ho , ki mere ane par jin se anand milana chahia , maain un se udas houn kyonaki mujhe tum sab par is bat ka bhrosa haai , ki jo mera anand haai , vahee tum sab ka bhee haai .
47002004	bade klesha , aur man ke kashtt se , maain ne bahut se ansu baha bahakar tumhen likha , isaliye nahee , ki tum udas ho , parantu isaaliye ki tum us bade praem ko jan lo , jo mujhe tum se haai . .
47002005	aur yaadi kisee ne udas kiya haai , to mujhe hee naheen baran ki usake sath bahut kadai n karoon kuchh kuchh tum sab ko bhee udas kiya haai .
47002006	aeese jan ke liye yah dand jo bhaiyon men se bahuton ne diya , bahut haai .
47002007	isaliye is se yah bhla haai ki usaka aparadha kshama karo aur shaantai do , n ho ki aeesa manushy udasee men oob jae .
47002008	is karan maain tum se binatee karata hoo , ki us ko apane praem ka praman do .
47002009	kyonaki maain ne isaliye bhee likha tha , ki tumhen parakh loo , ki sab baton ke manane ke liye taaiyar ho , ki naheen .
47002010	jis ka tum kuchh kshama karate ho us maain bhee kshama karata hoo , kyonki maain ne bhee jo kuchh kshama kiya haai , yadi kiya ho , to tumhare karan maseeh kee jagah men hokar kshama kiya haai .
47002011	ki shautan ka ham par danv n chale , kyonki ham us kee yuktaiyon se anajan naheen .
47002012	aur jab maain maseeh ka susamachar , sunane ko traeas men aya , aur prabhu ne mere liye aek dar khol diya .
47002013	to mere man men chaain ne mila , isaliye ki maain ne apane bhai titus ko naheen paya so un se vida hokar maain maakiduaniya ko chala gaya .
47002014	parantu parameshvar ka dhanyavad ho , jo maseeh men sada ham ko jay ke utsav men liye firata haai , aur apane gyaan ka sugandha hamare dara har jagah faailata haai .
47002015	kyonaki ham parameshvar ke nikatt uddhar panevalo , aur nash honevalo , dono ke liye maseeh ke sugandha haain .
47002016	kitano ke liye to marane ke nimitt mranyu kee gandha , aur kitano ke liye jeevan ke nimitt jeevan kee sugandha , aur in baton ke yogy kaun haai ?
47002017	kyonaki ham un bahuton ke saman nahee , jo parameshvar ke vachan men milavatt karate haain parantu man kee sachchai se , aur parameshvar kee or se parameshvar ko upaasthiat janakar maseeh men bolate haain . .
47003001	kya ham fir apanee badai karane lage ? ya hamen kitanon ki nai sifaaarish kee patraiyan tumhare pas lanee ya tum se lenee haain ?
47003002	hamaree patraee tum hee ho , jo hamare dayon par likhee hui haai , aur use sab manushy pahichanate aur paddhte haai .
47003003	yah pragatt haai , ki tum maseeh kee patraee ho , jis ko ham ne sevakon kee nai likha aur jo siyahee se nahee , parantu jeevate parameshvar ke atma se patthr kee paattyaien par nahee , parantu day kee mans roopee paattyaien par likhee haai .
47003004	ham maseeh ke dara parameshvar par aeesa hee bhrosa rakhte haain .
47003005	yah nahee , ki ham apane ap se is yogy haai , ki apanee or se kisee bat ka vichar kar saken par hamaree yogyata parameshvar kee or se haai .
47003006	jis ne hamen nai vacha ke sevak hone ke yogy bhee kiya , shabd ke sevak naheen baran atma ke kyonaki shabd marata haai , par atma jilata haai .
47003007	aur yahad mratyu kee yah vacha jis ke akshar patthron par khod gaae the , yahan tak tejomay hui , ki moosa ke munh par ke tej ke karan jo ghattta bhee jata tha , israael usake munh par draashtti naheen kar sakate the .
47003008	to atma kee vacha aur bhee tejomay kyon n hogee ?
47003009	kyonaki jab doshaee ttharanevalee vacha tejomay thee , to dharmee ttharanevalee vacha aur bhee tejomay kyon n hogee ?
47003010	aur jo tejomay tha , vah bhee us tej ke karan jo us se baddhkar tejamay tha , kuchh tejomay n tthara .
47003011	kyonaki jab vah jo ghattta jata tha tejomay tha , to vah jo sthiar rahega , aur bhee tejomay kyon n hoga ?
47003012	so aeesee asha rakhkar ham hiyav ke sath bolate haain .
47003013	aur moosar kee nain nahee , jis ne apane munh par parada dala tha taki israaelee us ghattnevalee vastu ke ant ko n dekhen .
47003014	parantu ve matimand ho gaa , kyonaki aj tak purane niyam ke paddhte samay un ke dayon par vahee parada pada rahata haai par vah maseeh men utt jata haai .
47003015	aur aj tak jab kabhee moosa kee pustak paddhee jatee haai , to un ke day par parada pada rahata haai .
47003016	parantu jab kabhee un ka day prabhu kee or firega , tab vah parada utt jaega .
47003017	prabhu to atma haai : aur jahan kaheen prabhu ka atma haai vahan svatantrata haai .
47003018	parantu jab ham sab ke ughaade chehare se prabhu ka pratap is prakar pragatt hota haai , jis prakar darpan me , to prabhu ke dara jo atma haai , ham usee tejasvee roop men ansh ansh kar ke badalate jate haain . .
47004001	isaliye jab ham par aeesee daya hui , ki hamen yah seva milee , to ham hiyav naheen chhodte .
47004002	parantu ham ne lajja ke gupt kamon ko tyag diya , aur n chaturai se chalate , aur n parameshvar ke vachan men milavatt karate haai , parantu saty ko pragatt karake , parameshvar ke samhane har aek manushy ke vivek men apanee bhlai baaittate haain .
47004003	parantu yadi hamare susamachar par parada pada haai , to yah nash honevalon hee ke liye pada haai .
47004004	aur un aavishvasiyon ke liye , jin kee buddh iko is sansar ke ishvar ne andhaee kar dee haai , taki maseeh jo parameshvar ka praatiroop haai , usake tejomay susamachar ka prakash un par n chamake .
47004005	kyonaki ham apane ko nahee , parantu maseeh yeesha ko prachar karate haai , ki vah prabhu haai aur usake vishay men yah kahate haai , ki ham yeesha ke karan tumhare sevak haain .
47004006	isaliye ki parameshvar hee haai , jis ne kaha , ki andhakar men se jyoti chamake aur vahee hamare dayon men chamaka , ki parameshvar kee mahima kee paahichan kee jyoti yeesha maseeh ke chehare se prakashaman ho . .
47004007	parantu mahare pas yah dhan mitthee ke baratanon men rakha haai , ki yah aseem samarth hamaree or se nahee , baran parameshvar hee kee or se tthare .
47004008	ham charon or se klesh to bhogate haai , par sankatt men naheen padte niroopay to haai , par nirash naheen hote .
47004009	satae to jate haain par tyage naheen jate girae to jate haai , par nash naheen hote .
47004010	ham yeesha kee mratyu ko apanee deh men har samay liye firate haain ki yeesha ka jeevan bhee hamaree deh men pragatt ho .
47004011	kyonaki ham jeete jee sarvada yeesha ke karan mratyu ke hath men saunpe jate haain ki yeesha ka jeevan bhee hamare maranahar shareer men pragatt ho .
47004012	so mratyu to ham par prabhav dalatee haai aur jeevan tum para .
47004013	aur isaliye ki ham men vahee vishvas kee atma haai , jis ke vishay me likha haai , ki maain ne vishvas kiya , isaliye maain bola so ham bhee vishvas karate haai , isee liye bolate haain .
47004014	kyonaki ham jatane haai , jis ne prabhu yeesha ko jilaya , vahee hamen bhee yeesha men bhagee janakar jilaega , aur tumhare sath apane samhane upasthiat karega .
47004015	kyonaki sab vastaen tumhare liye haai , taki anugrah bahuton ke dara aadhaik hokar parameshvar kee maahima ke liye dhanyavad bhee baddhaae . .
47004016	isaliye ham hiyav naheen chhodte yadhypi hamara baharee manushyatv nash bhee hota jata haai , taubhee hamara bheetaree manushyatv din pratidin naya hota jata haai .
47004017	kyonaki hamara pal bhr ka halka sa klesh hamare liye bahut hee mahatvapoorn aur anant jeevan maahima utpann karata jata haai .
47004018	aur ham to dekhee hui vastuon ko naheen parantu anadekhee vastuon ko dekhte rahate haai , kyonki dekhee hui vastaen thode hee din kee haai , parantu anadekhee vastaen sada banee rahatee haain .
47005001	kyonaki ham janate haai , ki jab hamara prathvee par ka dera sareekha ghar giraya jaega to hamen parameshvar kee or se svarga par aek aeesa bhvan milega , jo hathon se bana hua ghar naheen parantu chirasthai haai .
47005002	is men to ham kaharate , aur badee lalasa rakhte haain ki apane svargeey ghar ko pahin len .
47005003	ki is ke pahinane se ham nange n pae jaen .
47005004	aur ham is dere men rahate hae bojh se dabe kaharate rahate haain kyonki ham utarana nahee , baran aur paahinana chahate haai , taki vah jo maranahar haai jeevan men oob jae .
47005005	aur jis ne hamen isee bat ke liye taaiyar kiya haai vah parameshvar haai , jis ne hamen bayane men atma bhee diya haai .
47005006	so ham sada ddhaddhs bandho rahate haain aur yah janate haain ki jab tak ham deh men rahate haai , tab tak prabhu se alag haain .
47005007	kyonaki ham roop ko dekhkar nahee , par vishvas se chalate haain .
47005008	isaliye ham ddhaddhs bandho rahate haai , aur deh se alag hokar prabhu ke sath rahana aur bhee uttm samajhte haain .
47005009	is karan hamare man kee umang yah haai , ki chahe sath rahe , chahe alag rahen par ham use bhate rahen .
47005010	kyonaki avashy haai , ki ham sab ka hal maseeh ke nyay asan ke samhane khul ja , ki har aek vyaaktai apane apane bhle bure kamon ka badala jo us ne deh ke dara kiae hon pae . .
47005011	so prabhu ka bhy manakar ham logon ko samajhate haain aur parameshvar par hamara hal pragatt haai aur meree asha yah haai , ki tumhare vivek par bhee pragatt hua hoga .
47005012	ham fir bhee apanee badai tumhare samhane naheen karate baran ham apane vishay men tumhen ghamand karane ka avasar dete haai , ki tum unhen uttr de sako , jo man par nahee , baran dikhvattee baton par ghamand karate haain .
47005013	yaadi ham besudha haai , to parameshvar ke liye aur yaadi chaaitany haai , to tumhare liye haain .
47005014	kyonaki maseeh ka praem hamen vivash kar deta haai isaliye ki ham yah samajhte haai , ki jab aek sab ke liye mara to sab mar gaae .
47005015	aur vah is nimitt sab ke liye mara , ki jo jeevit haai , ve age ko apane liye n jaen parantu usake liye jo un ke liye mara aur fir jee utta .
47005016	so ab se ham kisee ko shareer ke anusar n samajhenge , aur yaadi ham ne maseeh ko bhee shareer ke anusar jana tha , taubhee ab se us ko aeesa naheen janenge .
47005017	so yaadi koi maseeh men haai to vah nai sraashtti haai : puranee baten beet gai haain dekho , ve sab nai ho gain .
47005018	aur sab baten parameshvar kee or se haai , jis ne maseeh ke dara apane sath hamara mel milap kee seva hamen saunp dee haai .
47005019	arthata parameshvar ne maseeh men hokar apane sath sansar ka mel milap kar liya , aur un ke aparadhaen ka dosh un par naheen lagaya aur us ne mel milap ka vachan hamen saunp diya haai . .
47005020	so ham maseeh ke rajadoot haain mano parameshvar hamare dara samajhata haai : ham maseeh kee or se nivedan karate haai , ki parameshvar ke sath mel milap kar lo .
47005021	jo pap se agyaat tha , usee ko us ne hamare liye pap ttharaya , ki ham us men hokar parameshvar kee dhaarmikata ban jaen . .
47006001	aur ham jo usake sahakarmee haain yah bhee samajhate haai , ki parameshvar ka anuganh jo tum par hua , vyarth n rahane do .
47006002	kyonaki vah to kahata haai , ki apanee prasannata ke samay maain ne teree sahayata kee : dekho , abhee uddhar ka din haai .
47006003	ham kisee bat men ttokar khane ka koi bhee avasar naheen dete , ki hamaree seva par koi dosh n ae .
47006004	parantu har bat men parameshvar ke sevakon kee nai apane sadagunon ko pragatt karate haai , bade dhaurya se , kleshaen se , daridrata se , sankatto se .
47006005	kode khane se , kaaid hone se , hulladon se , parishram se , jagate rahane se , upavas karane se .
47006006	paavitrata se , gyaan se , dhaeeraj se , krapaluta se , paavitra atma se .
47006007	sachche praem se , saty ke vachan se , parameshvar kee samarth se dhaaarmikata ke hathaiyaron se jo dahine , baen haain .
47006008	adar aur niradar se , duranam aur sunam se , yadhypi bhramanevalon ke aeese maloom hote haain taubhee sachche haain .
47006009	anajanon ke sadrashy haain taubhee praasiddh haain marate huon ke aeese haain aur dekhon jeevit haain marakhanevalon ke sadrash haain parantu praan se mare naheen jate .
47006010	shaek karanevale ke saman haai , parantu sarvada anand karate haai , kangalon ke aeese haai , parantu bahuton ko dhanavan bana dete haain aeese haain jaaise hamare pas kuchh naheen taubhee sab kuchh rakhte haain .
47006011	he kuarinthiayo , ham ne khulakar tum se baten kee haai , hamara day tumharee or khula hua haai .
47006012	tumhare liye hamare man men kuchh saketee nahee , par tumhare hee manon men saketee haai .
47006013	par apane ladke-bale janakar tum se kahata hoo , ki tum bhee usake badale men apana day khol do . .
47006014	aavishvasiyon ke sath asaman jooae men n juto , kyonki dhaaarmikata aur adharma ka kya mel jola ? ya jyoti aur andhakar kee kya sangati ?
47006015	aur maseeh ka baliyal ke sath kya lagava ? ya vishvasee ke sath aavishvasee ka kya nata ?
47006016	aur mooraton ke sath parameshvar ke mandair ka kya sambandha ? kyonaki ham to jeevate parameshvar ka mandair haain jaaisa parameshvar ne kaha haai ki maain un men basoonga aur un men chala fira karoonga aur maain un ka parameshvar hoonga , aur ve mere log honge .
47006017	isaliye prabhu kahata haai , ki un ke beech men se nikalo aur alag raho aur ashauddh vastu ko mat chooo , to maain tumhen grahan karoonga .
47006018	aur tumhara pita hoonga , aur tum mere bette aur bettyaian hoge : yah sarvashaktaiman prabhu parameshvar ka vachan haai . .
47007001	so he pyaro jab ki ye pratigyaaaen hamen milee haai , to ao , ham apane ap ko shareer aur atma kee sab malinata shauddh kare , aur parameshvar ka bhy rakhte hae pavitrata ko siddh karen . .
47007002	hamen apane day men jagah do : ham ne n kisee se anyay kiya , n kisee ko bigada , aur n kisee ko ttga .
47007003	maain tumhen doshaee ttharane ke liye yah naheen kahata : kyonki maain paahile hee kah chooka hoo , ki tum hamare day men aeese bas gaae ho ki ham tumhare sath marane jeene ke liye taaiyar haain .
47007004	maain tum se bahut hiyav ke sath bol raha hoo , mujhe tum par bada ghamand haai : maain shaantai se bhr gaya hoon apane sare klesh men maain anand se ati bhrapoor rahata hoon . .
47007005	kyonaki jab ham makiduaniya men a , tab bhee hamare shareer ko chaain naheen mila , parantu ham charon or se klesh pate the bahar ladaiyan thee , bheetar bhyankar baten thee .
47007006	taubhee danon ko shaantai denevale parameshvar ne titus ke ane se ham ko shaaantai dee .
47007007	aur n keval usake ane se parantu us kee us shaantai se bhee , jo us ko tumharee or se milee thee aur us ne tumharee lalasa , aur tumhare dukh or mere liye tumharee dhaun ka samachar hamen sunaya , jis se mujhe aur bhee anand hua .
47007008	kyoki yadhyapi maain ne apanee patraee se tumhen shaeakit kiya , parantu us se pachhtata naheen jaaisa ki pahile pachhtata tha kyonki maain dekhta hoo , ki us patraee se tumhen shaek to hua parantu vah thodee der ke liye tha .
47007009	ab maain anaandait hoon par isaliye naheen ki tum ko shaek pahuncha baran isaliye ki tum ne us shaek ke karan man firaya , kyonki tumhara shaek parameshvar kee ichchha ke anusar tha , ki hamaree or se tumhen kisee bat men haani n pahunche .
47007010	kyonaki parameshvara-bhaktai ka shaek aeesa pashchatap utpann karata haai jis ka parinam uddhar haai aur fir us se pachhtana naheen padta : parantu sansaree shaek mratyu utpann karata haai .
47007011	so dekho , isee bat se ki tumheen parameshvara-bhktai ka shaek hua tum men kitanee uttejana aur pratyattr aur ris , aur bhy , aur lalasa , aur dhaun aur palaa lene ka vichar utpann hua ? tum ne sab prakar se yah siddh kar dikhaya , ki tum is bat men nirdosh ho .
47007012	fir maain ne jo tumhare pas likha tha , vah n to usake karan likha , jis ne anyay kiya , aur n usake karan jis par anyay kiya gaya , parantu isaliye ki tumharee uttejana jo hamare liye haai , vah parameshvar ke samhane tum par pragatt ho jae .
47007013	isaliye hamen shaaantai hui aur hamaree is shaantai ke sath titus ke anand ke karan aur bhee anand hua kayonaki usaka jee tum sab ke karan hara bhra ho gaya haai .
47007014	kyonaki yadi maain ne usake samhane tumhare vishay men kuchh ghamand dikhaya , to lajjait naheen hua , parantu jaaise ham ne tum se sab baten sach sach kah dee thee , vaaise hee hamara dhamand dikhana titus ke samhane bhee sach nikala .
47007015	aur jab us ko tum sab ke agyaakaree hone ka smaran ata haai , ki kyonkar tum ne drate aur kanpate hae us se bhentt kee to usaka praem tumharee or aur bhee baddhta jata haai .
47007016	maain anand karata hoo , ki tumharee or se mujhe har bat men ddhaddhs hota haai . .
47008001	ab he bhaiyo , ham tumhen parameshvar ke us anugrah ka samachar dete haai , jo makiduaniya kee kaleesiyaon par hua haai .
47008002	ki klesh kee badee pareeksha men un ke bade anand aur bharee kangalapan ke baddh jane se un kee udarata bahut baddh gai .
47008003	aur unake vishay men meree yah gavahee haai , ki unhon ne apanee samarth bhr baran samarth se bhee bahar man se diya .
47008004	aur is dan men aur paavitra logon kee seva men bhagee hone ke anugrah ke vishay men ham se bar bar bahut binatee kee .

48002020	maain maseeh ke sath kroos par chaddhaya gaya hoo , aur ab maain jeeavit n raha , par maseeh mujh men jeeavit haai : aur maain shareer men ab jo jeeavit hoon to keval us vishvas se jeevit hoo , jo parameshvar ke putra par haai , jis ne mujh se praem kiya , aur mere liye apane ap ko de diya .

49001003	hamare prabhu yeesha maseeh ke parameshvar aur pita ka dhanyavad ho , ki us ne hamen maseeh men svargeey sthanon men sab prakar kee ashaeesh dee haai .

49001007	ham ko us men usake lohoo ke dara chhuttkara , arthata aparadhaen kee kshama , usake us anugrah ke dhan ke anusar mila haai .
49001008	jise us ne sare gyaan aur samajh saahit ham par bahutayat se kiya .

49001010	ki samayon ke poore hone ka aeesa prabandha ho ki jo kuchh svarga men haai , aur jo kuchh prathvee par haai , sab kuchh vah maseeh men aekatra kare .

49001013	aur usee men tum par bhee jab tum ne saty ka vachan suna , jo tumhare uddhar ka susamachar haai , aur jis par tum ne vishvas kiya , praatigyaa kiae hae pavitra atma kee chhap lagee .

49001018	aur tumhare man kee ankhen jyotirmay hon ki tum jan lo ki usake bulane se kaaisee asha hotee haai , aur paavitra logon men us kee meeras kee maahima ka dhan kaaisa haai .

49002002	jin men tum pahile is sansar kee reeati par , aur akash ke adhaikar ke haakim arthata us atma ke anusar chalate the , jo ab bhee agyaa n mananevalon men kayrya karata haai .
49002003	in men ham bhee sab ke sab paahile apane shareer kee lalasaon men din bitate the , aur shareer , aur man kee manasaen pooree karate the , aur aur logon ke saman svabhav hee se krodha kee santan the .
49002004	parantu parameshvar ne jo daya ka dhanee haai apane us bade praem ke kara , jis se us ne ham se praem kiya .

53001001	paulus aur silavanus aur teemuthaiyus kee or se thaissaluneekiyon kee kaleesiya ke nam , jo hamare pita parameshvar aur prabhu yeesha maseeh men haai . .
53001002	hamare pita parameshvar aur prabhu yeesha maseeh men tumhen anugrah aur shaaantai milatee rahe . .
53001003	he bhaiyo , tumhare vishay men hamen har samay parameshvar ka dhanyavad karana chahia , aur yah uchit bhee haai isaaliye ki tumhara vishvas bahut baddhta jata haai , aur tum sab ko praem apas men bahut hee hota jata haai .
53001004	yahan tak ki ham ap parameshvar kee kaleeasiya men tumhare vishay men ghamand karate haai , ki jitane upadrav aur klesh tum sahate ho , un sab men tumhara dhaeeraj aur vishvas pragatt hota haai .
53001005	yah parameshvar ke sachche nyay ka spashtt praman haai ki tum parameshvar ke rajy ke yogy ttharo , jis ke liye tum dukh bhee uttate ho .
53001006	kyonaki parameshvar ke nikatt yah nyay haai , ki jo tumhen klesh dete haai , unhen badale men klesh de .
53001007	aur tumhen jo klesh pate ho , hamare sath chaain de us samay jab ki prabhu yeesha apane samarthee dooton ke sat , dhadhakatee hui ag men svarga se pragatt hoga .
53001008	aur jo parameshvar ko naheen pahachanate , aur hamare prabhu yeesha ke susamachar ko naheen manate un se palatta lega .
53001009	ve prabhu ke samhane se , aur usakee shaaktai ke tej se door hokar anant vinash ka dand paenge .
53001010	yah us din hoga , jab vah apane paavitra logon men mahima pane , aur sab vishvas karanevalon men ashcharya ka karan hone ko aega kyonki tum ne hamaree gavahee kee prateeati kee .
53001011	isee liye ham sada tumhare nimitt praarthna bhee karate haai , ki hamara parameshvar tumhen is bulahatt ke yogy samajhe , aur bhlai kee har aek ichchha , aur vishvas ke har aek kam ko samarth sahit poora kare .
53001012	ki hamare parameshvar aur prabhu yeesha maseeh ke anugrah ke anusar hamare prabhu yeesha ka nam tum men maahima pa , aur tum us men . .
53002001	he bhaiyo , tum apane prabhu yeesha maseeh ke ane , aur usake pas apane ikatthe hone ke vishay men tum se binatee karate haain .
53002002	ki kisee atma , ya vachan , ya patraee ke dara jo ki manon hamaree or se ko , yah samajhkar ki prabhu ka din a pahuncha haai , tumhara man achanak aasthiar n ho jae aur n tum ghabarao .
53002003	kisee reeati se kisee ke dhaekhe men n ana kyonaki vah din n aega , jab tak dharma ka tyag n ho le , aur vah pap ka puroosh arthata vinash ka putra pragatt n ho .
53002004	jo virodha karata haai , aur har aek se jo parameshvar , ya poojy kahalata haai , apane ap ko bada ttharata haai , yahan tak ki vah parameshvar ke mandair men baaittkar apane ap ko parameshvar pragatt karata haai .
53002005	kya tumhen smaran nahee , ki jab maain tumhare yahan tha , to tum se ye baten kaha karata tha ?
53002006	aur ab tum us vastu ko janate ho , jo use rok rahee haai , ki vah apane hee samay men pragatt ho .
53002007	kyonaki adharma ka bhed ab bhee kayrya karata jata haai , par abhee aek rokanevala haai , aur jab tak vah door n ho ja , vah roke rahega .
53002008	tab vah adharmee pragatt hoga , jise prabhu yeesha apane munh ko faook se mar dalega , aur apane agaman ke tej se bhsm karega .
53002009	us adharmee ka ana shautan ke kayrya ke anusar sab prakar kee joottee samarth , aur chinh , aur adabhut kam ke sath .
53002010	aur nash honevalon ke liye adharma ke sab prakar ke dhaekhe ke sath hoga kyonaki unhonne saty ke praem ko grahan naheen kiya jis se un ka uddhar hota .
53002011	aur isee karan parameshvar un men aek bhttka denevalee samarth ko bhejega taki ve joott kee prateeti karen .
53002012	aur jitane log saty kee prateeti naheen karate , varan adharma se prasann hote haai , sab dand paen . .
53002013	par he bhaiyo , aur prabhu ke piry logo chahiye ki ham tumhare vishay men sada parameshvar ka dhanyavad karate rahe , ki parameshvar ne adi se tumhen chun liya ki atma ke dara paavitra banakar , aur saty kee prateeti karake uddhar pao .
53002014	jis ke liye us ne tumhen hamare susamachar ke dara bulaya , ki tum hamare prabhu yeesha maseeh kee maahima ko praapt karo .
53002015	isaliye , ye bhaiyo , sthiara aur jo jo baten tum ne kya vachan , kya patraee ke dara ham se seekhee haai , unhen thame raho . .
53002016	hamara prabhu yeesha maseeh ap hee , aur hamara pita parameshvar jis ne ham se praem rakha , aur anugrah se anant shaaantai aur uttm asha dee haai .
53002017	tumhare manon men shaantai de , aur tumhen har aek achchhe kam , aur vachan men draddh kare . .
53003001	nidan , he bhaiyo , hamare liye praarthna kiya karo , ki prabhu ka vachan aeesa shaeegha faaile , aur maahima pa , jaaisa tum men hua .
53003002	aur ham tteddhe aur dushtt manushyon se bache rahen kyonaki har aek men vishvas naheen . .
53003003	parantu prabhu sachcha haai vah tumhen draddhta se sthiar karega : aur us dushtt se suraakshiat rakhega .
53003004	aur hamen prabhu men tumhare upar bhrosa haai , ki jo jo agyaa ham tumhen dete haai , unhen tum manate ho , aur manate bhee rahoge .
53003005	parameshvar ke praem aur maseeh ke dhaeeraj kee or prabhu tumhare man kee aguvai kare . .
53003006	he bhaiyo , ham tumhen apane prabhu yeesha maseeh ke nam se agyaa dete haain ki har aek aeese bhai se alag raho , jo anuachit chal chalata , aur jo shaiksha us ne ham se pai usake anusar naheen karata .
53003007	kyonaki tum ap janate ho , ki kis reeti se hamaree see chal chalanee chahiae kyonaki ham tumhare beech men anuchit chal n chale .
53003008	aur kisee kee rottee sent men n khai par paarishram aur kashtt se rat din kam dhandha karate the , ki tum men se kisee par bhar n ho .
53003009	yah nahee , ki hamen aadhaikar naheen par isaliye ki apane ap ko tumhare liye adarsha ttharae , ki tum hamaree see chal chalo .
53003010	aur jab ham tumhare yahan the , tab bhee yah agyaa tumhen dete the , ki yadi koi kam karana n chahe , to khane bhee n pae .
53003011	ham sunate haai , ki kitane log tumhare beech men anuchit chal chalate haain aur kuchh kam naheen karate , par auron ke kam men hath dala karate haain .
53003012	aeeson ko ham prabhu yeesha maseeh men agyaa dete aur samajhate haai , ki chupachap kam karake apanee hee rottee khaya karen .

54001001	paulus kee or se jo hamare uddharakarta parameshvar , aur hamaree ashaa-sthan maseeh yeesha kee agyaa se maseeh yeesha ka praerit haai , timuathaiyus ke nam jo vishvas men mera sachcha putra haai . .
54001002	pita parameshvar , aur hamare prabhu maseeh yeesha se , tujhe anugrah aur daya , aur shaantai milatee rahe . .
54001003	jaaise maain ne makiduaniya ko jate samay tujhe samajhaya tha , ki ifisus men rahakar kitanon ko agyaa de ki aur prakar kee shaiksha n den .

54001005	agyaa ka saransh yah haai , ki shauddh man aur achchhe vivek , aur kapattraahit vishvas se praem utpann ho .

54001007	aur vyavasthapak to hona chahate haai , par jo baten kahate aur jin ko draddhta se bolate haai , un ko samajhte bhee naheen .

54001009	yah janakar ki vyavastha dharmee jan ke liye nahee , par adhaarmiyo , nirankushae , bhktaiheeno , papeeyo , apaavitraen aur ashauddho , man-bap ke ghaat karanevalo , hatyaron .
54001010	vyabhaichaariyo , purooshagaamiyo , manushy ke bechanevalo , jootto , aur joottee shapath khanevalo , aur in ko chhod khre upadesh ke sab virodhaiyon ke liye ttharai gai haai .

54001013	maain to pahile ninda karanevala , aur satanevala , aur andhor karanevala tha taubhee mujh par daya hui , kyonaki maain ne aavishvas kee dasha men bin samajhe boojhe , ye kam kiae the .

54001017	ab sanatan raja arthata avinashaee anadekhe advait parameshvar ka adar aur mahima yuganuyug hotee rahe . ameena . .

54001019	aur vishvas aur us achchhe vivek ko thamen rahe jise door karane ke karan kitanon ka vishvas roopee jahaj oob gaya .
54001020	unheen men se huaminayus aur sikandar haain jinhen maain ne shautan ko saunp diya , ki ve ninda karana n seekhen . .
54002001	ab maain sab se pahile yah upadesh deta hoo , ki binatee , aur praarthna , aur nivedan , aur dhanyavad , sab manushyon ke liye kiae jaen .

54003001	yah bat saty haai , ki jo adhyaksha hona chahata haai , to vah bhle kam kee ichchha karata haai .

54003014	maain tere pas jald ane kee asha rakhne par bhee ye baten tujhe isaaliye likhta hoon .

54003016	aur is men sandeh nahee , ki bhktai ka bhed gambheer haai arthata vah jo shareer men pragatt hua , atma men dharmee tthara , svargadooton ko dikhai diya , anyajatiyon men usaka prachar hua , jagat men us par vishvas kiya gaya , aur mahima men upar uttaya gaya . .
54004001	parantu atma spashttta se kahata haai , ki anevale samayon men kitane log bhramanevalee atmao , aur dushttatmaon kee shaikshaaon par man lagakar vishvas se bahak jaenge .

54004009	aur yah bat sach aur har prakar se manane ke yogy haai .

54004011	in baton kee agyaa kar , aur sikhata raha .

54004013	jab tak maain n au , tab tak paddhne aur upadesh aur sikhane men lauleen raha .

54005003	un vidhavaon ka jo sachamuch vidhava haain adar kara .

54005010	aur bhle kam men sunam rahee ho , jis ne bachchon ka palana-poshan kiya ho pahunon kee seva kee ho , pavitra logon ke panv dhaae ho , dukhaiyon kee sahayata kee ho , aur har aek bhle kam men man lagaya ho .

54005012	aur doshaee ttharatee haai , kyonki unhon ne apane pahile vishvas ko chhod diya haai .
54005013	aur is ke sath hee sath ve ghar ghar firakar alasee hona seekhtee haai , aur keval alasee nahee , par bakabak karatee rahatee aur auron ke kam men hath bhee dalatee haain aur anuachit baten bolatee haain .
54005014	isaliye maain yah chahata hoo , ki javan vidhavaen byah karen aur bachche janen aur gharabar sanbhale , aur kisee virodhaee ko badanam karane ka avasar n den .

54005017	jo praacheen achchha prabandha karate haai , vishosh karake ve jo vachan sunane aur sikhane men parishram karate haai , do gune adar ke yogy samajhe jaen .

54005019	koi dosh kisee praacheen par lagaya jae to bina do ya teen gavahon ke us ko n suna .
54005020	pap karanevalon ko sab ke samhane samajha de , taki aur log bhee dren .
54005021	parameshvar , aur maseeh yeesha , aur chune hae svargadooton ko upaasthiat janakar maain tujhe chitaunee deta hoon ki too man kholakar in baton ko mana kar , aur koi kam pakshapat se n kara .
54005022	kisee par shaeegha hath n rakhna aur doosaron ke papon men bhagee n hona : apane ap ko paavitra banae rakh .
54005023	bhavishy men keval jal hee ka peenevala n rah , par apane pett ke aur apane bar bar beemar hone ke karan thoda thoda dakhras bhee kam men laya kara .
54005024	kitane manushyon ke pap pragatt ho jate haai , aur nyay ke liye paahile se pahunch jate haai , par kitanon ke peechhe se ate haain .
54005025	vaaise hee kitane bhle kam bhee pragatt hote haai , aur jo aeese naheen hote , ve bhee chhpai naheen sakate . .
54006001	jitane das jooae ke neeche haai , ve apane apane svamee ko bade adar ke yogy jane , taki parameshvar ke nam aur upadesh kee ninda n ho .
54006002	aur jin ke svamee vishvasee haai , inhen ve bhai hone ke karan tuchchh n janen baran un kee aur bhee seva kare , kyonki is se labh uttane vale vishvasee aur praemee haain : in baton ka upadesh kiya kar aur samajhata raha . .
54006003	yaadi koi aur hee prakar ka upadesh dena haai aur khree baton ko , arthata hamare prabhu yeesha maseeh kee baton ko aur us upadesh ko naheen manata , jo bhaktai ke anusar haai .
54006004	to vah aabhaimanee ho gaya , aur kuchh naheen janata , baran use vivad aur shabdon par tarka karane ka rog haai , jin se dah , aur jhgade , aur ninda kee bate , aur bure bure sandeha .
54006005	aur un manushyon men vyarth ragade jhgade utpann hote haai , jin kee buddh ibigad gai haai aur ve saty se viheen ho gaae haai , jo samajhte haain ki bhktai kamai ka dar haai .
54006006	par santosh saahit bhktai badee kamai haai .

57001002	aur baahin afaafiya , aur hamare sathee yoddha arakhaippus aur filemon ke ghar kee kaleeasiya ke nama . .
57001003	hamare pita parameshvar aur prabhu yeesha maseeh kee or se anugrah aur shaaantai tumhen milatee rahe . .
57001004	maain tere us praem aur vishvas kee charcha sunakar , jo sab pavitra logon ke sath aur prabhu yeesha par haai .
57001005	sada parameshvar ka dhanyavad karata hoon aur apanee praarthnaon men bhee tujhe smaran karata hoon .
57001006	ki tera vishvas men sahabhagee hona tumharee saree bhlai kee pahichan men maseeh ke liye prabhavashaalee ho .
57001007	kyonaki he bhai , mujhe tere praem se bahut anand aur shaantai milee , isaliye , ki tere dara pavitra logon ke man hare bhre ho gaae haain . .
57001008	isaliye yadhypi mujhe maseeh men bada hiyav to haai , ki jo bat tteek haai , us kee agyaa tujhe doon .
57001009	taubhee mujh booddhe paulus ko jo ab maseeh yeesha ke liye kaaidee hoo , yah aur bhee bhla jan pada ki praem se binatee karoon .
57001010	maain apane bachche uneasimus ke liye jo mujh se meree kaaid men janma haai tujh se binatee karata hoon .
57001011	vah to paahile tere kuchh kam ka n tha , par ab tere aur mere donon ke bade kam ka haai .
57001012	usee ko arthata jo mere day ka ttukada haai , maain ne use tere pas lautta diya haai .
57001013	use maain apane hee pas rakhna chahata tha ki teree or se is kaaid men jo susamachar ke karan haai , meree seva kare .
57001014	par maain ne teree ichchha bina kuchh bhee karana n chaha ki teree yah krapa dabav se naheen par anand se ho .
57001015	kyonaki kya jane vah tujh se kuchh din tak ke liye isee karan alag hua ki sadaaiv tere nikatt rahe .
57001016	parantu ab se das kee nai nahee , baran das se bhee uttm , arthata bhai ke saman hare jo shareer men bhee aur vishosh kar prabhu men bhee mera piry ho .
57001017	so yaadi too mujhe sahabhagee samajhta haai , to use is prakar grahan kar jaaise mujhe .
57001018	aur yaadi us ne teree kuchh haani kee haai , ya us par tera kuchh ata haai , to mere nam par likh le .
57001019	maain paulus apane hath se likhta hoo , ki maain ap bhr doonga aur ham ke kahane kee kuchh avashyakata nahee , ki mera karja jo tujh par haai vah too hee haai .
57001020	he bhai yah anand mujhe prabhu men teree or se mile : maseeh men mere jee ko hara bhra kar de .
57001021	maain tere agyaakaree hone ka bhrosa rakhkar , tujhe likhta hoon aur yah janata hoo , ki jo kuchh maain kahata hoo , too us se kaheen baddhkar karega .
57001022	aur yah bhee , ki mere liye utarane kee jagah taaiyar rakh mujhe asha haai , ki tumharee praarthnaon ke dara maain tumhen de diya jaunga . .
57001023	ipaas jo maseeh yeesha men mere sath kaaidee haai .
57001024	aur marakus aur aaristarkhus aur demas aur looka jo mere sahakarmee haai in ka tujhe namaskara . .
57001025	hamare prabhu yeesha maseeh ka anugrah tumharee atma par hota rahe . ameena . .
58001001	poorva yug men parameshvar ne bapadadon se thoda thoda karake aur bhanati bhanati se bhvishyadvktaon ke dara baten karake .
58001002	in dinon ke ant men ham se putra ke dara baten kee , jise us ne saree vastuon ka vaaris ttharaya aur usee ke dara us ne saree srashtti rachee haai .
58001003	vah us kee maahima ka prakasha , aur usake tatv kee chhap haai , aur sab vastuon ko apanee samarth ke vachan se sanbhalata haai : vah papon ko dhaekar unche sthanon par mahamaahiman ke daahine ja baaitta .
58001004	aur svargadooton se utana hee uttm tthara , jitana us ne un se bade pad ka varis hokar uttm nam paya .
58001005	kyonaki svargadooton men se us ne kab kisee se kaha , ki too mera putra haai , aj too mujh se utpann hua ? aur fir yah , ki maain usaka pita hoonga , aur vah mera putra hoga ?
58001006	aur jab paahilautte ko jagat men fir lata haai , to kahata haai , ki parameshvar ke sab svargadoot use dandvat karen .
58001007	aur svargadooton ke vishay men yah kahata haai , ki vah apane dooton ko pavan , aur apane sevakon ko dhadhakatee ag banata haai .
58001008	parantu putra se kahata haai , ki he parameshvar tera sinhasan yuganuyug rahega : tere rajy ka rajadand nyay ka rajadand haai .
58001009	too ne dharma se praem aur adharma se baair rakha is karan parameshvar tere parameshvar ne tere sathaiyon se baddhkar harsharoopee tel se tujhe aabhaishok kiya .
58001010	aur yah ki , he prabhu , aadi men too ne prathvee kee nev dalee , aur svarga tere hathon kee kareegaree haai .
58001011	ve to nash ho jaenge parantu too bana rahega : aur ve sab vasr kee nai purane ho jaenge .
58001012	aur too unhen chadar kee nain lapettega , aur ve vasr kee nai badal jaenge : par too vahee haai aur tere vasharen ka ant n hoga .
58001013	aur svargadooton men se un ne kis se kab kaha , ki too mere daahine baait , jab ki maain tere baaiariyon ko tere panvon ke neeche kee peeddhee n kar doon ?
58001014	kya ve sab seva tthal karanevalee atmaen naheen jo uddhar panevalon ke liye seva karane ko bhejee jatee haain ?
58002001	is karan chahia , ki ham un baton par jo ham ne sunee haain aur bhee man lagae , aeesa n ho ki bahakar un se door chale jaen .
58002002	kyonaki jo vachan svargadooton ke dara kaha gaya tha jab vah sthiar raha or har aek aparadha aur agyaa n manane ka tteek tteek badala mila .
58002003	to ham log aeese bade uddhar se nishchaint rahakar kyonkar bach sakate haain ? jis kee charcha paahile paahil prabhu ke dara hui , aur sunanevalon ke dara hamen nishchay hua .
58002004	aur sath hee parameshvar bhee apanee ichchha ke anusar chinho , aur adabhut kamo , aur nana prakar ke samarth ke kamo , aur pavitra atma ke varadanon ke banttne ke dara is kee gavahee deta raha . .
58002005	us ne us anevale jagat ko jis kee charcha ham kar rahe haai , svargadooton ke adhaeen n kiya .
58002006	baran kisee ne kahee , yah gavahee dee haai , ki manushy kya haai , ki too us kee sudhai leta haai ? ya manushy ka putra kya haai , ki too us par drashtti karata haai ?
58002007	too ne use svargadooton se kuchh hee kam kiya too ne us par maahima aur adar ka mukutt rakha aur use apane hathon ke kamon par aadhaikar diya .
58002008	too ne sab kuchh usake panvon ke neeche kar diya : isaliye jab ki us ne sab kuchh usake adhaeen kar diya , to us ne kuchh bhee rakh n chhoda , jo usake adhaeen n ho : par ham ab tak sab kuchh usake adhaeen naheen dekhte .
58002009	par ham ko yeesha jo svargadooton se kuchh hee kam kiya gaya tha , mratyu ka dukh uttane ke karan maahima aur adar ka mukutt paahine hae dekhte haain taaki parameshvar ke anugrah se har aek manushy ke liye mratyu ka svad chakhe .
58002010	kyonaki jis ke liye sab kuchh haai , aur jis ke dara sab kuchh haai , use yahee achchha laga ki jab vah bahut se putraen ko maahima men pahuncha , to un ke uddhar ke karta ko dukh uttane ke dara siddh kare .
58002011	kyonaki pavitra karanevala aur jo paavitra kiae jate haai , sab aek hee mool se haain : isee karan vah unhen bhai kahane se naheen lajata .
58002012	par kahata haai , ki maain tera nam apane bhaiyon ko sunaunga , sabha ke beech men maain tera bhjan gaunga .
58002013	aur fir yah , ki maain us par bhrosa rakoonga aur fir yah ki dek , maain un ladkon saahit jise parameshvar ne mujhe diae .
58002014	isaliye jab ki ladke mans aur lohoo ke bhagee haai , to vah ap bhee un ke saman un ka sahabhagee ho gaya taaki mratyu ke dara use jise mratyu par shaaktai milee thee , arthata shautan ko nikamma kar de .
58002015	aur jitane mratyu ke bhy ke mare jeevan bhr dasatv men fanse the , unhen chhuda le .
58002016	kyonaki vah to svargadooton ko naheen baran ibraaheem ke vansh ko sanbhalata haai .
58002017	is karan usako chahiae tha , ki sab baton men apane bhaiyon ke saman bane jis se vah un baton men jo parameshvar se sambandha rakhtee haai , aek dayalu aur vishvasayogy mahayajak bane taaki logon ke papon ke liye praayaashchaitt kare .
58002018	kyonaki jab us ne pareeksha kee dasha men dukh uttaya , to vah un kee bhee sahayata kar sakata haai , jin kee pareeksha hotee haai . .
58003001	so he paavitra bhaiyon tum jo svargeey bulahatt men bhagee ho , us praearit aur mahayajak yeesha par jise ham angeekar karate haain dhyan karo .
58003002	jo apane niyukt karanevale ke liye vishvasayogy tha , jaaisa moosa bhee usake sare ghar men tha .
58003003	kyonaki vah moosa se itana baddhkar maahima ke yogy samajha gaya haai , jitana ki ghar bananevala ghar se baddhkar adar rakhta haai .
58003004	kyonaki har aek ghar ka koi n koi bananevala hota haai , par jis ne sab kuchh banaya vah parameshvar haai .
58003005	moosa to usake sare ghar men sevak kee nai vishvasayogy raha , ki jin baton ka varnn honevala tha , un kee gavahee de .
58003006	par maseeh putra kee nai usake ghar ka adhaikaree haai , aur usaka ghar ham haai , yadi ham sahas par , aur apanee asha ke ghamand par ant tak draddhta se sthiar rahen .
58003007	so jaaisa paavitra atma kahata haai , ki yadi aj tum usaka shabd suno .
58003008	to apane man ko kattor n karo , jaaisa ki krodha dilane ke samay aur pareeksha ke din jangal men kiya tha .
58003009	jahan tumhare bapadadon ne mujhe janchakar parakha aur chalees varsha tak mere kam dekhe .
58003010	is karan maain us samay ke logon se rootta raha , aur kaha , ki in ke man sada bhttkate rahate haai , aur inhon ne mere magorn ko naheen paahichana .
58003011	tab maain ne krodha men akar shapath khai , ki ve mere vishraam men pravesh karane n paenge .
58003012	he bhaiyo , chaukas raho , ki tum men aeesa bura aur avishvasee n man ho , jo jeevate parameshvar se door hatt jae .
58003013	baran jis din tak aj ka din kaha jata haai , har din aek doosare ko samajhate raho , aeesa n ho , ki tum men se koi jan pap ke chhl men akar kattor ho jae .
58003014	kyonaki ham maseeh ke bhagee hae haai , yadi ham apane prathm bhrose par ant tak draddhta se sthiar rahen .
58003015	jaaisa kaha jata haai , ki yadi aj tum usaka shabd suno , to apane manon ko kattor n karo , jaaisa ki krodha dilane ke samay kiya tha .
58003016	bhla kin logon ne sunakar krodha dilaya ? kya un sab ne naheen jo moosa ke dara misar se nikale the ?
58003017	aur vah chalees varsha tak kin logon se rootta raha ? kya unheen se nahee , jinhon ne pap kiya , aur un kee lothen jangal men padee raheen ?
58003018	aur us ne kin se shapath khai , ki tum mere vishraam men pravesh karane n paoge : keval un se jinhon ne agyaa n manee ?
58003019	so ham dekhte haai , ki ve avishvas ke karan pravesh n kar sake . .
58004001	isaliye jab ki usake vishraam men pravesh karane kee pratigyaa ab tak haai , to hamen drana chaahiae aeesa ne ho , ki tum men se koi jang us se rahit jan pade .
58004002	kyonaki hamen unheen kee nai susamachar sunaya gaya haai , par sune hae vachan se unhen kuchh loth n hua kyonaki sunanevalon ke man men vishvas ke sath naheen baaitta .
58004003	aur ham jinhon ne vishvas kiya haai , us vishraam men pravesh karate haain jaaisa us ne kaha , ki maain ne apane krodha men shapath khai , ki ve mere vishraam men pravesh karane n paenge , yadhyapi jagat kee utpaati ke samay se use kam ho chuke the .
58004004	kyonaki sataven din ke vishay men us ne kaheen yon kaha haai , ki parameshvar ne sataven din apane sab kamon ko nipatta karake vishraam kiya .
58004005	aur is jagah fir yah kahata haai , ki ve mere vishraam men pravesh n karane paenge .
58004006	to jab yah bat bakee haai ki kitane aur haain jo us vishraam men pravesh kare , aur jinhen usaka susamachar paahile sunaya gaya , unhon ne agyaa n manane ke karan us men pravesh n kiya .
58004007	to fir vah kisee vishosh din kee ttharakar itane din ke bad daud kee pustak men use aj ka din kahata haai , jaaise paahile kaha gaya , ki yadi aj tum usaka shabd suno , to apane manon ko kattor n karo .
58004008	aur yaadi yahoshoo unhen vishraam men pravesh kar leta , to usake bad doosare din kee charcha n hotee .
58004009	so jan lo ki parameshvar ke logon ke liye sabt ka vishraam bakee haai .
58004010	kyonaki jis ne usake vishraam men pravesh kiya haai , us ne bhee parameshvar kee nai apane kamon ko poora karake vishraam kiya haai .
58004011	so ham us vishraam men pravesh karane ka prayatn kare , aeesa n ho , ki koi jan un kee nai agyaa n manakar gir pade .
58004012	kyonaki parameshvar ka vachan jeeavit , aur prabal , aur har aek dodhaaree talavar se bhee bahut chokha haai , aur jeev , aur atma ko , aur gantt gant , aur goode goode ko alag karake , var par chhedata haai aur man kee bhavanaon aur vicharon ko janchata haai .
58004013	aur sraashtti kee koi vastu us se chhpaiee naheen haai baran jis se hamen kam haai , us kee ankhon ke samhane sab vastaen khulee aur beparad haain . .
58004014	so jab hamara aeesa bada mahayajak haai , jo svagorn se hokar gaya haai , arthata parameshvar ka putra yeeshau to ao , ham apane angeekar ko draddhta se thamen rahe .
58004015	kyonaki hamara aeesa mahayajak nahee , jo hamaree nirbalataon men hamare sath dukhee n ho sake baran vah sab baton men hamaree nai parakha to gaya , taubhee nishpap nikala .
58004016	isaliye ao , ham anugrah ke sinhasan ke nikatt hiyav bandhakar chale , ki ham par daya ho , aur vah anugrah pae , jo avashyakata ke samay hamaree sahayata kare . .
58005001	kyonaki har aek mahayajak manushyon men se liya jata haai , aur manushyon hee ke liye un baton ke vishay men jo parameshvar se sambandha rakhtee haai , ttharaya jata haai : ki bhentt aur pap baali chaddhaya kare .
58005002	aur vah agyaano , aur boole bhttkon ke sath narmee se vyavahar kar sakata haai isaaliye ki vah ap bhee nirbalata se ghaira haai .
58005003	aur isee liye use chahia , ki jaaise logon ke liye , vaaise hee apane liye bhee papa-bali chaddhaya kare .
58005004	aur yah adar ka pad koi apane ap se naheen leta , jab tak ki haroon kee nai parameshvar kee or se ttharaya n jae .
58005005	vaaise hee maseeh ne bhee mahayajak banane kee badai apane ap se naheen lee , par us ko usee ne dee , jis ne us se kaha tha , ki too mera putra haai , aj maain hee ne tujhe janmaya haai .
58005006	vah doosaree jagah men bhee kahata haai , too malikisidak kee reeati par sada ke liye yajak haai .
58005007	us ne apanee deh men rahane ke dinon men unche shabd se pukar pukarakar , aur ansoo baha bahakar us se jo us ko mratyu se bacha sakata tha , praarthnaen aur binatee kee aur bhktai ke karan us kee sunee gai .
58005008	aur putra hone par bhee , us ne dukh utta uttakar agyaa mananee seekhee .
58005009	aur siddh banakar , apane sab agyaa mananevalon ke liye sada kal ke uddhar ka karan ho gaya .
58005010	aur use parameshvar kee or se malikisidak kee reeati par mahayajak ka pad mila . .
58005011	is ke vishay men hamen bahut see baten kahanee haai , jin ka samajhna bhee kaattnai haai isaliye ki tum uncha sunane lage ho .
58005012	samay ke vichar se to tumhen guroo ho jana chahiae tha , taubhee kya yah avashyak haai , ki koi tumhen parameshvar ke vachanon kee aadi shaiksha fir se sikhaae ? or aeese ho gaae ho , ki tumhen ann ke badale ab tak doodha hee chaahiae .
58005013	kyonaki doodha peenevale bachche ko to dharma ke vachan kee paahichan naheen hotee , kyonaki vah balak haai .
58005014	par ann sayanon ke liye haai , jin ke gyaaneandairy abhyas karate karate , bhle bure men bhed karane ke liye pakke ho gaae haain . .
58006001	isaliye ao maseeh kee shaiksha kee arambh kee baton ko chhodkar , ham siddhta kee or baddhte jae , aur mare hae kamon se man firane , aur parameshvar par vishvas karane .
58006002	aur bapatismon aur hath rakhne , aur mare huon ke jee uttne , aur antaim nyay kee shaikshaaroopee nev , fir se n dalen .
58006003	aur yaadi parameshvar chahe , to ham yaheen karenge .
58006004	kyonaki jinhon ne aek bar jyoti pai haai , jo svargeey varadan ka svad chakh chuke haain aur paavitra atma ke bhagee ho gaae haain .
58006005	aur parameshvar ke uttm vachan ka aur anevale yug kee samathorn ka svad chakh chuke haain .
58006006	yaadi ve bhttk jaen to unhen man firav ke liye fir naya banana anhona haai kyonaki ve parameshvar ke putra ko apane liye fir kroos par chaddhate haain aur pragatt men . us par kalank lagate haain .
58006007	kyonaki jo boomi vashara ke panee ko jo us par bar bar padta haai , pee peekar jin logon ke liye vah jotee-boi jatee haai , un ke kam ka saga-pat upajatee haai , vah parameshvar se ashaeesh patee haai .
58006008	par yaadi vah jhadee aur unttkattare ugatee haai , to nikammee aur sraapit hone par haai , aur usaka ant jalaya jana haai . .
58006009	par he piryo yadhyapi ham ye baten kahate haain taubhee tumhare vishay men ham is se achchha aur uddharavalee baton ka bhrosa karate haain .
58006010	kyonaki parameshvar anyayee nahee , ki tumhare kam , aur us praem ko bool ja , jo tum ne unake nam ke liye is reeati se dikhaya , ki pavitra logon kee seva kee , aur kar rahe ho .
58006011	par ham bahut chahate haai , ki tum men se har aek jan ant tak pooree asha ke liye aeesa hee prayatn karata rahe .
58006012	taaki tum alasee n ho jao baran un ka anukaran karo , jo vishvas aur dhaeeraj ke dara praatigyaaon ke varis hote haain .
58006013	aur parameshvar ne ibraaheem ko pratigyaa dete samay jab ki shapath khane ke liye kisee ko apane se bada n paya , to apanee hee shapath khakar kaha .
58006014	ki maain sachamuch tujhe bahut ashaeesh doonga , aur teree santan ko baddhata jaunga .
58006015	aur is reeati se us ne dhaeeraj dharakar pratigyaa kee hui bat praapt kee .
58006016	manushy to apane se kisee bade kee shapath khaya karate haain aur un ke har aek vivad ka faaisala shapath se pakka hota haai .
58006017	isaliye jab parameshvar ne praatigyaa ke vaarison par aur bhee safa reeati se pragatt karana chaha , ki usakee manasa badal naheen sakatee to shapath ko beech men laya .
58006018	taaki do be-badal baton ke dara jin ke vishay men parameshvar ka jootta ttharana anhona haai , hamara draddhta se ddhaddhs bandha ja , jo sharan lene ko isaliye daude haai , ki us asha ko jo samhane rakhee hui haai praapt karen .
58006019	vah asha hamare praan ke liye aeesa langar haai jo sthiar aur draddh haai , aur parade ke bheetar tak pahunchata haai .
58006020	jahan yeesha maalikisidak kee reeati par sada kal ka mahayajak banakar , hamare liye agua kee reeati par pravesh hua haai . .
58007001	yah maalikisidak shaalem ka raja , aur paramapradhaan parameshvar ka yajak , sarvada yajak bana rahata haai jab ibraaheem rajaon ko marakar lautta jata tha , to isee ne us se bhentt karake use ashaeesh dee .
58007002	isee ko ibraaheem ne sab vastuon ka dasavan ansh bhee diya : yah paahile apane nam ke arth ke anusar , dharma ka raja haai .
58007003	jis ka n pita , n mata , n vanshaavalee haai , jis ke n dinon ka aadi haai aur n jeevan ka anat haai parantu parameshvar ke putra ke svaroop tthara . .
58007004	ab is par dhyan karo ki yah kaaisa mahan tha jis ko kulapati ibraaheem ne achchhe se achchhe mal kee loott ka dasavan ansh diya .
58007005	levee kee santan men se jo yajak ka pad pate haai , unhen agyaa milee haai , ki logo , arthata apane bhaiyon se chahe , ve ibraaheem hee kee deh se kyon n janmen ha , vyavastha ke anusar dasavan ansh len .
58007006	par is ne , jo un kee vanshaavalee men ka bhee n tha ibraaheem se dasavan ansh liya aur jise praatigyaaaen milee thee use ashaeesh dee .
58007007	aur us men sandeh nahee , ki chhotta bade se ashaeesh pata haai .
58007008	aur yahan to maranahar manushy dasavan ansh lete haain par vahan vahee leta haai , jis kee gavahee dee jatee haai , ki vah jeevit haai .
58007009	to ham yah bhee kah sakate haai , ki levee ne bhee , jo dasavan ansh leta haai , ibraaheem ke dara dasavan ansh diya .
58007010	kyonaki jis samay maalikisidak ne usake pita se bhentt kee , us samay yah apane pita kee deh men tha . .
58007011	tak yaadi leveey yajak pad ke dara siddh iho sakatee haai jis ke sahare se logon ko vyavastha milee thee to fir kya avashyakata thee , ki doosara yajak malikisidak kee reeati par khda ho , aur haroon kee reeati ka n kahalae ?
58007012	kyonaki jab yajak ka pad badala jata haai ? to vyavastha ka bhee badalana avashy haai .
58007013	kyonaki jis ke vishay men ye baten kahee jatee haain ki vah doosare gotra ka haai , jis men se kisee ne vedee kee seva naheen kee .
58007014	to pragatt haai , ki hamara prabhu yahooda ke gotra men se uday hua haai aur is gotra ke vishay men moosa ne yajak pad kee kuchh charcha naheen kee .
58007015	or jab maalikisidak ke saman aek aur aeesa yajak utpann honevala tha .
58007016	jo shaareearik agyaa kee vyavastha ke anusar nahee , par avinashaee jeevan kee samarth ke anusar niyukt ho to hamara dava aur bhee spashttta se pragatt ho gaya .
58007017	kyonaki usake vishay men yah gavahee dee gai haai , ki too malikisidak kee reeati par yuganuyug yajak haai .
58007018	nidan , pahilee agyaa nirbala aur nishfal hone ke karan lop ho gai .

58008001	ab to baten ham kah rahe haai , un men se sab se badee bat yah haai , ki hamara aeesa mahayajak haai , jo svarga par mahamaahiman ke sinhasan ke daahine ja baaitta .

59005003	tumhare sone-chandee men kai lag gai haai aur vah kai tum par gavahee degee , aur ag kee nai tumhara mans kha jaegee : tum ne aantaim yug men dhan battora haai .
59005004	dekho , jin majadooron ne tumhare khet katte , un kee vah majadooree jo tum ne dhaekha dekar rakh lee haai chilla rahee haai , aur lavanevalon kee dohai , senaon ke prabhu ke kanon tak pahunch gai haai .

59005007	so he bhaiyo , prabhu ke agaman tak dhaeeraj dharo , dekho , grahastha prathvee ke bahumooly fal kee asha rakhta hua prathm aur aantaim vashara hone tak dhaeeraj dharata haai .

59005009	he bhaiyo , aek doosare par dosh n lagao taki tum doshaee n ttharo , dekho , haakim dar par khda haai .

59005020	to vah yah jan le , ki jo koi kisee bhttke hae papee ko faer laega , vah aek praan ko mratyu se bachaega , aur anek papon par parada dalega . .
60001001	pataras kee or se jo yeesha maseeh ka praerit haai , un paradeashaiyon ke nam , jo puntus , galatiya , kappadukiya , aasiya , aur bithuaniya men tittr bittr hokar rahate haain .
60001002	aur parameshvar pita ke bhavishy gyaan ke anusar , atma ke pavitra karane ke dara agyaa manane , aur yeesha maseeh ke lohoo ke chhdike jane ke liye chune gaae haain . tumhen atyant anugrah aur shaaantai milatee rahe . .
60001003	hamare prabhu yeesha maseeh ke parameshvar aur pita ka dhanyavad do , jis ne yeesha maseeh ko mare huon men se jee uttne ke dara , apanee badee daya se hamen jeeavit asha ke liye naya janm diya .
60001004	arthata aek aavinashaee aur nirmal , aur ajar meeras ke liye .

60001006	aur is karan tum magan hote ho , yadhyapi avashy haai ki ab kuchh din tak nana prakar kee pareekshaaon ke karan udas ho .

60001011	unhon ne is bat kee khoj kee ki maseeh ka atma jo un men tha , aur paahile hee se maseeh ke dukhon kee aur un ke bad honevalee mahima kee gavahee deta tha , vah kaun se aur kaaise samay kee or sanket karata tha .

61001007	aur bhaktai par bhaichare kee praeeti , aur bhaichare kee praeeti par praem baddhate jao .
61001008	kyonaki yadi ye baten tum men vartaman rahe , aur baddhtee jae , to tumhen hamare prabhu yeesha maseeh ke pahachanane men nikamme aur nishfal n hone dengee .
61001009	aur jis men ye baten nahee , vah andha haai , aur dhaundhala dekhta haai , aur apane poorvakalee papon se dhaulakar shauddh hone ko bool baaitta haai .
61001010	is karan he bhaiyo , apane bulae jane , aur chun liye jane ko siddh karane ka bhlee bhanti yatn karate jao , kyonki yadi aeesa karoge , to kabhee bhee ttokar n khaoge .
61001011	baran is reeti se tum hamare prabhu aur uddharakarta yeesha maseeh ke anant rajy men bade adar ke sath pravesh karane paoge .
61001012	isaliye yadhypi tum ye baten janate ho , aur jo saty vachan tumhen mila haai , us men bane rahate ho , taubhee maain tumhen in baton kee sudhai dilane ko sarvada taaiyar rahoonga .
61001013	aur maain yah apane liye uchit samajhta hoo , ki jab tak maain is dere men hoo , tab tak tumhen sudhai dilakar ubharata rahoon .
61001014	kyonaki yah janata hoo , ki maseeh ke vachan ke anusar mere dere ke girae jane ka samay shaeegha anevala haai .
61001015	isaliye maain aeesa yatn karoonga , ki mere kooch karane ke bad tum in sab baton ko sarvada smaran kar sako .
61001016	kyonaki jab ham ne tumhen apane prabhu yeesha maseeh kee samarth ka , aur agaman ka samachar diya tha to vah chaturai se gaddhee hui kahaniyon ka anukaran naheen kiya tha baran ham ne ap hee usake pratap ko dekha tha .
61001017	ki us ne parameshvar pita se adar , aur maahima pai jab us pratapamay maahima men se yah vanee ai ki yah mera piry putra haai jis se maain prasann hoon .
61001018	aur jab ham usake sath paavitra pahad par the , to svarga se yahee vanee ate suna .
61001019	aur hamare pas jo bhavishyadvktaon ka vachan haai , vah is ghattna se draddh tthara haai aur tum yah achchha karate ho , ki jo yah samajhkar us par dhyan karate ho , ki vah aek deeya haai , jo andhiayare sthan men us samay tak prakash deta rahata haai jab tak ki pau n fatte , aur bhor ka tara tumhare dayon men n chamak utte .
61001020	par paahile yah jan lo ki pavitra shaasr kee koi bhee bhvishyadanee kisee ke apane hee vicharadhaara ke adhaar par poorn naheen hotee .
61001021	kyonaki koi bhee bhavishyadanee manushy kee ichchha se kabhee naheen hui par bhkt jan pavitra atma ke dara ubhare jakar parameshvar kee or se bolate the . .
61002001	aur jis prakar un logon men jootte bhvishyadvkta the usee prakar tum men bhee jootte upadeshak honge , jo nash karanevale pakhnd ka udaghaattn chhpai chhpaikar karenge aur us svamee ka jis ne unhen mol liya haai inkar karenge aur apane ap ko shaeegha vinash men dal denge .
61002002	aur bahutere un kee nai luchapan karenge , jin ke karan saty ke marga kee ninda kee jaegee .
61002003	aur ve lobh ke liye baten gaddhkar tumhen apane labh ka karan banaenge , aur jo dand kee agyaa un par pahile se ho chukee haai , usake ane men kuchh bhee der nahee , aur un ka vinash unghata naheen .
61002004	kyonaki jab parameshvar ne un svargadooton ko jinhon ne pap kiya naheen chhoda , par narak men bhejakar andhore kundon men dal diya , taaki nyay ke din tak bandee rahen .
61002005	aur prathm yug ke sansar ko bhee n chhoda , baran bhktaiheen sansar par maha jala-pralay bhejakar dharma ke pracharak nooh samet att vyaktaiyon ko bacha liya .
61002006	aur sadom aur amora ke nagaron ko vinash ka aeesa dand diya , ki unhen bhsm karake rakh men mila diya taaki ve anevale bhaktaiheen logon kee shaiksha ke liye aek drashttant banen .
61002007	aur dharmee loot ko jo adharmiyon ke ashauddh chala-chalan se bahut dukhee tha chhuttkara diya .
61002008	kyonki vah dharmee un ke beech men rahate ha , aur un ke adharma ke kamon ko dekh dekhkar , aur sun sunakar , har din apane sachche man ko peedit karata tha .
61002009	to prabhu ke bhkton ko pareeksha men se nikal lena aur adhaarmiyon ko nyay ke din tak dand kee dasha men rakhna bhee janata haai .
61002010	nij karake unhen jo ashauddh abhailashaaon ke peechhe shareer ke anusar chalate , aur prabhuta ko tuchchh janate haain : ve ddheet , aur hattee haai , aur unche padavalon ko bura bhla kahane se naheen drate .
61002011	taubhee svargadoot jo shaktai aur samarth men un se bade haai , prabhu ke samhane unhen bura bhla kahakar dosh naheen lagate .
61002012	par ye log nirbuaddh ipashauon hee ke tuly haai , jo pakade jane aur nash hone ke liye utpann hae haain aur jin baton ko janate hee nahee , un ke vishay men auron ko bura bhla kahate haai , ve apanee sadahatt men ap hee sad jaenge .
61002013	auron ka bura karane ke badale unheen ka bura hoga : unhen din dopahar sukh-vilas karana bhla lagata haai yah kalank aur dosh haai-jab ve tumhare sath khate peete haai , to apanee or se praem bhoj karake bhoga-avilas karate haain .
61002014	un hee ankhon men vyabhaichaarinee basee hui haai , aur ve pap kiae bina rook naheen sakate : ve chanchal manavalon ko fausala lete haain un ke man ko lobh karane ka abhyas ho gaya haai , ve santap ke santan haain .
61002015	ve seedho marga ko chhodkar bhttk gaae haai , aur baor ke putra bilam ke marga par ho liae haain jis ne adharma kee majadooree ko piry jana .
61002016	par usake aparadha ke vishay men ulahana diya gaya , yahan tak ki abol gadahee ne manushy kee bolee se us bhvishyadvkta ko usake bavalepan se roka .
61002017	ye log andho kuna , aur andhaee ke udaae hae badal haai , un ke liye anant andhakar ttharaya gaya haai .
61002018	ve vyarth ghamand kee baten kar karake luchapan ke kamon ke dara , un logon ko shaareearik abhailashaaon meen fansa lete haai , jo bhttke huon men se abhee nikal hee rahe haain .
61002019	ve unhen svatantra hone kee pratigyaa to dete haai , par ap hee sadahatt ke das haai , kyonki jo vyaaktai jis se har gaya haai , vah usaka das ban jata haai .
61002020	aur jab ve prabhu aur uddharakarta yeesha maseeh kee pahachan ke dara sansar kee nana prakar kee ashauddhta se bach nikale , aur fir un men fansakar har gaa , to un kee pichhlee dasha paahilee se bhee buree ho gai haai .
61002021	kyonaki dharma ke marga men n janana hee un ke liye is se bhla hota , ki use janakar , us pavitra agyaa se fir jate , jo unhen saunpee gai thee . un par yah kahavat tteek baaitttee haai ,

61003003	aur yah paahile jan lo , ki antaim dinon me hansee ttttha karanevale aenge , jo apanee hee aabhailashaaon ke anusar chalenge .

61003005	ve to jan boojhkar yah bool gaa , ki parameshvar ke vachan ke dara se akash praacheen kal se vartaman haai aur prathvee bhee jal men se banee aur jal men sthiar haai .
61003006	inheen ke dara us yug ka jagat jal men oob kar nash ho gaya .
61003007	par vartaman kal ke akash aur prathvee usee vachan ke dara isaliye rakhe haai , ki jalae jaen aur vah bhaktaiheen manushyon ke nyay aur nash hone ke din tak aeese hee rakhe rahenge . .
61003008	he piryo , yah aek bat tum se chhpaiee n rahe , ki prabhu ke yahan aek din hajar varsha ke barabar haai , aur hajar varsha aek din ke barabar haain .
61003009	prabhu apanee pratigyaa ke vishay men der naheen karata , jaaisee der kitane log samajhte haain par tumhare vishay men dhaeeraj dharata haai , aur naheen chahata , ki koi nash ho baran yah ki sab ko man firav ka avasar mile .
61003010	parantu prabhu ka din chor kee nain a jaega , us din akash badee hadhadahatt ke shabd se jata rahega , aur tatv bahut hee tapt hokar pighal jaenge , aur prathvee aur us par ke kam jal jaeenge .
61003011	to jab ki ye sab vastae , is reeti se pighalanevalee haai , to tumhen pavitra chalachalan aur bhktai men kaaise manushy hona chaahiae .
61003012	aur parameshvar ke us din kee batt kis reeti se johana chahiae aur usake jald ane ke liye kaaisa yatn karana chahiae jis ke karan akash ag se pighal jaenge , aur akash ke gan bahut hee tapt hokar gal jaenge .

61003016	vaaise hee us ne apanee sab paatraiyon men bhee in baton kee charcha kee haai jin men kitanee baten aeesee haai , jinaka samajhna kaattnai haai , aur anapaddh aur chanchal log un ke arthon ko bhee pavitra shaasr kee aur baton kee nain kheench tanakar apane hee nash ka karan banate haain .
61003017	isaliye he piryo tum log pahile hee se in baton ko janakar chaukas raho , taki adhaarmiyon ke bhram men fansakar apanee sthiarata ko hath se kaheen kho n do .
61003018	par hamare prabhu , aur uddharakarta yeesha maseeh ke anugrah aur pahachan men baddhte jao . usee kee maahima ab bhee ho , aur yuganuyug hotee rahe . ameena . .
62001001	us jeevan ke vachan ke vishay men jo aadi se tha , jise ham ne suna , aur jise apanee ankhon se dekha , varan jise ham ne dhyan se dekha aur hathon se chooa .
62001002	yah jeevan pragatt hua , aur ham ne use dekha , aur us kee gavahee dete haai , aur tumhen us anant jeevan ka samachar dete haai , jo pita ke sath tha , aur ham par pragatt hua .
62001003	jo kuchh ham ne dekha aur suna haai usaka samachar tumhen bhee dete haai , isaaliye ki tum bhee hamare sath sahabhagee ho aur hamaree yah sahabhaagita pita ke sat , aur usake putra yeesha maseeh ke sath haai .
62001004	aur ye baten ham isaaliye likhte haai , ki hamara anand poora ho jae . .
62001005	jo samachar ham ne us se suna , aur tumhen sunate haai , vah yah haai ki parameshvar jyoti haain : aur us men kuchh bhee andhakar naheen .
62001006	yaadi ham kahe , ki usake sath hamaree sahabhagita haai , aur fir andhakar men chale , to ham jootte haain : aur saty par naheen chalate .
62001007	par yaadi jaaisa vah jyoti men haai , vaaise hee ham bhee jyoti men chale , to aek doosare se sahabhaagita rakhte haain aur usake putra yeesha maseeh ka lohoo hamen sab papon se shauddh karata haai .
62001008	yaadi ham kahe , ki ham men kuchh bhee pap nahee , to apane ap ko dhaekha dete haain : aur ham men saty naheen .
62001009	yaadi ham apane papon ko man le , to vah hamare papon ko kshama karane , aur hamen sab adharma se shauddh karane men vishvasayogy aur dharmee haai .

62002002	aur vahee hamare papon ka praayaashchaitt haai : aur keval hamare hee nahee , baran sare jagat ke papon ka bhee .
62002003	yaadi ham us kee agyaaon ko manenge , to us se ham jan lenge ki ham use jan gaae haain .

62002005	par jo koi usake vachan par chale , us men sachamuch parameshvar ka praem siddh hua haai : hamen isee se maloom hota haai , ki ham us men haain .
62002006	so koi yah kahata haai , ki maain us men bana rahata hoo , use chaahiae ki ap bhee vaaisa hee chale jaaisa vah chalata tha .
62002007	he piryo , maain tumhen koi nai agyaa naheen likhta , par vahee puranee agyaa jo arambh se tumhen milee haai yah puranee agyaa vah vachan haai , jise tum ne suna haai .
62002008	fir maain tumhen nai agyaa likhta hoon aur yah to us men aur tum men sachchee ttharatee haai kayonki andhakar mittta jata haai aur saty kee jyoti abhee chamakane lagee haai .
62002009	jo koi yah kahata haai , ki maain jyoti men hoon aur apane bhai se baair rakhta haai , vah ab tak andhakar hee men haai .

62002011	par jo koi apane bhai se baair rakhta haai , vah andhakar men haai , aur andhakar men chalata haai aur naheen janata , ki kahan jata haai , kyonaki andhakar ne us kee ankhe andhaee kar dee haain . .
62002012	he balako , maain tumhen isaaliye likhta hoo , ki usake nam se tumhare pap kshama hae .
62002013	he pitaro , maain tumhen isaliye likhta hoo , ki jo adi se haai , tum use janate ho : he javano , maain tumhen isaliye likhta hoo , ki tum ne us dushtt par jay pai haai : he ladkon maain ne tumhen isaaliye likha haai , ki tum pita ko jan gaae ho .
62002014	he pitaro , maain ne tumhen isaliye likha haai , ki jo adi se haai tum use jan gaae ho : he javano , maain ne tumhen isaaliye likha haai , ki balavant ho , aur parameshvar ka vachan tum men bana rahata haai , aur tum ne us dushtt par jay pai haai .
62002015	tum n to sansar se aur n sansar men kee vastuon se praem rakho : yadi koi sansar se praem rakhta haai , to us men pita ka praem naheen haai .
62002016	kyonaki jo kuchh sansar men haai , arthata shareer kee abhailasha , aur ankhon kee abhailasha aur jeevika ka ghaman , vah pita kee or se nahee , parantu sansar hee kee or se haai .
62002017	aur sansar aur us kee aabhailashaaaen donon mittte jate haai , par jo parameshvar kee ichchha par chalata haai , vah sarvada bana rahega . .
62002018	he ladko , yah antaim samay haai , aur jaaisa tum ne suna haai , ki maseeh ka virodhaee anevala haai , usake anusar ab bhee bahut se maseeh ke virodhaee utte haain is se ham janate haai , ki yah antaim samay haai .
62002019	ve nikale to ham hee men se , par ham men ke the naheen kyonki yadi ham men ke hote , to hamare sath rahate , par nikal isaliye gaae ki yah pragatt ho ki ve sab ham men ke naheen haain .
62002020	aur tumhara to us pavitra se aabhaishok hua haai , aur tum sab kuchh janate ho .
62002021	maain ne tumhen isaaliye naheen likha , ki tum saty ko naheen janate , par isaaliye , ki use janate ho , aur isaliye ki koi joot , saty kee or se naheen .
62002022	jootta kaun haai ? keval vah , jo yeesha ke maseeh hone ka inkar karata haai aur maseeh ka virodhaee vahee haai , jo pita ka aur putra ka inkar karata haai .
62002023	jo koi putra ka inkar karata haai usake pas pita bhee naheen : jo putra ko man leta haai , usake pas pita bhee haai .
62002024	jo kuchh tum ne arambh se suna haai vahee tum men bana rahe : jo tum ne arambh se suna haai , yaadi vah tum men bana rahe , to tum bhee putra me , aur pita men bane rahoge .
62002025	aur jis kee us ne ham se pratigyaa kee vah anant jeevan haai .
62002026	maain ne ye baten tumhen us ke vishay men likhee haai , jo tumhen bhramate haain .
62002027	aur tumhara vah abhaishok , jo us kee or se kiya gaya , tum men bana rahata haai aur tumhen is ka prayojan nahee , ki koi tumhen sikhaa , baran jaaise vah aabhaishok jo us kee or se kiya gaya tumhen sab baten sikhata haai , aur yah sachcha haai , aur jootta naheen : aur jaaisa us ne tumhen sikhaya haai vaaise hee tum us men bane rahate ho .
62002028	nidan , he balako , us men bane raho ki jab vah pragatt ho , to hamen hiyav ho , aur ham usake ane par usake samhane laajjait n hon .
62002029	yaadi tum janate ho , ki vah dhaaarmik haai , to yah bhee janate ho , ki jo koi dharma ka kam karata haai , vah us se janma haai .
62003001	dekho pita ne ham se kaaisa praem kiya haai , ki ham parameshvar kee santan kahalae , aur ham haain bhee : is karan sansar hamen naheen janata , kyonki us ne use bhee naheen jana .
62003002	he piryo , abhee ham parameshvar kee santan haai , aur ab tak yah pragatt naheen hua , ki ham kya kuchh honge ! itana janate haai , ki jab vah pragatt hoga to ham bhee usake saman honge , kyonaki us ko vaaisa hee dekhenge jaaisa vah haai .
62003003	aur jo koi us par yah asha rakhta haai , vah apane ap ko vaaisa hee pavitra karata haai , jaaisa vah pavitra haai .
62003004	jo koi pap karata haai , vah vyavastha ka virodha karata haai or pap to vyavastha ka virodha haai .
62003005	aur tum janate ho , ki vah isaaliye pragatt hua , ki papon ko har le jae aur usake svabhav men pap naheen .

62003007	he balako , kisee ke bhramane men n ana jo dharma ke kam karata haai , vahee us kee nain dharmee haai .
62003008	jo koi pap karata haai , vah shautan kee or se haai , kyonaki shautan arambh hee se pap karata aya haai : parameshvar ka putra isaaliye pragatt hua , ki shautan ke kamon ko nash kare .
62003009	jo koi parameshvar se janma haai vah pap naheen karata kyonaki usaka beej us men bana rahata haai : aur vah pap kar hee naheen sakata , kyonaki parameshvar se janma haai .
62003010	isee se parameshvar kee santan , aur shautan kee santan jane jate haain jo koi dharma ke kam naheen karata , vah parameshvar se nahee , aur n vah , jo apane bhai se praem naheen rakhta .
62003011	kyonaki jo samachar tum ne arambh se suna , vah yah haai , ki ham aek doosare se baair rakhe .
62003012	aur kaain ke saman n bane , jo us dushtt se tha , aur jis ne apane bhai ko ghaat kiya : aur use kis karan ghaat kiya ? is karan ki usake kam bure the , aur usake bhai ke kam dharma ke the . .
62003013	he bhaiyo , yadi sansar tum se baair karata haai to achambha n karana .
62003014	ham janate haai , ki ham mratyu se par hokar jeevan men pahunche haain kyonaki ham bhaiyon se praem rakhte haain : jo praem naheen rakhta , vah mratyu kee dasha men rahata haai .
62003015	jo koi apane bhai se baair rakhta haai , vah hatyara haai aur tum janate ho , ki kisee hatyare men anant jeevan naheen rahata .
62003016	ham ne praem isee se jana , ki us ne hamare apane praan de diae aur hamen bhee bhaiyon ke liye praan dena chaahiae .
62003017	par jis kisee ke pas sansar kee sanpaati ho aur vah apane bhai ko kangal dekhkar us par taras n khana chahe , to us men parameshvar ka praem kyonkar bana rah sakata haai ?
62003018	he balako , ham vachan aur jeebh hee se nahee , par kam aur saty ke dara bhee praem karen .
62003019	isee se ham janenge , ki ham saty ke haain aur jis bat men hamara man hamen dosh dega , use vishay men ham usake samhane apane apane man ko ddhaddhs de sakenge .
62003020	kyonaki parameshvar hamare man se bada haai aur sab kuchh janata haai .
62003021	he piryo , yadi hamara man hamen dosh n de , to hamen parameshvar ke samhane hiyav hota haai .
62003022	aur jo kuchh ham mangate haai , vah hamen us se milata haai kyonaki ham us kee agyaaon ko manate haain aur jo use bhata haai vahee karate haain .
62003023	aur us kee agyaa yah haai ki ham usake putra yeesha maseeh ke nam par vishvas karen aur jaaisa us ne hamen agyaa dee haai usee ke anusar apas men praem rakhen .
62003024	aur jo us kee agyaaon ko manata haai , vah is me , aur yah us men bana rahata haai : aur isee se , arthata us atma se jo us ne hamen diya haai , ham janate haai , ki vah ham men bana rahata haai . .
62004001	he piryo , har aek atma kee prateeati n karo : baran atmaon ko parakho , ki ve parameshvar kee or se haain ki naheen kyonki bahut se jootte bhavishyadvkta jagat men nikal khde hae haain .
62004002	parameshvar ka atma tum isee reeti se pahachan sakate ho , ki jo koi atma man letee haai , ki yeesha maseeh shareer men hokar aya haai vah parameshvar kee or se haai .
62004003	aur jo koi atma yeesha ko naheen manatee , vah parameshvar kee or se naheen aur vahee to maseeh ke virodhaee kee atma haai jis kee charcha tum sun chuke ho , ki vah anevala haai : aur ab bhee jagat men haai .
62004004	he balako , tum parameshvar ke ho : aur tum ne un par jay pai haai kyonaki jo tum men haai , vah us se jo sansar men haai , bada haai .
62004005	ve sansar ke haai , is karan ve sansar kee baten bolate haai , aur sansar un kee sunata haai .
62004006	ham parameshvar ke haain : jo parameshvar ko janata haai , vah hamaree sunata haai jo parameshvar ko naheen janata vah hamaree nahanee sunata isee prakar ham saty kee atma aur bhram kee atma ko pahachan lete haain .
62004007	he piryo , ham apas men praem rakhen kyonki praem parameshvar se haai : aur jo koi praem karata haai , vah parameshvar se janma haai aur parameshvar ko janata haai .
62004008	jo praem naheen rakhta , vah parameshvar ko naheen janata haai , kyonaki parameshvar praem haai .
62004009	jo praem parameshvar ham se rakhta haai , vah is se pragatt hua , ki parameshvar ne apane aekalaute putra ko jagat men bheja haai , ki ham use dara jeevan paen .
62004010	praem is men naheen ki ham ne parameshvar ne praem kiya par is men haai , ki us ne ham se praem kiya aur hamare papon ke praayashchaitt ke liye apane putra ko bheja .
62004011	he piryo , jab parameshvar ne ham se aeesa praem kiya , to ham ko bhee apas men praem rakhna chaahiae .
62004012	parameshvar ko kabhee kisee ne naheen dekha yaadi ham apas men praem rakhe , to parameshvar ham men bana rahata haai aur usaka praem ham men siddh ho gaya haai .
62004013	isee se ham janate haai , ki ham us men bane rahate haai , aur vah ham men kyonaki us ne apane atma men se hamen diya haai .
62004014	aur ham ne dekh bhee liya aur gavahee dete haai , ki pita ne putra ko jagat ka uddharakarta karake bheja haai .
62004015	jo koi yah man leta haai , ki yeesha parameshvar ka putra haai : parameshvar us men bana rahata haai , aur vah parameshvar men .
62004016	aur jo praem parameshvar ham se rakhta haai , us ko ham jan gaa , aur hamen us kee prateeti haai parameshvar praem haai : jo praem men bana rahata haai , vah parameshvar men bana rahata haai aur parameshvar us men bana rahata haai .
62004017	isee se praem ham men siddh hua , ki hamen nyay ke din hiyav ho kyonaki jaaisa vah haai , vaaise hee sansar men ham bhee haai .
62004018	praem men bhy naheen hota , baran siddh praem bhy ko door kar deta haai , kyonki bhy ke kashtt hota haai , aur jo bhy karata haai , vah praem men siddh naheen hua .
62004019	ham isaliye praem karate haai , ki pahile us ne ham se praem kiya .
62004020	yaadi koi kahe , ki maain parameshvar se praem rakhta hoon aur apane bhai se baair rakhe to vah jootta haai : kyonki jo apane bhai se , jis us ne dekha haai , praem naheen rakhta , to vah parameshvar se bhee jise us ne naheen dekha , praem naheen rakh sakata .
62004021	aur us se hamen yah agyaa milee haai , ki jo koi apane parameshvar se praem rakhta haai , vah apane bhai se bhee praem rakhe . .
62005001	jisaka yah vishvas haai ki yeesha hee maseeh haai , vah parameshvar se utpann hua haai aur jo koi utpann karanevale se praem rakhta haai , vah us se bhee praem rakhta haai , jo us se utpann hua haai .
62005002	jab ham parameshvar se praem rakhte haai , aur us kee agyaaon ko manate haai , to isee se ham janate haai , ki parameshvar kee santanon se praem rakhte haain .

62005005	sansar par jay panevala kaun haai ? keval vah jis ka vishvas haai , ki yeesha , parameshvar ka putra haai .
62005006	yahee haai vah , jo panee aur lohoo ke dara aya tha arthata yeesha maseeha : vah n keval panee ke dara , baran panee aur lohoo donon ke dara aya tha .
62005007	aur jo gavahee deta haai , vah atma haai kyonki atma saty haai .

62005010	jo parameshvar ke putra par vishvas karata haai , vah apane hee men gavahee rakhta haai jis ne parameshvar ko prateeati naheen kee , us ne use jootta ttharaya kyonaki us ne us gavahee par vishvas naheen kiya , jo parameshvar ne apane putra ke vishay men dee haai .
62005011	aur vah gavahee yah haai , ki parameshvar ne hamen anant jeevan diya haai : aur yah jeevan usake putra men haai .
