66009010	aur un kee poonchh bichchhuon kee see thee , aur un men dnk the , aur unhen panch maheene tak manushyon ko dukh pahunchane kee jo samarth thee , vah un kee poonchhon men thee .
66009011	athah kund ka doot un par raja tha , usaka nam ibraanee men abaon , aur yoonanee men apullayon haai . .
66009012	paahilee vipaati beet chukee , dekho ab in ke bad do vipaatiayan aur honevalee haain . .
66009013	aur jab chhttven svargadoot ne turahee faookee to jo sone kee vedee parameshvar ke samhane haai usake seengo men se maain ne aeesa shabd suna .
66009014	manon koi chhttven svargadoot se jis ke pas turahee thee kah raha haai ki un char svargadooton ko jo badee nadee faurat ke pas bandho hae haai , khol de .
66009015	aur ve charon doot khol diae gaae jo us ghadee , aur din , aur maheene , aur varsha ke liye manushyon kee aek tihai ke mar dalane ko taaiyar kiae gaae the .
66009016	aur faaujon ke savaron kee ginatee bees karod thee maain ne un kee ginatee sunee .
66009017	aur mujhe is darshan men ghaede aur un ke aeese savar dikhai dia , jin kee jhlaimen ag , aur dhoomrakant , aur gandhak kee see thee , aur un ghaedon ke sir sinhon ke siron ke se the : aur un ke munh se ag , aur dhaua , aur gandhak nikalatee thee .
66009018	in teenon mariyon arthata ag , aur dhauae , aur gandhak se jo usake munh se nikalatee thee , manushyon kee aek tihai mar dalee gai .
66009019	kyonaki un ghaedon kee samarth un ke munh , aur un kee poonchhon men thee isaaliye ki un kee poonchhe sanpon kee see thee , aur un poonchhon ke sir bhee the , aur inheen se ve peeda pahunchate the .
66009020	aur bakee manushyon ne jo un maariyon se n mare the , apane hathon ke kamon se man n firaya , ki dushttatmaon kee , aur sone aur chandee , aur peetal , aur patthr , aur katt kee mooraton kee pooja n kare , jo n dek , n sun , n chal sakatee haain .
66009021	aur jo koon , aur ttona , aur vyaabhaichar , aur choriya , unhon ne kee thee , un se man n firaya . .
66010001	fir maain ne aek aur balee svargadoot ko badal oddhe hae svarga se utarate dekha , usake sir par meghadhanush tha : aur usaka munh soorya ka sa aur usake panv ag ke khnbhe ke se the .
66010002	aur usake hath men aek chhottee see khulee hui pustak thee us ne apana dahina panv samudra par , aur bayan prathvee par rakha .
66010003	aur aeese bade shabd se chillaya , jaaisa sinh garajata haai aur jab vah chillaya to garjan ke sat shabd sunai diae .
66010004	aur jab saton garjan ke shabd sunai de chuke , to maain likhne par tha , aur maain ne svarga se yah shabd suna , ki jo baten garjan ke un sat shabdon se sunee haai , unhen gupt rak , aur mat likh .
66010005	aur jis svargadoot ko maain ne samudra aur prathvee par khde dekh tha us ne apana daahina hath svarga kee or uttaya .
66010006	aur jo yuganuyug jeevata rahega , aur jis ne savarga ko aur jo kuchh us men haai , aur prathvee ko aur jo kuchh us par haai , aur samudra ko aur jo kuchh us men haai sraja usee kee shapath khakar kaha , ab to aur der n hogee .
66010007	baran sataven svargadoot ke shabd dene ke dinon men jab vah turahee foonkane par hoga , to parameshvar ka gupt manorath us susamachar ke anusar jo us ne apane das bhvishyadvktaon ko diya poora hoga .
66010008	aur jis shabd karanevale ko maain ne svarga se bolate suna tha , vah fir mere sath baten karane laga ki ja , jo svargadoot samudra aur prathvee par khda haai , usake hath men kee khulee huin pustak le le .
66010009	aur maain ne svargadoot ke pas jakar kaha , yah chhottee pustak mujhe de aur us ne mujh se kaha le ise kha jo , aur yah tera pett kadva to karegee , par tere munh men madha see meettee lagegee .
66010010	so maain vah chhottee pustak us svargadoot ke hath se lekar kha gaya , vah mere munh men madha see meettee to lagee , par jab maain use kha gaya , to mera pett kadva ho gaya .
66010011	tab mujh se yah kaha gaya , ki tujhe bahut se logo , aur jatiyo , aur bhashaao , aur rajaon par , fir bhvishyadvvanee karanee hogee . .
66011001	aur mujhe laggee ke saman aek sarakanda diya gaya , aur kisee ne kaha ut , parameshvar ke maandair aur vedee , aur us men bhjan karanevalon ko nap le .
66011002	aur maandair ke barah ka angan chhod de us mat nap , kyonaki vah anyajaatiyon ko diya gaya haai , aur ve paavitra nagar ko bayalees maheene tak raundengee .
66011003	aur maain apane do gavahon ko yah adhaikar doonga , ki ttatt oddhe hae aek hajar do sau satt din tak bhvishyadvvanee karen .
66011004	ye ve hee jaaitoon ke do ped aur do deevatt haain jo prathvee ke prabhu ke samhane khde rahate haain .
66011005	aur yaadi koi un ko haani pahunchana chahata haai , to un ke munh se ag nikalakar un ke baairiyon ko bhsm karatee haai , aur yaadi koi un ko haani pahunchana chahega , to avashy isee reeati se mar dala jaega .
66011006	inhen aadhaikar haai , ki akash ko band kare , ki un kee bhvishyadvvanee ke dinon men menh n barase , aur unhen sab panee par adhaikar haai , ki use lohoo banae , aur jab jab chahen tab tab prathvee par har prakar kee apaati laen .
66011007	aur jab ve apanee gavahee de chukenge , to vah pasha jo athah kund men se nikalega , un se ladkar unhen jeetega aur unhen mar dalega .
66011008	aur un kee lothen us bade nagar ke chauk men padee rahengee , jo atmaik reeti se sadom aur misar kahalata haai , jahan un ka prabhu bhee kroos par chaddhaya gaya tha .
66011009	aur sab logo , aur kulo , aur bhashaao , aur jatiyon men se log un kee lothen saddhe teen din tak dekhte rahenge , aur un kee lothen kabra men rakhne ne denge .
66011010	aur prathvee ke rahanevale , un ke marane se anandait aur magan honge , aur aek doosare ke pas bhentt bhejenge , kyonki in donon bhavishyadvktaon ne prathvee ke rahanevalon ko sataya tha
66011011	aur saddhe teen din ke bad parameshvar kee or se jeevan kee atma un men paaitt gai aur ve apane panvon ke bal khde ho gaa , aur unake dekhnevalon par bada bhy chha gaya .
66011012	aur unhen svarga se aek bada shabd sunai diya , ki yahan upar ao yah sun ve badal par savar hokar apane baaiariyon ke dekhte dekhte svarga par chaddh gaae .
66011013	fir usee ghadee aek bada bhuindol hua , aur nagar ka dasavan ansh gir pada aur us bhuindol se sat hajar manushy mar gaae aur shosh dr gaa , aur svarga ke parameshvar kee maahima kee . .
66011014	doosaree vipaati beet chukee , dekho , teesaree vipaati shaeegha anevalee haai . .
66011015	aur jab sataven doot ne turahee foonkee , to svarga men is vishay ke bade bade shabd hone lage ki jagat ka rajy hamare prabhu ka , aur usake maseeh ka ho gaya .
66011016	aur vah yuganuyug rajy karega , aur chaubeeson praacheen jo parameshvar ke samhane apane apane sinhasan par baaitte the , munh ke bal girakar parameshvar ko dandvat karake .
66011017	yah kahane lage , ki he sarvashaktaiman prabhu parameshvar , jo haai , aur jo tha , ham tera dhanyavad karate haai , ki too ne apanee badee samrth kam men lakar rajy kiya haai .
66011018	aur anyajatiyon ne krodha kiya , aur tera prakop a pada aur vah samay a pahuncha haai , ki mare huon ka nyay kiya ja , aur tere das bhavishyadvktaon aur pavitra logon ko aur un chhotte badon ko jo tere nam se drate haai , badala diya ja , aur prathvee ke bigadnevale nash kiae jaen . .
66011019	aur parameshvar ka jo maandair svarga men haai , vah khola gaya , aur usake maandair men us kee vacha ka sandook dikhai diya , aur bijaaliyan aur shabd aur garjan aur bhuindol ha , aur bade bade ole pade . .
66012001	fir svarga par aek bada chinh dikhai diya , arthata aek sree jo sooyrya oddhe hae thee , aur chand usake panvon tale tha , aur usake sir par barah taron ka mukutt tha .
66012002	aur vah garbhvatee hui , aur chillatee thee kayonaki prasav kee peeda use lagee thee aur vah bachcha janane kee peeda men thee .
66012003	aur aek aur chinh svarga par dikhai diya , aur dekho aek bada lal ajagar tha jis ke sat sir aur das seeng the , aur usake siron par sat rajamukutt the .
66012004	aur us kee poonchh ne akash ke taron kee aek tihai ko kheenchakar prathvee par dal diya , aur vah ajagar us sree se samhane jo jachcha thee , khda hua , ki jab vah bachcha jane to usake bachche ko nigal jae .
66012005	aur vah betta janee jo lohe ka dand liae ha , sab jaatiyon par rajy karane par tha , aur usaka bachcha aekaek parameshvar ke pas , aur usake sinhasan ke pas uttakar pahuncha diya gaya .
66012006	aur vah sree us jangal ko bhag gai , jahan parameshvar kee or se usake liye aek jagah taaiyar kee gai thee , ki vahan vah aek hajar do sau satt din tak palee jae . .
66012007	fir svarga par ladai hui , meekail aur usake svargadoot ajagar se ladne ko nikale , aur ajagar or unake doot us se lade .
66012008	parantu prabal n ha , aur svarga men un ke liye fir jagah n rahee .
66012009	aur vah bada ajagar arthata vahee purana sanp , jo ibalees aur shautan kahalata haai , aur sare sansar ka bhramanevala haai , prathvee par gira diya gaya aur usake doot usake sath gira diae gaae .
66012010	fir maain ne svarga par se yah bada shabd ate hae suna , ki ab hamare parameshvar ka uddhar , aur samarth , aur rajy , aur usake maseeh ka aadhaikar pragatt hua haai kyonki hamare bhaiyon par dosh laganevala , jo rat din hamare parameshvar ke samhane un par dosh lagaya karata tha , gira diya gaya .
66012011	aur ve memne ke lohoo ke kara , aur apanee gavahee ke vachan ke kara , us par jayavant ha , aur unhon ne apane praanon ko piry n jana , yahan tak ki mratyu bhee sah lee .
66012012	is kara , he svagor , aur un men ke rahanevalon magan ho he prathvee , aur samudra , tum par haya ! kyonki shautan bade krodha ke sath tumhare pas utar aya haai kyonki janata haai , ki usaka thoda hee samay aur bakee haai . .
66012013	aur jab ajagar ne dekha , ki maain prathvee par gira diya gaya hoo , to us sree ko jo betta janee thee , sataya .
66012014	aur us sree ko bade ukab ke do pankh diae gaa , ki sanp ke samhane se udkar jangal men us jagah pahunch ja , jahan vah aek samay , aur samayo , aur adho samay tak palee jae .
66012015	aur sanp ne us sree ke peechhe apane munh se nadee kee nai panee bahaya , ki use is nadee se baha de .
66012016	parantu prathvee ne us sree kee sahayata kee , aur apana munh kholakar us nadee ko jo ajagar ne apane munh se bahai thee , pee liya .
66012017	aur ajagar sree par krodhait hua , aur usakee shosh santan se jo parameshvar kee agyaaon ko manate , aur yeesha kee gavahee dene par sthiar haai , ladne ko gaya . aur vah samudra ke baloo par ja khda hua . .
66013001	aur maain ne aek pasha ko samudra men se nikalate hae dekha , jis ke das seeng aur sat sir the aur usake siron par ninda ke nam likhe hae the .
66013002	aur jo pasha maain ne dekha , vah cheete kee nai tha aur usake panv bhaloo ke se , aur munh sinh ka sa tha aur us ajagar ne apanee samarth , aur apana sinhasan , aur bada adhaikar , use de diya .
66013003	aur maain ne usake siron men se aek par aeesa bharee ghaav laga dekha , mano vah mane par haai fir usaka praanghaatak ghaav achchha ho gaya , aur saree prathvee ke log us pasha ke peechhe peechhe achanbha karate hae chale .
66013004	aur unhon ne ajagar kee pooja kee , kyonaki us ne pasha ko apana aadhaikar de diya tha aur yah kahakar pasha kee pooja kee , ki is pasha ke saman kaun haai ?
66013005	kaun us se lad sakata haai ? aur bade bol bolane aur ninda karane ke liye use aek munh diya gaya , aur use bayalees maheene tak kam karane ka aadhaikar diya gaya .
66013006	aur us ne parameshvar kee ninda karane ke liye munh khola , ki usake nam aur usake tamboo arthata svarga ke rahanevalon kee ninda kare .
66013007	aur use yah adhaikar diya gaya , ki pavitra logon se lade , aur un par jay pa , aur use har aek kul , aur log , aur bhasha , aur jati par adhaikar diya gaya .
66013008	aur prathvee ke ve sab rahanevale jin ke nam us memne kee jeevan kee pustak men likhe naheen gaa , jo jangal kee utpaati ke samay se ghaat hua haai , us pasha kee pooja karenge .
66013009	jis ke kan hon vah sune .
66013010	jis ko kaaid men padna haai , vah kaaid men padega , jo talavar se marega , avashy haai ki vah talavar se mara jaega , paavitra logon ka dhaeeraj aur vishvas isee men haai . .
66013011	fir maain ne aek aur pasha ko prathvee men se nikalate hae dekha , usake memne ke se do seeng the aur vah ajagar kee nain bolata tha .
66013012	aur yah us paahile pasha ka sara aadhaikar usake samhane kam men lata tha , aur prathvee aur usake rahanevalon se us paahile pasha kee jis ka praanghaatak ghaav achchha ho gaya tha , pooja karata tha .
66013013	aur vah bade bade chinh dikhata tha , yahan tak ki manushyon ke samhane svarga se prathvee par ag barasa deta tha .
66013014	aur un chinhon ke karan jinhen us pasha ke samhane dikhane ka adhaikar use diya gaya tha vah prathvee ke rahanevalon ko is prakar bhramata tha , ki prathvee ke rahanevalon se kahata tha , ki jis pasha ke talavar lagee thee , vah jee gaya haai , us kee moorat banao .
66013015	aur use us pasha kee moorat men praan dalane ka adhaikar diya gaya , ki pasha kee moorat bolane lage aur jitane log us pasha kee moorat kee pooja n kare , unhen marava dale .
66013016	aur us ne chhotte , bade , dhanee , kangal , svatrant , das sab ke dahine hath ya un ke mathe par aek aek chhap kara dee .
66013017	ki us ko chhod jis par chhap arthata us pasha ka nam , ya usake nam ka ank ho , aur koi len den n kar sake .
66013018	gyaan isee men haai , jise buaddh iho , vah is pasha ka ank jod le , kyonki manushy ka ank haai , aur usaka ank chh : sau chhyaiasatt haai . .
66014001	fir maain ne draashtti kee , aur dekho , vah memna siyyon pahad par khda haai , aur usake sath aek lakh chaualees hajar jan haai , jin ke mathe par usaka aur usake pita ka nam likha hua haai .
66014002	aur svarga se mujhe aek aeesa shabd sunai diya , jo jal kee bahut dhaaraon aur bade garjan ka sa shabd tha , aur jo shabd maain ne suna vah aeesa tha , mano veena bajanevale veena bajate hon .
66014003	aur ve sinhasan ke samhane aur charon praanaiyon aur praacheenon ke samhane mano , yah naya geet ga rahe the , aur un aek lakh chaualees hajar jano ko chhod jo mol liae gaae the , koi vah geet n seekh sakata tha .
66014004	ye ve haai , jo striayon ke sath ashauddh naheen ha , par kunvare haain : ye ve hee haai , ki jahan kaheen memna jata haai , ve usake peechhe ho lete haain : ye to parameshvar ke nimitt pahile fal hone ke liye manushyon men se mol liae gaae haain .
66014005	aur un ke munh se kabhee joott n nikala tha , ve nirdosh haain . .
66014006	fir maain ne aek aur svargadoot ko akash ke beech men udte hae dekha jis ke pas prathvee par ke rahanevalon kee har aek jati , aur kul , aur bhasha , aur logon ko sunane ke liye sanatan susamachar tha .
66014007	aur us ne bade shabd se kaha parameshvar se dro aur us kee mahima karo kyonki usake nyay karane ka samay a pahuncha haai , aur usaka bhjan karo , jis ne svarga aur prathvee aur samudra aur jal ke sote banae . .
66014008	fir is ke bad aek aur doosara svargadoot yah kahata hua aya , ki gir pada , vah bada babul gir pada jis ne apane vyaabhaichar kee kopamay maadira saree jatiyon ko pilai haai . .
66014009	fir in ke bad aek aur svargadoot bade shabd se yah kahata hua aya , ki jo koi us pasha aur us kee moorat kee pooja kare , aur apane mathe ya apane hath par us kee chhap le .
66014010	to vah parameshvar ka prakop kee niree maadira jo usake krodha ke kattore men dalee gai haai , paega aur paavitra svargadooton ke samhane , aur memne ke samhane ag aur gandhak kee peeda men padega .
66014011	aur un kee peeda ka dhauan yuganuyug uttta rahega , aur jo us pasha aur us kee moorat kee pooja karate haai , aur jo usake nam hee chhap lete haai , un ko rat din chaain n milega .
66014012	paavitra logon ka dhaeeraj isee men haai , jo parameshvar kee agyaaon ko manate , aur yeesha par vishvas rakhte haain . .
66014013	aur maain ne svarga se yah shabd suna , ki likh jo murade prabhu men marate haai , ve ab se dhany haai , atma kahata haai , han kyonaki ve apane parishramon se vishraam paenge , aur un ke kayrya un ke sath ho lete haain . .
66014014	aur maain ne drashtti kee , aur dekho , aek ujala badal haai , aur us badal par manushy ke putra sareekha koi baaitta haai , jis ke sir par sone ka mukutt aur hath men chokha hansua haai .
66014015	fir aek aur svargadoot ne mandair men se nikalakar , us se jo badal par baaitta tha , bade shabd se pukarakar kaha , ki apana hansua lagakar lavanee kar , kyonki lavane ka samay a panhucha haai , isaliye ki prathvee kee khetee pak chukee haai .
66014016	so jo badal par baaitta tha , us ne prathvee par apana hansua lagaya , aur prathvee kee lavanee kee gai . .
66014017	fir aek aur svargadoot us mandair men se nikala , jo svarga men haai , aur usake pas bhee chokha hansua tha .
66014018	fir aek aur svargadoot jis ag par adhaikar tha , vedee men se nikala , aur jis ke pas chokha hansua tha , us se unche shabd se kaha apana chokha hansua lagakar prathvee kee dakh lata ke guchchhe katt le kyonaki us kee dakh pak chukee haai .
66014019	aur us svargadoot ne prathvee par apana hansua dala , aur prathvee kee dakh lata ka fal kattkar , apane parameshvar ke prakop ke bade ras ke kund men dal diya .
66014020	aur nagar ke bahar us ras kund men dakh raunde gaa , aur ras kund men se itana lohoo nikala ki ghaedon ke lagamon tak pahuncha , aur sau kos tak bah gaya . .
66015001	fir maain ne svarga men aek aur bada aur adabhut chinh dekha , arthata sat svargadoot jin ke pas saton pichhlee vipaatiayan thee , kyonki un ke ho jane par parameshvar ke prakop ka ant haai . .
66015002	aur maain ne ag se mile hae kanch ka sa aek samudra dekha , aur jo us pasha par , aur us kee moorat par , aur usake nam ke ank par jayavant hae the , unhen us kanch ke samudra ke nikatt parameshvar kee veenaon ko liae hae khde dekha .
66015003	aur ve parameshvar ke das moosa ka geet , aur memne ka geet ga gakar kahate the , ki he srvashaktaiman prabhu parameshvar , tere kayrya bade , aur adabhut haai , he yug yug ke raja , teree chal tteek aur sachchee haai .
66015004	he prabhu , kaun tujh se n drega ? aur tere nam kee mahima n karega ? kyonki keval too hee paavitra haai , aur saree jaatiyan akar tere samhane dandvata karengee , kyonaki tere nyay ke kam pragatt ho gaae haain . .
66015005	aur is ke bad maain ne dekha , ki svarga men sakshaee ke tamboo ka maandair khola gaya .
66015006	aur ve saton svargadoot jin ke pas saton vipaatiayan thee , shauddh aur chamakatee hui maanai pahine hae chhatee par sunahale pattuke bandho hae maandair se nikale .
66015007	aur un charon praaanaiyon men se aek ne un sat svargadooton ko parameshvar ke , jo yuganuyug jeevata haai , prakop se bhre hae sat sone ke kattore diae .
66015008	aur parameshvar kee maahima , aur us kee samarth ke karan mandair dhauaen se bhr gaya aur jab tak un saton svargadooton kee saton vipaatiayan samapt n hui , tab tak koi maandair men n ja saka . .
66016001	fir maain ne maandair men kisee ko unche shabd se un saton svargadooton se yah kahate suna ki jao , parameshvar ke prakop ke saton kattoron ko prathvee par undel do . .
66016002	so paahile ne jakar apana kattora prathvee par undel diya . aur un manushyon ke jin par pasha kee chhap thee , aur jo us kee moorat kee pooja karate the , aek prakar ka bura aur dukhdai faoda nikala . .
66016003	aur doosare ne apana kattora samudra par undel diya aur vah mare hae ka sa lohoo ban gaya , aur samudra men ka har aek jeevadhaaree mar gaya . .
66016004	aur teesare ne apana kattora naadiyo , aur panee ke soton par undel diya , aur ve lohoo ban gaae .
66016005	aur maain ne panee ke svargadoot ko yah kahate suna , ki he pavitra , jo haai , aur jo tha , too nyayee haai aur too ne yah nyay kiya .
66016006	kyonaki unhon ne pavitra logo , aur bhvishyadvktaon ko lohoo bahaya tha , aur too ne unhen lohoo pilaya kyonki ve isee yogy haain .
66016007	fir maain ne vedee se yah shabd suna , ki han he sarvashaktaiman prabhu parameshvar , tere nirny tteek aur sachche haain . .
66016008	aur chauthe ne apana kattora soorya par undel diya , aur use manushyon ko ag se jhulasa dene ka adhaikar diya gaya .
66016009	aur manushy badee tapan se jhulas gaa , aur parameshvar ke nam kee jise in vipaatiayon par adhaikar haai , ninda kee aur us kee mahima karane ke liye man n firaya . .
66016010	aur panchaven ne apana kattora us pasha ke sinhasan par undel diya aur usake rajy par andhora chha gaya aur log peeda ke mare apanee apanee jeebh chabane lage .
66016011	aur apanee peedaon aur faodon ke karan svarga ke parameshvar kee ninda kee aur apane apane kamon se man n firaya . .
66016012	aur chhttven ne apana kattora badee nadee faurat par undel diya aur usaka panee sookh gaya ki poorva disha ke rajaon ke liye marga taaiyar ho jae .

66017001	aur jin sat svargadooton ke pas ve sat kattore the , un men se aek ne akar mujh se yah kaha ki idhar a , maain tujhe us badee veshya ka dand dikhau , jo bahut se paaniyon par baaittee haai .

66022001	fir us ne mujhe billaur kee see jhlakatee hui , jeevan ke jal kee aek nadee dikhai , jo parameshvar aur menmne ke sinhasan se nikalakar us nagar kee sadk ke beechon beech bahatee thee .
66022002	aur nadee ke is para aur us par , jeevan ka ped tha : us men barah prakar ke fal lagate the , aur vah har maheene falata tha aur us ped ke paton se jati jati ke log change hote the .
66022003	aur fir srap n hoga aur parameshvar aur memne ka sinhasan us nagar men hoga , aur usake das us kee seva karenge .
66022004	aur usaka munh dekhenge , aur usaka nam un ke mathon par likha hua hoga .
66022005	aur fir rat n hogee , aur unhen deepak aur soorya ke ujiyale ka prayojan n hoga , kyonki prabhu parameshvar unhen ujiyala dega : aur ve yuganuyug rajy karenge . .
66022006	fir us ne mujh se kaha , ye baten vishvas ke yogy , aur saty haai , aur prabhu ne jo bhavishyadvktaon kee atmaon ka parameshvar haai , apane svargadoot ko isaaliye bheja , ki apane dason ko ve baten jin ka shaeegha poora hona avashy haai dikhaae .
66022007	dek , maain shaeegha anevala hoon dhany haai vah , jo is pustak kee bhvishyadanee kee baten manata haai . .
66022008	maain vahee yoohanna hoo , jo ye baten sunata , aur dekhta tha aur jab maain ne suna , aur dekha , to jo svargadoot mujhe ye baten dikhata tha , maain usake panvon par dandvat karane ke liye gir pada .
66022009	aur us ne mujh se kaha , dek , aeesa mat kara kyonaki maain tera aur tere bhai bhvishyadvktaon aur is pustak kee baton ke mananevalon ka sangee das hoon parameshvar hee ko dandvat kara . .
66022010	fir us ne mujh se kaha , is pustak kee bhavishyadvvanee kee baton ko band mat kara kyonki samay nikatt haai . .
66022011	jo anyay karata haai , vah anyay hee karata rahe aur jo maalin haai , vah maalin bana rahe aur jo dharmee haai , vah dharmee bana rahe aur jo paavitra haai , vah pavitra bana rahe .
66022012	dek , maain shaeegha anevala hoon aur har aek ke kam ke anusar badala dene ke liye praatifal mere pas haai .
66022013	maain alafaa aur omiga , paahila aur pichhla , adi aur ant hoon .
66022014	dhany ve haai , jo apane vasr dhae lete haai , kyonki unhen jeevan ke ped ke pas ane ka aadhaikar milega , aur ve faattkon se hokar nagar men pravesh karenge .
66022015	par kutte , aur ttonhe , aur vyaabhaicharee , aur hatyare aur moortipoojak , aur har aek joott ka chahanevala , aur gaddhnevala bahar rahega . .
66022016	mujh yeesha ne apane svargadoot ko isaaliye bheja , ki tumhare age kaleeasiyaon ke vishay men in baton kee gavahee de : maain daud ka mool , aur vansha , aur bhor ka chamakata hua tara hoon . .
66022017	aur atma , aur dualhain donon kahatee haai , a aur sunanevala bhee kahe , ki a aur jo pyasa ho , vah ae aur jo koi chahe vah jeevan ka jal sentament le . .
66022018	maain har aek ko jo is pustak kee bhvishyadanee kee baten sunata haai , gavahee deta hoo , ki yadi koi manushy in baton men kuchh baddhaa , to parameshvar un vipaatiayon ko jo is pustak men likhee haai , us par baddhaaega .
66022019	aur yaadi koi is bhavishyadanee kee pustak kee baton men se kuchh nikal dale , to parameshvar us jeevan ke ped aur pavitra nagar men se jis kee charcha is pustak men haai , usaka bhag nikal dega . .
66022020	jo in baton kee gavahee deta haai , vah yah kahata haai , han shaeegha anevala hoon . ameena . he prabhu yeesha a . .
66022021	prabhu yeesha ka anugrah paavitra logon ke sath rahe . ameena . .
